Peter, though Georgia hasn’t been recognized by the rest of the world as a battleground state for long, Georgia Democrats continue to show the world that the Peach State is in play. Though the outcome of the presidential race wasn’t what we worked so hard for, we achieved Democratic gains in many swing and even deep-red counties – AND we increased Kamala Harris's vote total over President Biden's winning total in 2020 by more than 74,000 votes. That’s a bigger increase than every other battleground state combined! We know that progress is not a linear path and that movements like ours do not come and go overnight. Our movement is bigger than a single race or election cycle — it persists through both wins and losses, progress and setbacks. **This year’s election result is a setback, but it is not a defeat.** We entered the 2024 cycle as a new presidential battleground state, and we cemented our status as one for cycles to come. We know that there is hard work ahead to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026, and we’re ready to do that work. [It’s going to take a strong coalition of grassroots supporters to maximize Democratic momentum in Georgia ahead of the 2026 and 2028 elections, and building that coalition starts here and now. Though the outcome of the presidential race wasn’t what we worked so hard for, we achieved Democratic gains in many swing and even deep-red counties – AND we increased Kamala Harris's vote total over President Biden's winning total in 2020 by more than 74,000 votes. That’s a bigger increase than every other battleground state combined! We know that progress is not a linear path and that movements like ours do not come and go overnight. Our movement is bigger than a single race or election cycle — it persists through both wins and losses, progress and setbacks. This year’s election result is a setback, but it is not a defeat. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Rebuild a good and Godly culture
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfni6X1qMX0f5ps-1CpLrQASGHaL22dozaFri872CdTDaeqqBt-YGdny95S2wtDcDE9d8QNjjDBtr4mLV3NlHpLHnmbZatE_ws53l-1UV2NJnU5iUHayODI2dDN92TvCREEg6B4ZS1fM0TxxAc7BRkZHrJSUYAKAfWps-uBQYjLd97g%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfnjW8Ep6-OsBtbtKDrUfX1akoZLDW1ahWBaJKeMM54Y8JjwadGmWXpQLNZ7MOrp25w3yFVr3hWDpw-j5wZWCr3FTOIjrfDFKHYrQjY1RHq0N_MXOPEiQT8l--pArmDaAaWnuvNVY2MPuIz1hU6838f4MprK6XEmERvdL4JJnPXbrDA%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfnjWUHgu6tMzWUm1-ZM5VWF-h1DxQfWvHvew3CT9cEvStePQ0pXtN9uanTLplTDfaBXR4UqzMU5L4vSYST9a6Y3vOySqaeIFicd8fSVEGh3gj-3Mn1kn2trzbznIj_mx0KXKnhqCwOAxgJwbqu65BSCQILaguhg6biTjzRJAR3CSCg%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfnhBec89Z7rXfYzVr_qeGQQ7j4HvXNrDF6yhYPEZoRj0kNc8FWz414hXrSVnP6R3l63iXoo1QkVOgd96ud97JNVXOcVH1dVAahj5wBiOcfjzjJ720cx4AAb9w9_ohEmlReSQRTqG4prGu8kd63b2rePRzU8X96GDdhtptMkde2tIsw%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfnj4j465aXLwPeJ20AW4nq7cir_RjW2YmBXzzLdduwiRvRijUmiobqfiRi0i9vO4R-FAX5nTE2cMjUQGALGF1rmk3V14Jhpijq8yCeYf-K2Gce9dK9AgaOFwvVKAYW4Ma0NJReBmMKXqXup6ZCYLTuVBBNLkPXX7ms6Z62-zLPxgWQ%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfnj7qWWmxllJp-PwC9oktQPxL-LSeJ0Oh0OANsMow4tOqUFnpx0VgnnqPPakjvKpgdfP9Z9gxaSPMk04T6Vp0C_M-ncKFPhc6ePZwta6KUsEm0XJpULhxD_l8rX-aAo5fbbmsHqIhn9ryFNsU5c_fpWcFfEBReNTMune7DX3E1Eqtw%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6fb93897c894279871c9df36ed202b6&_e=Z3lrlroT3AQoqwBcmt8nB2gV1Iwnv83PSe8OLObie3z3YaR2MZU9TcD3upk7-dSm2yTXTZO6A4vWTFfripiC2E1kCvXnCoB8QLmnY5522aaueUhNJY0YCmROaEd7HpMYlqLU8BYUH5uSMv2LaqfFvJU7Hj54KZbhwPWK1imaACEFng2evjo-V3z3G8RiMgq1WlCiSGEtPIXDVnooyPihYwPPLl9P0fMlmSDWlhbhfnggNnUGbaEZriQDGoILsMKX5NUKMm-lL6FuYsuwOYTJn5B_xRjgWImh7fe8HlnJGfPor-ldpFIp1nX70z-N0u5CJ1wE9GPwEbrjJ-Dpy3_SKPUOrdUkNJG2btcbJM7vGC-TWwsNYD-6pM0ekALP6ATcwzLP3rctjOtjtRn5Xt8OHw%3D%3D)

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Fwd: The Owyhee is calling!
body:
| | Dear Peter, As passionate defenders of our climate and environment, I want to make sure you saw Eliza’s last email. [**The Owyhee needs your help!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384459/516504602/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) A contribution of any amount will help us to fight for the protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands, a sacred place that can be enjoyed by everyone for generations to come. This is a once in a lifetime opportunity, and the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. [Did you know that a gift of $50 is all it takes for us to recruit a volunteer who will attend town halls, write letters to the editor (LTEs) and speak to elected officials in support of the Owyhees?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384462/516504611/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) [**Make a donation for the protection of the Owyhee now! **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384464/516504614/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384467/516504617/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) With thanks,
Sarah Kline

to opt-out but still remain on our general email list!_ | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384471/516504621/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384474/516504624/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)P[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384475/516504626/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)rotecting the Owyhee Canyonlands has been our top priority campaign this year, and for good reason. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a vast, magical, and sacred place of more than 2.5 million acres, presenting the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. This one-of-a-kind treasure has no protections even though it faces encroaching threats of oil, recreation, and farming. **[But it needs you!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384476/516504628/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)** We’re running a fundraising drive to fund our final push to protect the Owyhee. Our goal is $5,000. If you donate now, your gift will go towards gathering petition signatures, recruiting volunteers to attend town halls, and empowering volunteers to write letters to the editor (LTEs) in support and speak to elected officials. [**Will you pick up the call and support the protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands by donating now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384479/516504631/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98384481/516504635/-1716837958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjOWQxMWU4LWM4YjUtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=AAm8HFc-kE7AozBYTl9CxXZXiwYukyi79BKWSk-OJ_I=&emci=51eba7ed-16b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6c9d11e8-c8b5-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)** The Owyhee is a special place that needs our protection, and we need the power to do it. clean_body: | | Dear Peter, As passionate defenders of our climate and environment, I want to make sure you saw Eliza’s last email. A contribution of any amount will help us to fight for the protection of the Owyhee Canyonlands, a sacred place that can be enjoyed by everyone for generations to come. This is a once in a lifetime opportunity, and the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. With thanks, Sarah Kline OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, to opt-out but still remain on our general email list! | Hi Peter, the Owyhee Canyonlands has been our top priority campaign this year, and for good reason. The Owyhee Canyonlands is a vast, magical, and sacred place of more than 2.5 million acres, presenting the largest conservation opportunity in the American West. This one-of-a-kind treasure has no protections even though it faces encroaching threats of oil, recreation, and farming. We’re running a fundraising drive to fund our final push to protect the Owyhee. Our goal is $5,000. If you donate now, your gift will go towards gathering petition signatures, recruiting volunteers to attend town halls, and empowering volunteers to write letters to the editor (LTEs) in support and speak to elected officials. The Owyhee is a special place that needs our protection, and we need the power to do it. We need our volunteers to continue to show up for the Owyhee, and we need the continued support of our generous donor base. Activism is what gets stuff like this done, but it takes all of us doing and giving what we can at every step of the way. With gratitude, Eliza Walton OLCV Coalition Director P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. _That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 12/8/2024
body:
Jared Polis is leading the Left’s fight against Trump’s vision for America
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**December 8, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
Governor Jared Polis continues to wear the mask of moderation while [leading the charge against the incoming Trump administration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), positioning himself at the forefront of a Democratic coalition determined to obstruct federal reforms. At the recent Governors Safeguarding Democracy Coalition meeting, [Polis joined allies like California’s Gavin Newsom](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to strategize resistance against President-elect Trump’s efforts to reduce federal overreach—a move that highlights Polis’s far-left allegiance despite his claims of being a centrist.
While Trump prioritizes eliminating the Department of Education to empower local communities and reduce bureaucracy, Polis [doubles down on funding bloated education budgets](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Under his leadership, Colorado faces a $1 billion shortfall, yet the governor insists on directing funds to projects like his transportation vision, which prioritizes [bike lanes over practical infrastructure improvements](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), further alienating Colorado’s working families.
Polis’s track record speaks for itself. Whether it’s imposing extreme environmental regulations, creating sanctuary state policies, or pushing restrictive gun laws that have been criticized as unconstitutional, his actions underscore a commitment to an increasingly progressive agenda. The irony is stark: a governor who claims to champion democracy uses his position to bypass legislative processes and impose divisive policies. His [transportation initiatives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), for instance, have drawn public backlash for prioritizing ideology over community needs, reflecting his disconnect from everyday Coloradans.
As Polis leads this resistance, one must ask: Is he serving the people of Colorado or using the state as a [platform for his national ambitions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)? His actions not only undermine local priorities but also expose his readiness to put partisan battles above pragmatic governance. This fight is just beginning, but for Colorado, the stakes couldn’t be higher.

In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl

**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Protect Kids Colorado (PKC) first launched earlier this year with two citizen initiatives to address the harm being caused by gender ideology in our public schools._ __

name: Andrea Hunley
subject: End of Year Party! Monday 12/16 at Mass Ave Pub
body:
Join for a gathering and fundraiser to support Andrea Hunley. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/57188f4f5b75/youre-invited-vp-debate-watch-party-18245464?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| **THANK YOU! **

As the year draws to a close, I want to take a moment to personally thank you for your steadfast support for my work as your Indiana State Senator.

This marks the start of my third legislative session. Know that I continue to work hard for you and our community each day.
---
| **END OF YEAR PARTY** **MONDAY, DECEMBER 16
4:30-6:30pm
Mass Ave Pub | 745 Massachusetts Ave** Last month I was elected as the Assistant Leader of the Senate Democratic Caucus. This new leadership role presents an incredible opportunity to amplify our collective voice. As we look ahead to the coming year with a challenging national situation, **it will be critical to have a clear, strong strategy at the legislature. **I am also focused on the 2026 election cycle, my re-election, and how we can improve candidate recruitment and training to grow our caucus and elect more progressive leaders. **The next few weeks are especially important.** Your contribution before the end of the year will help us enter this critical budget session with the resources needed to effectively advocate for the issues that matter most. Every dollar raised will ensure we are prepared to face the challenges ahead. _**Note: **All contributions must be received prior to January 7. To honor our commitment to ethical leadership and the state budget process, we do not accept campaign contributions during session to avoid even the appearance of a conflict of interest._ **See you at Mass Ave Pub! **
---
| [DONATE](https://coom.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c2b34b98b419cb5ca0511f25&id=002fe455a2&e=d9ebccf591 "DONATE")

| | **KNOW BEFORE YOU GO:**
**The more the merrier, invite friends and neighbors.**

**21+ Only:** Mass Ave Pub cannot admit folks under 21.

**Parking: **Parking is available on the street and in the Firefighter's Union Hall lot (corner of St. Clair and College)

**Attire:** Come as you are.

**Food & Drink Details: **We'll have appetizers and drinks to share. You can purchase more and the bar will be open for your business.

clean_body: Join for a gathering and fundraiser to support Andrea Hunley. | | | | | | | | | THANK YOU! As the year draws to a close, I want to take a moment to personally thank you for your steadfast support for my work as your Indiana State Senator. This marks the start of my third legislative session. Know that I continue to work hard for you and our community each day. | END OF YEAR PARTY MONDAY, DECEMBER 16 4:30-6:30pm Mass Ave Pub | 745 Massachusetts Ave Last month I was elected as the Assistant Leader of the Senate Democratic Caucus. This new leadership role presents an incredible opportunity to amplify our collective voice. As we look ahead to the coming year with a challenging national situation, it will be critical to have a clear, strong strategy at the legislature. I am also focused on the 2026 election cycle, my re-election, and how we can improve candidate recruitment and training to grow our caucus and elect more progressive leaders. The next few weeks are especially important. Your contribution before the end of the year will help us enter this critical budget session with the resources needed to effectively advocate for the issues that matter most. Every dollar raised will ensure we are prepared to face the challenges ahead. Note: All contributions must be received prior to January 7. To honor our commitment to ethical leadership and the state budget process, we do not accept campaign contributions during session to avoid even the appearance of a conflict of interest. See you at Mass Ave Pub! | "DONATE" | | | KNOW BEFORE YOU GO: The more the merrier, invite friends and neighbors. 21+ Only: Mass Ave Pub cannot admit folks under 21. Parking: Parking is available on the street and in the Firefighter's Union Hall lot (corner of St. Clair and College) Attire: Come as you are. Food & Drink Details: We'll have appetizers and drinks to share. You can purchase more and the bar will be open for your business. | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Andrea Hunley for Indy, All rights reserved.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “This is not democracy. It is oligarchy.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In case you missed it, outside spending in the 2024 elections “shattered
records” at $4.5 billion, with more than $1 billion spent by dark money
Super PACs and nearly $2 billion spent by just 150 billionaire families.

Meanwhile, over 36 million people are living in poverty in the United
States and their voices are being ignored.

This was made possible because of the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in
Citizens United v. FEC, which ended century-old campaign finance laws that
previously prevented corporations and wealthy donors from spending
unlimited amounts of money on U.S. elections.

Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Rashida Tlaib are right:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241208?refcode=em20241208-36216&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36216_1203867_lI-Z_B&akid=36216%2E1203867%2ElI-Z_B ]Tweet from Bernie Sanders: Billionaires in the U.S. are .0005% of the
population, yet accounted for 18% of 2024 electoral spending. Just 150
billionaires families spent nearly $2 billion. This is not democracy. It
is oligarchy. Time to overturn Citizens United and move to public funding
of elections.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241208?refcode=em20241208-36216&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36216_1203867_lI-Z_B&akid=36216%2E1203867%2ElI-Z_B ]Tweet from Rashida Tlaib: Billionaires and special interest groups
spent a record-breaking $1 billion in dark money this election cycle. It’s
sick. Billionaires cannot continue to buy our elections. We need to end
Citizens United.

We are in the situation we are today — in which billionaires and corporate
interests can buy elections and hold immense influence over our leaders in
Washington — directly because of Citizens United.

If we want to get dark money out of politics and start prioritizing
working class people over corporations and the wealthiest few, we must
overturn it — and to do that, we need to elect more progressive, working
class leaders to Congress who refuse to take contributions from these bad
actors.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241208?refcode=em20241208-36216&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36216_1203867_lI-Z_B&akid=36216%2E1203867%2ElI-Z_B ]That’s exactly what Justice Democrats is working toward, but the number
of candidates we recruit and help run for office is determined by how much
we raise from grassroots donors like you. Will you invest in the next
generation of progressives who will fight to overturn Citizens United by
pitching in $5 today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241208?refcode=em20241208-36216&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36216_1203867_lI-Z_B&akid=36216%2E1203867%2ElI-Z_B ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241208-36216-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36216_1203867_lI-Z_B&akid=36216%2E1203867%2ElI-Z_B

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36216%2E1203867%2ElI-Z_B

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
our last chance to protect liberty and the rule of law...

| Have you heard? Donald Trump has nominated far-right MAGA figure Kash Patel to be Director of the FBI. Donald Trump will fire the current FBI Director — who he appointed during his first term — and replace him with a loyal lackey. **[Our instinct is to oppose this nomination full-force. But Republicans and some in the media are saying that Donald Trump’s victory means that Americans will support his nominees. Donald Trump will fire the current FBI Director — who he appointed during his first term — and replace him with a loyal lackey. There’s a few reasons why the nomination of Kash Patel seems like a bad idea to us: ➜ He has publicly advocated for using the FBI to target political opponents and members of the media; ➜ He has actively endorsed unfounded conspiracy theories , including those propagated by the wacky QAnon movement; ➜ And he has promoted the “big lie” that Donald Trump won the 2020 election. | | I wanted to make sure you saw the latest. **FIRST:** MAGA extremists sued in court to prohibit vote-by-mail here in Oregon, but their case was dismissed by the United States Supreme Court earlier this year. **THEN:** They refused to give up — and pressed ahead with efforts to undermine trust in our elections, and unveiling their plans to ban vote-by-mail through an initiative petition.. **NOW:** **[With vote-by-mail under attack once again, I’m asking you to join the fight to defend our democracy and take a stand against MAGA extremism by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98385551/516517878/-569431239?refcode=241208em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODIzYTI1Yy1kYmI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHmFz9rBbgr-H5n-kIExPd7GgZrbGFD7kyWqF63KF-Y=)**

**I’ll be blunt: This initiative isn’t about election integrity or strengthening our democracy. It’s about discouraging people from voting by prohibiting vote-by-mail.** The facts show that an overwhelming number of Oregonians support it, and there’s simply no evidence of electoral fraud. As your next Secretary of State, I will work tirelessly to defend our elections and access to the ballot. **[But I can’t get the job done alone, and MAGA Republicans aren’t giving up the fight. So please, at this pivotal moment for the future of Oregon’s democracy, can I count on you to chip in any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98385553/516517880/-569431239?refcode=241208em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODIzYTI1Yy1kYmI1LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHmFz9rBbgr-H5n-kIExPd7GgZrbGFD7kyWqF63KF-Y=)**

An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Know Your Rights
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs8yAoxW5N

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os8yAoxW5N

Dear Fellow Patriot,

Since President Biden came into office
in 2021, government overreach has soared to new heights.

This brazen abuse of power is
unsettling and nauseating.

With today's polarized political
discourse in the public square, we find our conservative values
continually attacked by the increasingly radical elements of the
Left. You and I must band together and fight back to uphold our
shared American principles.

Our beacon in these uncertain times
remains the Constitution.

I know you love our country. And today,
I am reaching out to offer you complimentary access to The
Heritage Foundation's Digital Guide to the Constitution, a
comprehensive tool to help you articulate and defend your
conservative values amidst the political turbulence.

In this digital interactive guide,
you'll discover:

Detailed analysis of every clause
and amendment in the Constitution

Insights from over 100
constitutional scholars and legal experts, including former
Attorney General Ed Meese from President Reagan's tenure

A thorough review of what the
Constitution actually says and discussion of how it applies today

Copies of the Constitution and the
foundational documents that shaped it

You can get instant access to your FREE
guide now using this secure link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

We find ourselves at a crossroads. The
nation is split on pivotal issues. The radical Left is rapidly
expanding the reaches of government into aspects of our lives
that we value as private and independent.

To counteract this shift, we must
enlighten as many conservatives as possible about the liberties
protected by our Constitution.

Understanding this document fully
empowers us to defend it passionately.

To join us in expanding your knowledge
of the Constitution today, please activate your complimentary
access by clicking the following link:
https://secured.heritage.org/constitution

This resource has received national
acclaim as an "excellent guide," and I sincerely believe it ranks
among the most powerful educational materials produced by the
Heritage Foundation. I know you'll find it enlightening and a
daily asset in reinforcing your principles.

Armed with this guide, you'll be
well-prepared to assertively champion the vision of our Founding
Fathers against the radical Left.

I invite you to use this link to get
your FREE Guide to the Constitution today!

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE |
Washington, D.C. 20002

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Dirty Money Being Spent in Senate District 10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Special Election Update
| | | | Things You Should Know
---
---
|
# DIRTY MONEY BEING SPENT
# IN SENATE DISTRICT 10
---
| Greetings!, Follow the money.
Where is a candidate getting the funds to run their campaign?
Do they get their money from the Richmond lobbyists, corporate welfare political action committees, utility monopoly or developers?
I don't.
It took me a term to figure out what was going on. The party caucuses access each member a due or fee to the tune of $10k plus each year. If a legislator only makes $18k a year, who do you think pays these dues for the legislators?
The lobbyist community. The PACs.
My first year in office I remember the sticker shock of getting that bill from the Republican Senate Caucus, with no explanation.
I also noticed that senators wanted to be on "money committees" or serve as chairs because the lobbyists would give them more money based on the committees on which they served.
If you didn't happen to get on one of these "money committees," you were not getting any money from various PACs or lobbyists. It was all determined based on your committee assignments. It took me some time to figure this out, but once I did, I could not in good conscious participate in quid pro quo.
Since 2019, I made a decision not to accept PAC Political Action Committee money or money from lobbyists. There is an expectation that if you accept money from any of these groups they will knock doors for you, send out mailers on the candidate's behalf and do their best to influence the election by spending thousands on propaganda to influence the election, but they expect something in return.
I want you to know that the money that I have received to run my campaign in Senate District 10 is from voluntary clean money from "We the People."
I'm only beholden to you.
While the average donation check from a developer or corporate welfare PAC can range from $1k to $100k per check. The average donation from "We the People" is $100. Every once in awhile a generous donor writes a check for $1,ooo.
My campaign is run by committed volunteers, not paid campaign staffers. We are all unpaid. We rely on good hearted people who care about their country and just want to do their part.
While no campaign finance reports will be available until after the Republican Mass Meeting, I've listed for you the campaign finance reports of my campaigns and I encourage my opponents to do the same.
The first link takes you to my campaign finance reports as reported by the Virginia State Board of Elections.
The second link allows you to look up other candidates by date and by election.
---
| [My Campaign Finance Reports by Year](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ea-7_FAdPzoIH4ogrRWu6WooANQqEFSsnfe4GQEMHg45g7a5okMeDEOCPvlEGjcOZRJ-PXaWn2xMTHP6ADPPHUwXDemizNv1aOlW7tM-Cr4rwHGJ2Q3CA1gZssPl-vW0A3MpG17yC5QHUO4aVbiMIXW-rFL-odTVIeSpGJPQWiQDTIhPuTw0TGngqxXYsMgGmS5mxOg6l6wNeNosSPdcJexOPG-TEgMfuEi5QR9leVLsJBjV4tI4LQ==&c=zHFjTynSBeuFXnWdKag4ucBpRp2S4jeIGDWK-HKbrHWa6KdW0xnTFA==&ch=iCfqCxIBDAKUWdgLqFES0XJcPaInvJkdqdU6NnVJJ0bj3AL1DI2FHg==)
---
| [Search Campaign Reports Here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ea-7_FAdPzoIH4ogrRWu6WooANQqEFSsnfe4GQEMHg45g7a5okMeDEOCPvlEGjcOF2I6kMgMsPm8UTr3hxFZbTNryRuxu6qzJNxlCNXoFdyni3o2YBMi8463AIngZ3Vq5Pa9sd7ql5Qu6ZtMdxx-Lxst0NjbIb_5yhyT2Ji1AZs=&c=zHFjTynSBeuFXnWdKag4ucBpRp2S4jeIGDWK-HKbrHWa6KdW0xnTFA==&ch=iCfqCxIBDAKUWdgLqFES0XJcPaInvJkdqdU6NnVJJ0bj3AL1DI2FHg==)
---

Let's talk about American's for Prosperity. Once a good pro-business conservative super PAC until 2019 when they started spending millions in primaries against Trump and Trump backed candidates across the U.S.
AFP was founded in 2004 by Charles and David Koch, referred to as the Koch brothers. They became famous for their financial and political influence in the US with a libertarian conservative viewpoint until David Koch died in August 2019. After his death, the remaining Koch brother took the once conservative organization focused on reduced government spending, opposing collective bargaining and curbing regulations into a super PAC that would spend millions against Trump and any of his followers-including me.
You may remember AFP spent $31 million in Nikki Haley's race for President in a last ditch effort to avoid four more years of a Trump Presidency.
Thankfully, the people prevailed.

No.
The National Federation of Independent Businesses gave me a perfect score of 100 percent, 8 years in a row. I oppose collective bargaining. I've passed legislation to reduce red tape in government and I have voted against every tax or fee increase.
Is it because I'm pro-Trump and always have been?
Of course. Don't be fooled. Now when you see a door hanger, flyer or a paid door knocker comes to your door, you know the rest of the story.

DETAILS ABOUT THE SPECIAL ELECTION
Only 6 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote.
Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Some campaigns are shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike.
Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin.
Once voters are registered at the door, they will wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots:
Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely
Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50% plus one.
If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50% plus one, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place.
If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50% plus one, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50% plus one.
The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat.
Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat.
Here's something to think about.
The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in?
I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one.
Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway?
There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days.
Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled.
There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed.
How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do?
I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses.
I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board members across Senate District 10.
I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. You can't buy me. I work for the people of Senate District 10.
The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote.
Thank you! For God & Country,

clean_body: Special Election Update | | | | Things You Should Know | DIRTY MONEY BEING SPENT IN SENATE DISTRICT 10 | Greetings!, Follow the money. Where is a candidate getting the funds to run their campaign? Do they get their money from the Richmond lobbyists, corporate welfare political action committees, utility monopoly or developers? I don't. It took me a term to figure out what was going on. The party caucuses access each member a due or fee to the tune of $10k plus each year. If a legislator only makes $18k a year, who do you think pays these dues for the legislators? The lobbyist community. The PACs. My first year in office I remember the sticker shock of getting that bill from the Republican Senate Caucus, with no explanation. I also noticed that senators wanted to be on "money committees" or serve as chairs because the lobbyists would give them more money based on the committees on which they served. If you didn't happen to get on one of these "money committees," you were not getting any money from various PACs or lobbyists. It was all determined based on your committee assignments. It took me some time to figure this out, but once I did, I could not in good conscious participate in quid pro quo. Since 2019, I made a decision not to accept PAC Political Action Committee money or money from lobbyists. There is an expectation that if you accept money from any of these groups they will knock doors for you, send out mailers on the candidate's behalf and do their best to influence the election by spending thousands on propaganda to influence the election, but they expect something in return. I want you to know that the money that I have received to run my campaign in Senate District 10 is from voluntary clean money from "We the People." I'm only beholden to you. While the average donation check from a developer or corporate welfare PAC can range from $1k to $100k per check. The average donation from "We the People" is $100. Every once in awhile a generous donor writes a check for $1,ooo. My campaign is run by committed volunteers, not paid campaign staffers. We are all unpaid. We rely on good hearted people who care about their country and just want to do their part. While no campaign finance reports will be available until after the Republican Mass Meeting, I've listed for you the campaign finance reports of my campaigns and I encourage my opponents to do the same. The first link takes you to my campaign finance reports as reported by the Virginia State Board of Elections. The second link allows you to look up other candidates by date and by election. | == | == Let's talk about American's for Prosperity. Once a good pro-business conservative super PAC until 2019 when they started spending millions in primaries against Trump and Trump backed candidates across the U.S. AFP was founded in 2004 by Charles and David Koch, referred to as the Koch brothers. They became famous for their financial and political influence in the US with a libertarian conservative viewpoint until David Koch died in August 2019. After his death, the remaining Koch brother took the once conservative organization focused on reduced government spending, opposing collective bargaining and curbing regulations into a super PAC that would spend millions against Trump and any of his followers-including me. You may remember AFP spent $31 million in Nikki Haley's race for President in a last ditch effort to avoid four more years of a Trump Presidency. Thankfully, the people prevailed. | == | == Right here in Virginia in 2023, instead of spending all of the financial efforts against Democrats, AFP spent thousands to ensure defeat of any state candidate who wholeheartedly supported Trump. I was their number one target. They involved themselves in several Republican primaries: Amanda Chase vs Glen Sturtevant, Tara Durant vs Matt Strickland, Hermie Sadler vs Emily Brewer. See for yourself. Light purple indicates money spent in a Republican primary. AFP spent millions to take out pro-Trump candidates like me, in Republican primaries across Virginia in 2023, instead of using their resources solely to take out Democrats. Here's their own chart. | And now AFP is trying to influence voters in Senate District 10. Why? Was it based on policy? No. The National Federation of Independent Businesses gave me a perfect score of 100 percent, 8 years in a row. I oppose collective bargaining. I've passed legislation to reduce red tape in government and I have voted against every tax or fee increase. Is it because I'm pro-Trump and always have been? Of course. Don't be fooled. Now when you see a door hanger, flyer or a paid door knocker comes to your door, you know the rest of the story. | | DETAILS ABOUT THE SPECIAL ELECTION Only 6 days left until the Republican Mass Meeting. It will be held this coming Friday, December 13 at the Goochland Sports Complex located at 1800 Sandy Hook Road. Registration is at the door and begins at 4:30pm, and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm to vote. Parking is free but limited near the voting site itself. Please plan accordingly. Wear comfortable walking shoes. Some campaigns are shuttling guests from the parking area to the voting location. There are several parking lots within walking distance but it will be a hike. Registration is at the door. It begins at 4:30pm and ends at 6:30pm. You must be in line by 6:30pm, not in a parking lot or in traffic. You will need to show your driver's license or valid government issued ID. Once everyone that was in line by 6:30pm is registered, the Republican Mass Meeting will begin. Once voters are registered at the door, they will wait for the Republican Mass Meeting to begin. This is similar to the Republican Convention that was held at Buckingham High School in 2023. Once the chair of the Republican Mass Meeting and election officials are in place, each of the 7 candidates will be given 5 minutes to speak, in the following order as chosen by lots: Amanda Chase Jean Gannon Luther Ciphers Alex Cheatham Duane Adams Brian Hamlett Shayne Snavely Then the voting begins. The winner must win 50% plus one. If after the first round of voting, no one candidate wins 50% plus one, then the bottom 3 candidates are dropped and the second round of voting takes place. If after the second round of voting, no one candidate wins by 50% plus one, then the candidate with the least votes drops one at a time until a winner emerges with 50% plus one. The winner will be declared the Republican nominee for State Senate in Senate District 10 and face off against Democrat Jack Trammell, most likely on Tuesday, January 7, 2025. The Special Election has not technically been called yet, as John McGuire has not resigned or vacated his seat. Senate District 10 is a plus 20 Republican leaning district, which represents Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Western Hanover, the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico and Powhatan counties. The Republican nominee who emerges out of Friday's Republican Mass meeting will most likely win the senate seat. Here's something to think about. The Republican Mass meeting takes place Friday, December 13. The General Election when we face our Democrat opponent will most likely be Tuesday, January 7. The Senate will gavel in the very next day, Wednesday, January 8 at noon. Which candidate is most qualified and best prepared to start the day after being sworn in? I'm the only candidate of the 7 running, that will be able to hit the ground running day one. Can you expect a newly elected candidate with little to no experience to successfully serve senate district 10, the day after they've been sworn into office, and finishing off a Senate term that's already underway? There are thousand of bills that must be reviewed and dealt with all within 30 to 45 days. Senators have full days of committee meetings in the morning, session that begins at noon and more committee meetings in the afternoon, which typically don't end until dinner time. If you're not used to the fast pace of the General Assembly and understand the flow of the legislation, you will get steamrolled. There's absolutely no time for training or getting up to speed. How do you know how a candidate will vote, until they do? I'm the only candidate running with an 8 year conservative voting record you can trust, receiving top ratings from 3rd party watch dog groups like the Family Foundation, the Virginia Citizens Defense League, the NRA, the National Federal of Independent Businesses. I've received endorsements from the Virginia Citizens Defense League, John Fredericks of the John Fredericks Show, Dick Heller of the famous Heller versus DC case and Tyler Yzaguirre, members of the Board of Supervisors and School Board members across Senate District 10. I don't take PAC political action committee or lobbyists money to include Dominion Energy or Americans for Prosperity. You can't buy me. I work for the people of Senate District 10. The choice is clear. Today I humbly ask for your support and your vote. Thank you! For God & Country, | Served as a Virginia State Senator from 2016-2023 | | | | == | | == | | == | | | Miss one of my emails? | | == | | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | | |

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19322/6374453/452f67550cac53dcf325415626363654da5af2c6/b4cb6f070f34c3e4780911864495b7ff427a05c3)
---
| | |
---
_December 9th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19322/6374453/452f67550cac53dcf325415626363654da5af2c6/b4cb6f070f34c3e4780911864495b7ff427a05c3). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19322/6374453/452f67550cac53dcf325415626363654da5af2c6/b4cb6f070f34c3e4780911864495b7ff427a05c3).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19322/6374453/452f67550cac53dcf325415626363654da5af2c6/b4cb6f070f34c3e4780911864495b7ff427a05c3)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. **But we 're going to leave that up to you to decide.**

subject: Speaker Race Continues, Judy Garland's Slippers, and Two CFP Qualifiers
body:
Shortly after State Rep. David Cook of Mansfield emerged as the winner of the Texas House GOP caucus vote to nominate a speaker Saturday, fellow Republican Dustin Burrows of Lubbock announced he had secured commitments from 76 members—38 Republicans and 38 Democrats—declaring that “the speaker’s race is over.”

**Good morning!** On this day in 1914, actress [France Reid](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7uOgzAQheGnsbug8YzBoXCxDV223RINvgRLdhyBFZK3X7H9Vqc40if9P7f5ximnx_2bS7DtHeuMgPqi8ALj7Dnlz6yltwv4UclglSEymsYe5WqBY4x99Fdm7wCug_aaIpILRM6EXiZ7YgphVIoAhs71MXBcyGHU5BYWGoJPrW5dW0MLb95j_tRX2DpXi8x2be25C_oSOAmcjuPoUvHLeQqcHlzCOQWMMjj0AqclVYGT3Kx_HinntA9GaLgXTvlPbP8mviz-BgAA__8XsFKX) was born in Wichita Falls. She is best known for her portrayal of Alice Horton on the NBC daytime soap opera _Days of Our Lives_ from its debut in 1965 until 2007. Texas and SMU both narrowly lost their conference championship games on Saturday, but they're still going to the College Football Playoff after receiving at-large bids on the strength of their regular season records. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu9CAQhJ8Gd1iwcGe5oPgbd_e3Ka0FFh8KNhaQ8zlPH12UMilHMxrNfG-3-YYxxW35jyuZ9gx5BgGaS-BinD3GdM6688YKP8qOjByUGrQaL9DdjZc0YgAthdOSSIwSBkKCUWnvSYYumleZBDFKqYS49u4SCINVDoJWziLTgnxsufTtTo2eWEM684NK7_LaJXNvba9M_WMwMZiO4-idrXXPpdVXgsHkckq0EA85N4spMZg2OuovDt8TnjkEbgu6d2o8F1ryxhfKZYnIbY6VeG3YiGOJn3nDH0VYNm5PqryuHzxu_LWQY0KLKzKYumL8fsSUYr0OTItlxZi-H7Q_kT4MfAUAAP__SSd-vA) below, and let us know which team you think will go farther in today's poll! ## Texas House Speaker Race Unresolved
Shortly after State Rep. David Cook of Mansfield emerged as the winner of the Texas House GOP caucus vote to nominate a speaker Saturday, fellow Republican Dustin Burrows of Lubbock announced he had [secured commitments from 76 members](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdIvsxUAoXFxDl2uvRIu9DlZIjGwDydufkr_-69F8M_r-XacrhTU8b3_pwaa8fJxQogaFIIfJUVjfk66cmaUbVMVG9U3T62ZosVpMe-EWvbroDi2zblvsrHbkkfuZeuyqYD4whXJQqpGyq23rmfzcWPS6sTMJLdmFElNdFi78ouzXdzw41TY-qtUspWxZNH8EjgLH8zzru53dJxQ4ftgCR4UCR9kLHN2eS3jCvKcUzwyZ3hkWhoUyHLFwhpnhOwJL3DND3pjunIB84QSOjuDAxniHMzwz3OIGlna7_7QFjlUybjvDuobc9ULL24PC-n1aflV3GPwfAAD__zALcmc)—38 Republicans and 38 Democrats—declaring that “the speaker’s race is over.” However, at least six Republicans were included on published lists of committed members for each candidate, and one Democrat said she had not given Burrows permission to include her name on his list. Cook [won the GOP caucus nomination](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAURL_GdEb2NQm4cJGGLttuiS72JXjXYGQbSP7-ifSvmpGOdDSav8_hiT749fUHFzLlPcUBBDRcAhd6cOjDZ2gqZ0bhtKzIyFaptlH6BtVsOhQTkOh0p1w7ScCb7rp21C1JJVFD5c0lkyC0lEqIe21vE-E0KgtTo-yIrBHkfImpLjMVemOewicelGoblyqYuZQtM_Vg0DPoz_Osl7xejEFPK98zg36l84otBl-8vepXxOe4Z-KJtn0M3uKauZ1jzMTLTD7xvBH-p8Qtrs47LMTHvVyMh5gpcUc2YKLMD29LTB8GPSb-eMgj_-u7Khm3nT4En-8ta8RrQR--o8uvLx4GfgIAAP__SkN4FA) on the third ballot after a group of Burrows supporters abruptly left the meeting. He insists “this is still a race” and says he is in discussions with Republicans who didn’t back his candidacy to support him for the speaker’s post. Republican caucus rules stipulate that members [must support the party’s nominee for speaker](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCnMZ2tZYHYFBR_ky5_e6W12EtAh0NkuDh5-1PSXzkazSfN12W-UMrpdv1PG7v2DGVGQN1L7MHOK6X8mrVYnYfVSsFOjkqNWlmDIjodJOllYmIzam0mC4DkQaE3E9jJi-TemESwUiqA07CYwBS8WjBotXjqNPCaWtmHFrnxk2rIr_LgfVjKJrKLrd1rp_51eO7wfBzHQCW_uw7Pt7K32L9Ht77emb55_6Tax_JTuUc0AAqmcYhty2J36_1IOad6GjsN143SRxLtz9sPh78BAAD__7COWis), although there is no official mechanism to enforce that rule.
## Trains Collide In Houston
Two Union Pacific trains collided east of Houston on Friday evening, causing [seven cars to derail](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO2yAURp8Gb1hwwXY8MHRhS9eO1gWuY1QCEZA4efsq3f_903eOzp_rdsWYYr79xjuZ_t7LBgI0l8DFugWM6bPpIRgnwioHMnJRatFqnWA4jPMgHUx0QbgoDUgTOIm7u8iZZh3mIZrvmQSxSqmEmEc_7YS7Ux52rbxDpgWF2Esd-0Gd3tj29CkvqqMv9yGZo_dHY-oXA8vAnuc5-hT9XzjKs_WSvysGNtPZGNhUPCYG9stkYCUwsGJhYBfuypt7rI0HqhgTx71T5b1izLwSVk45NI659IMqj5kTP7DW2Lgvz9w_DOxQTXicMaXY5oVpcbtjTP81-4_dXgb-BQAA__-v1nBK), including two that fell into a canal connecting the San Jacinto and Trinity Rivers. Train cars carrying [plastic pellets and liquid propane gas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFv5CAQBeBfg7tZDQNem4LiGne59srVGIYYHWtHQOLsvz_5-rTvSZ-e3p-3xxvnkvf33_wU37_T8SAkC5oA3SNyLq-HHaJfMTo9iNeTMZM1bqRh82YSnZyxcU7BMSIJuWlOM06zm2dNQ_YXpgmd1gbxfgtjEk6rCZSsCSsrixJzP-qtb9Llm1sqr-NL6i0cz6H4rfePpswvRYui5TzP29_t-LxKRQvXnkMRRcsuZ1O0lCNwUbQQ9Mp5bxCOUnIUyDsItw4b15qv-HPvL5ggcG0QpXIu0DapOSVo_LosmkcYhfSIaCBaQbA4j7Cuq4Nk2VmHoyF7H6qPH2cuJbf7pCy-PzmX_-v7j3d-efoXAAD__2lkdSc) overturned when one train reportedly rear-ended the other. No hazmat issues or injuries were reported, although water supply pumps in the canal were turned off as a precaution. Officials have assured the public that the city’s water supply is [not at risk of contamination](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAQRp8Gd0QwYDsuKLZxl223tMb8xEjYIBgn8duvcvvbfp90dHT-PZYHxhSP51_cvaFPyAsI0FwCF9PiMKZr0Z0zq3CT7LyRo1KjVlMP3Wb64CclegRwo7D3sA6r0wJXG-6j09J10XxhEsQkpRJiuNk-eAyrshC0sisyLbyLlOuNNk_-gy2kK798vdm8d8lsRKUx9YfBzGDG1Ur1fRjMJTdiML-RfOXtLCVdvJx7abxtJ_EcAt_y2SgfPOSU8jseT04V48Et1sZtxbZ9N4sHJu6xEd-w1ti4zedBF4NZ9gMM_X1gMHfVuPKOKcU2jEyL544x_UjSr9VeBv4HAAD__6g1cic). Crews were expected to complete the clean-up effort on Saturday afternoon.
## Plano Native Wins Major Ice Skating Event
Figure skater Amber Glenn, a 25-year-old from Plano, won the women's international Grand Prix Final competition on Saturday in Grenoble, France, becoming the [first American to do so in 14 years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdEb-A0Lh4jZ0ue2W6GAfk6M1BtnekLz9ivRbTTMazfd93ec7UKS0_ocNbX2FfVZCGS4VF-PsgeJ7No23i_CjbNDKQevB6LFTzcMiBqNVL4QYboPvx6UbpNOghOmE7m66IXuNSSVGKbUQfeu6gBAW7VQw2i3AjEBPdc9tfWDFF5QQ3_sTc-v2rYn2UetRmP7H1MTUdJ5nmxZXjj3XcjWYmvb43g5yhakp4XnFmiF5fmR68UAJIv8ABVp_MvLyDZXSymFbMPM1YkqcIgHfIFKi1GTrj5NipNIPzIh1A4qfM_VPO0-rfgMAAP__xaBo4Q). Glenn is the oldest woman to win the prestigious event since 2004. Her victory [caps a breakout year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAQRb8Gd0QwEBMKim3cZdstLR5jZySMLWDz-PtV0m99pXt0zs91vnrKVNZvv6Hrz2WfQYDmEriwc_KUX7MekgsiWTmgk0Ypo5U9w3BzXgZvozXGpqSDxpCMjQIuozL2Mo4wkHufSRBWSiXEeIrnBf0SVIRFqxg80wIT9b2e-g07Pn1b8mu_Yz3FfRuyu_V-NKa-GEwMpj2_toNie48MJiwMpoKPxmCi9svX6kviR6UnX6j4zD8mfgtY-ZqxFP7YNyy8UVkzNj5Ul44H5UxtNEyLdfOUP-D-b4m7g78AAAD__xncYZM) in which she’s won all four of her competitions. She landed the challenging triple Axel cleanly in each event and was the only competitor to do so in the Grand Prix. She aims to defend her national title next month in Wichita and qualify for the world championships in March. If Glenn makes the 2026 U.S. Olympics team, she will be the oldest women’s singles skater in 98 years to achieve that feat.

David Cook of Mansfield emerged as the winner of the Texas House GOP caucus vote to nominate a speaker Saturday, fellow Republican Dustin Burrows of Lubbock announced he had —38 Republicans and 38 Democrats—declaring that “the speaker’s race is over.” However, at least six Republicans were included on published lists of committed members for each candidate, and one Democrat said she had not given Burrows permission to include her name on his list. Cook on the third ballot after a group of Burrows supporters abruptly left the meeting. He insists “this is still a race” and says he is in discussions with Republicans who didn’t back his candidacy to support him for the speaker’s post. Republican caucus rules stipulate that members , although there is no official mechanism to enforce that rule. Trains Collide In Houston Two Union Pacific trains collided east of Houston on Friday evening, causing , including two that fell into a canal connecting the San Jacinto and Trinity Rivers. Train cars carrying overturned when one train reportedly rear-ended the other. No hazmat issues or injuries were reported, although water supply pumps in the canal were turned off as a precaution. Officials have assured the public that the city’s water supply is . Crews were expected to complete the clean-up effort on Saturday afternoon. Plano Native Wins Major Ice Skating Event Figure skater Amber Glenn, a 25-year-old from Plano, won the women's international Grand Prix Final competition on Saturday in Grenoble, France, becoming the . Glenn is the oldest woman to win the prestigious event since 2004. Her victory in which she’s won all four of her competitions. She landed the challenging triple Axel cleanly in each event and was the only competitor to do so in the Grand Prix. She aims to defend her national title next month in Wichita and qualify for the world championships in March. ## Rebels Oust Syria's Assad
The [Syrian government collapsed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO5CAQheGnwRktKFhfAoJNnPWmG1oYF-2awWBBTY_89qPufOIjfTr6_9-Xu6dE-fHPH-g4lgUUWKlBqmnZPKVrsd3mIiKg6dDpwZjBWlC2253GgBOMZgWIQ_R67JXFVUW_hnXTgB25l6ZBTVqb3kw3g9GoacAt9howjMIq3IhLvX0UyrxjTFd5Yr2FcnTJ7cxnE-avgFnAzDvulNJrEzCfJVG4BMyUGWv2TCX7JGD-o2AcjZLtquSzfLy8fGBmGUpK_mzYpI-MVVZcMTXJ_hNlKJlrSbJEGcpX5no1GfxJ_Da76rbzm1Ki1g_Cqsfh6X2k49-iPR38BAAA__9vVXHz) Sunday morning, ending a long civil war, when rebels took control of the capital city, Damascus. Syrian President Bashar al-Assad [fled to Russia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwzAMBb_G3hRIFC3Fg4Yu2dK1o0GHdMxCjlNJSJC_L9K948MDDof7Ok9n0qy36ydtktqyT2ABjQNjx4lJ82vCntMiAuJ7SS56HxHBYr8mGufIs40jSgwYYLHkhpkA2AVmoF7Tm-bAjs754MeDl8XbMQovwYFcjh1aYW17OXzvemurLPm1P6QcLvvW57S2dq-d_-jg1MGJ7jd51vf1HqXpJUsHp_oqSoZqJTb1KcpkmAqRWfetmrVV80ONijm6IIM_DmFgR4JRrAvzEMMwW0T2ri-J70_NWWuIHdrrRpr_RNp_YR4JfgMAAP__0uVjdQ) where his Kremlin allies offered asylum. His overthrow marks the end of 50 years of Assad family rule in the country. The rebel victory came with surprising speed after years of stalemate. The 10-day offensive moved from Aleppo to Hama to Homs to Damascus, where its success culminated in mobs looting the presidential palace. [You can see video of that here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAUheGngW4MXBCkoNjGbrbd0iBcRiYoRolk3n7j9tud5CRf8v88p6dLOW2vb7eirbFMwEA-ODyYmYJL-TNJGmxEBBQULddCaCmBSbpYRKG09r1nA0rvXDRx7rXzEqEPRg402VvjwAznQgnTCYyCGY0hKg7oByIZhlTL0b1L2uqCMX_KhUfny0qzXWrdTyK-CIwExtZaN8_-_giMG7aTwHilgOUePgRl2HtXx1roYcPeUs7pVJpI9lpdyn9m_a_xsvAbAAD__wKiU0E)
## Trump to Issue Jan. 6 Pardons on "First Day"
President-elect Donald Trump said Sunday that he'll pardon Jan. 6 defendants on his [“first day” in office](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAQxfGngY4IBmLsguI27nLbLS0ShjARHxZmE-XtV9l-66PzK_5fl-3iKVO9__cF3YhtAwlGKBBy2YKn_N4MDy4iAmqOTlmtrTEgDU_OzBCivKkJEa2f5rNSZwzXJXiN_gqKk_toCuSilJ70ctIYtVwshjgpwNvMjMRAo_XTo1EdCWN-tyf2060Vnl0aYz-Y_sdgZbCOhIly_mwM1tQKVnwdDFYfClU6RveDWmWwniXMswUx-nfZxe57aFU8fBWT6NQG9s-Ldxf2F-VMx2SZkffi6Rfn468QTwc_AQAA__9XnmBX). ## Map: The Gas Price in Every State
As Americans gear up for holiday auto travels, they may find the [price at the pump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGngc7IHvtiKFzcJl223RJNzEBmZTDCExBvv0r67Y--I_3f9-GOnHidv3ChIFMeQINTBpTuhxE5XYOrxzARAdmagvHWeudAu_oZ4r8OPWDrMRJ4_3h0rgWyBsDFzqGuObw1A7o3xra2byxNVveexqk1QLGrnKaRJe_NT-ZVnjSlKx-0NzEvdQpPka1U9n8Ftwpu53k2B5cXpogbCyYu8h5WcFtw22hU286RVJ7UjEXxquig_VKvooqg0Eexc85zouHgeSURqvcwbienxKX1ldPzgpw-9_JXjiPAbwAAAP__u0RjpA) more friendly in some areas of the country than in others. According to new data from the American Automobile Association (AAA), Oklahoma offers the cheapest gas at $2.57 per gallon, and Hawaii has the most expensive average at $4.57 per gallon. Data indicates that 33 states fall beneath the national average of $3.071 per gallon, with analysts predicting that average could drop below $3 this winter for the first time since May 2021. You can see the average price of [gas in your state here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGngc7IHvtiKFzcJl223RJNzEBmZTDCExBvv0r67Y--I_3f9-GOnHidv3ChIFMeQINTBpTuhxE5XYOrxzARAdmagvHWeudAu_oZ4r8OPWDrMRJ4_3h0rgWyBsDFzqGuObw1A7o3xra2byxNVveexqk1QLGrnKaRJe_NT-ZVnjSlKx-0NzEvdQpPka1U9n8Ftwpu53k2B5cXpogbCyYu8h5WcFtw22hU286RVJ7UjEXxquig_VKvooqg0Eexc85zouHgeSURqvcwbienxKX1ldPzgpw-9_JXjiPAbwAAAP__u0RjpA).

name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Freedom.
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vol6b-mwn2c9-kyd76rh8/)
---
**Freedom.**
---
|
---
| | | | This weekend, a **historic moment** took place across the world—one that, quite frankly, I never really thought would be possible, at least not like this. The **brutal regime of Bashar al-Assad** collapsed, and the effects are being felt around the world. The collapse of the evil regime happened with **lightning speed** , with Assad taking his family and fleeing to, where else, but into the arms of **Vladimir Putin in Russia**. As a Syrian, this weekend—really, these past 10 days—have been **euphoric** , not just because Assad is gone but because of the way this all unfolded. It was not bloody, it was not violent; the rebels advanced **city by city** with virtually no resistance. So, the conspiracy theorists and the cable news "experts" who have never set foot in Syria or spoken to a Syrian are salivating at the chance to give their two cents—so let me give you mine. This did not happen overnight. Over the past several years, the **province of Idlib** (where my family originates) has been controlled by a **de facto Syrian/Turkish-backed coalition**. During that time, Idlib has been flourishing—**hospitals, schools, malls** , and **infrastructure** have been built. **Electricity and water ran unabated** , and the rest of Syria took notice. At the same time, the Syrian government was providing virtually nothing to the rest of Syria, and it became a **safe haven for drugs and violence**. The Syrian government essentially became a **drug manufacturer and distributor** to Europe and the Middle East. Syrians took notice, and the rumblings of discontent started picking up again. Ironically, as this was taking place, Bashar al-Assad was on a **PR rehabilitation tour** with the rest of the world, including the **Arab League**. Normalization was underway. After all, he was producing **billions of dollars** for himself from this drug trade. The **Syrian refugee crisis** was getting worse across the Middle East. Turkey, Lebanon, and Jordan all had taken in more Syrian refugees than their economies and infrastructure could handle, and ripple effects were showing publicly. As Americans, we can relate. We are seeing similar stories here with our guests and how some among us refer to them, treat them, and want to handle the situation. Then, of course, there are the other wars going on—**Russia-Ukraine, Israel-Iran, Hezbollah-Israel**. All of Assad's backers were preoccupied, and so an **opportunity arose**. A **once-in-a-generation opportunity** , and the Syrian people took advantage of it. Let’s talk a little about who led the movement, but more importantly, how they led it. The first thing the rebels did when they took back Aleppo was to go to the **Christian community** , promise them **security** , and name one of the Christian leaders the **temporary governor of all of Aleppo**. The news media never mentioned that, did they? Repeatedly, every city they went to, the same thing would happen: rally the local leaders and appoint one of them to lead the transition. One other very important element took place that the media never discussed. As this was unfolding, and the opposition troops were getting closer to each city, the people took to the streets to **clear the way**. Many cities were liberated even before the rebels reached them because the people saw their opening, and Assad's forces and police were no match. They didn’t even try; they fled the cities before any kind of military engagement could take place. Remember, Syria had become a **drug cartel**. Assad’s army was not training or preparing for this—they were manufacturing, distributing, and likely addicted to the product they were poisoning the rest of the region with. The **march to Damascus** was the most gratifying and suspenseful moment of my life. I could not sleep, checking social media every 5 seconds for updates. If this is how I felt, I can only imagine how Syrians living in Syria must have been processing those hours. The fight for Damascus was just like every other Syrian city: The people flocked to the streets and cleared the way for the opposition forces to take over, and the cowards fled. Now, what we are seeing is **bumper-to-bumper traffic** at the border of Lebanon, Jordan, and Turkey of Syrians returning home. No one is naive enough to believe the future will be easy, but it is possible. **Freedom is possible**. **A better future is possible**. The horror stories coming out of those dungeons are too dark to share, and still, thousands are trapped in layers and layers of concrete below ground. But **rescue efforts are underway** , working around the clock to get those political prisoners out. I share with you this: The **future is bright for Syria** , and this can be a pivotal moment—not just for Syria but for the world to see. When people unite, embrace one another, **anything is possible** , and **tyrants will fail**.
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vol6b-mwn2ca-kyd76rh8/)
---
In solidarity, -Hassan Martini
---

When people unite, embrace one another, anything is possible , and tyrants will fail. | In solidarity, -Hassan Martini | | | | | ONE donation to No Dem Left Behind supports winning the critical rural votes that decide the outcome in EVERY major battleground. name: History Facts
subject: The longest royal name in history
body:
Though he’s usually referred to as Don Alfonso de Borbón y Borbón for simplicity’s sake, that wasn’t the 19th-century Spanish nobleman’s full name. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cn22emwmfizjhtw34l6m6fur1bta0hf8ok7axcy49o9uz0yj2uko603a6gkob2ubp1kh8w6mwpr6c6qklco3bkxm2l29xwux1s4i72oy4jwsjf4ljofw5e3kbyrmeuglwgzq03ch0ii4yxw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [A 19th-century Spanish nobleman had 88 names.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T hough he’s usually referred to as Don Alfonso de Borbón y Borbón for simplicity’s sake, that wasn’t the 19th-century Spanish nobleman’s full name. It was actually Alfonso María Isabel Francisco Eugenio Gabriel Pedro Sebastián Pelayo Fernando Francisco de Paula Pío Miguel Rafael Juan José Joaquín Ana Zacarias Elisabeth Simeón Tereso Pedro Pablo Tadeo Santiago Simón Lucas Juan Mateo Andrés Bartolomé Ambrosio Geronimo Agustín Bernardo Candido Gerardo Luis-Gonzaga Filomeno Camilo Cayetano Andrés-Avelino Bruno Joaquín-Picolimini Felipe Luis-Rey-de-Francia Ricardo Esteban-Protomártir Genaro Nicolás Estanislao-de-Koska Lorenzo Vicente Crisostomo Cristano Darío Ignacio Francisco-Javier Francisco-de-Borja Higona Clemente Esteban-de-Hungría Ladislado Enrique Ildefonso Hermenegildo Carlos-Borromeo Eduardo Francisco-Régis Vicente-Ferrer Pascual Miguel-de-los-Santos Adriano Venancio Valentín Benito José-Oriol Domingo Florencio Alfacio Benére Domingo-de-Silos Ramón Isidro Manuel Antonio Todos-los-Santos de Borbón y Borbón — a total of [88 names, for a world record](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) among historic royalty.
---
Born on November 15, 1866, Alfonso wasn’t especially notable beyond his lengthy moniker and the fact that he was part of the House of Bourbon as King Charles III of Spain’s great-great-grandson. Spanish royalty at the time gave their children and heirs long names in order to honor as many saints as possible, and it seems Alfonso’s parents, Dom Sebastian Gabriel and Maria Christina, were determined to go all out. Both of them were infantes, a title given to the children of Spanish and Portuguese monarchs, but Alfonso lost his claim to the Spanish throne when he married a commoner named — simply — Julia Méndez y Morales. Spain’s current king, Felipe VI, also belongs to the House of Bourbon.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
