## The longest word in the world has 189,819 letters.
That would be [methionylthreonylthreonylglutaminylalanyl...isoleucine](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), which is abbreviated here for obvious reasons — pronouncing the entire thing would take three hours. Because it’s the chemical name for a protein, some folks consider it cheating to dub it the world’s longest word, and instead go with [a Sanskrit word](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so86un&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that’s 195 characters long (or 428 when transliterated into English): निरन्तरान्धकारित-दिगन्तर-कन्दलदमन्द-सुधारस-बिन्दु-सान्द्रतर-घनाघन-वृन्द-सन्देहकर-स्यन्दमान-मकरन्द-बिन्दु-बन्धुरतर-माकन्द-तरु-कुल-तल्प-कल्प-मृदुल-सिकता-जाल-जटिल-मूल-तल-मरुवक-मिलदलघु-लघु-लय-कलित-रमणीय-पानीय-शालिका-बालिका-करार-विन्द-गलन्तिका-गलदेला-लवङ्ग-पाटल-घनसार-कस्तूरिकातिसौरभ-मेदुर-लघुतर-मधुर-शीतलतर-सलिलधारा-निराकरिष्णु-तदीय-विमल-विलोचन-मयूख-रेखापसारित-पिपासायास-पथिक-लोकान्. More of a sentence than a word, it appeared in the poet Tirumalāmbā's 1970 book _Varadāmbikā Pariṇaya Campū_ , and can be translated, quite evocatively, as follows: “In it, the distress, caused by thirst, to travelers, was alleviated by clusters of rays of the bright eyes of the girls; the rays that were shaming the currents of light, sweet and cold water charged with the strong fragrance of cardamom, clove, saffron, camphor, and musk and flowing out of the pitchers (held in) the lotus-like hands of maidens (seated in) the beautiful water-sheds, made of the thick roots of vetiver mixed with marjoram, (and built near) the foot, covered with heaps of couch-like soft sand, of the clusters of newly sprouting mango trees, which constantly darkened the intermediate space of the quarters, and which looked all the more charming on account of the trickling drops of the floral juice, which thus caused the delusion of a row of thick rainy clouds, densely filled with abundant nectar.”

name: Bill O'Brien and Mary Jane Beauregard
subject: NHGOP Leaders Celebrate Chris Ager’s Transformative Leadership as Party Chair
body:
Bill O'Brien and MJ Beauregard celebrate Chris Ager's leadership and thank him for his service. | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us22.campaign-archive.com/?e=f3aa6419cd&u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=0c8c893a63)
---
|
### NHGOP Leaders Celebrate Chris Ager’s Transformative Leadership as Party Chair
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** December 9, 2024
---
| | **CONTACT** NHGOP - staff@nhrsc.com

---
| Concord, NH—As Chris Ager declines to run for another term as Chair of the New Hampshire Republican Party, NHGOP leaders are reflecting on the remarkable progress and historic victories achieved during his tenure. “Chris Ager has been an extraordinary leader for the NHGOP,” said RNC **Committeeman Bill O’Brien**. “Under his guidance, we grew Republican majorities in the New Hampshire House and Senate, secured a 4-1 Republican majority on the Executive Council, and celebrated Kelly Ayotte’s election as Governor. His leadership has positioned the NHGOP as a dominant force in New Hampshire politics.” “Ager’s strategic vision and tireless dedication have strengthened the NHGOP at every level, leaving the party well-prepared for future challenges.” “Chris’s leadership has set the stage for continued success,” said RNC **Committeewoman Mary Jane Beauregard**. “Thanks to his efforts, we are in a strong position to reclaim a U.S. Senate seat and a Congressional seat in 2026, ensuring we continue delivering results for the people of New Hampshire.” “The NHGOP extends its heartfelt gratitude to Chris Ager for his service and leadership, celebrating his legacy and the strong foundation he leaves for future growth.”

name: Beth Poole, Evergreen
subject: Giving Tuesday match success! 🎉
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
We didn't just meet our goal...
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3123176/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend, wow.

Thanks to the generous support of this movement, **we didn't just meet our $25,000 Giving Tuesday goal—we beat it, raising more than $29,000 from 415 donors!** We're stronger than ever going into the last few weeks of this sprint, ready to make the most of President Biden's remaining time in office and Trump-proof our climate wins.

Every contribution— _tripled by a generous donor_ —ensures we can keep up the fight against fossil fuel giants, protect the Inflation Reduction Act from GOP repeals, defend bold state-level policies, hold polluters accountable, support the frontline communities leading the push for a just, clean energy future, and bring more people into this movement.

When we say generosity helps us make climate action unstoppable, we mean it. **Beating our Giving Tuesday goal means we don't have to scale back our plans to fuel advocacy, amplify diverse voices, and build broad, cross-movement solidarity that will define what's possible for our planet in the years to come.**

Thank you again for everything you do as a part of the Evergreen community. Together, we're making lasting change possible.

In solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Beth Poole
Senior Director of Fundraising
Evergreen Action
---
---
|
* * *
**P.S.** Did you miss your chance to donate on Giving Tuesday? It's never too late to make an impact—[**give today to sustain our fight in the weeks and months ahead.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3123177/87SdQ4wZ) |

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmu75mvju9akaul0g433if5cf75vj9nn7ktjpmeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zji3ntvk8fnev5ps3nm1sra13g6egioh9j7sp6g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z20laf94uh73vtvkstnj8760p71ps12hg69ehuq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6cph2bs)
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfcvoefkk4puamfgv4rl8t75jm6ib8mf2l52cd78_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6cph2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqph3aordul9qeqlot5a2c8guursurnh4057v6eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6cph2bs)

Updates for Great Americans
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp3a6vumhsaeqjmfoqb6bmq6k44qtogn4jt2qg9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgholbbp9jnn7fvpmctiuetgtddvhjbcis0c6ju0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi0m03i9len85crdkpcqiv35tmhblb41gtqekfm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh5gnts8e6u19he1elndoq8qgqg2dad27n4lovq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h2bs)
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdv3n40jgi2en6nebf76i5tsbhjasfccuq7bk7fo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj7c9gm0o3246h22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmf0b8qohntl79v1bdcf85at3df2m13tgahafa9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znpr6gddi7d65f645cf432v551uli9phf9upj960_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm6pj6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rachel
subject: 💥A Prophetic Message: DON'T WASTE YOUR LIFE❗❗
body:
In today's episode of The Rachel Hamm Show, I'll be sharing a prophetic message that involves Justin Bieber and the inspiration you've been craving! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/a-prophetic-message-dont-waste-your-life?e=5fa0631807)
---
| |
---
| I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to share something extraordinary that I believe holds a powerful message for all of us. Recently, I experienced a prophetic dream involving none other than Justin Bieber, and it left me with some insights that I feel compelled to share with you. In today's episode of The Rachel Hamm Show I'll be sharing: A Prophetic Message: Justin Bieber and the Call to Live Meaningfully," I'll delve into the details of this dream and explore its significance. This isn't just about a celebrity encounter in the dream world; it's about a wake-up call for all of us to examine how we are living our lives. Are we truly making the most of our time, or are we wasting our lives?

This episode will air today, December 9th @ 8:00AM Pacific. You may also watch the recording at your convenience. I invite you to join me in reflecting on the urgency of living with purpose and what that will lead to. This message is not just for fans of Justin Bieber but for anyone who would prefer not to die and realize, you've wasted your life! Thank you for taking the time to consider this message. I am eager to hear your thoughts and reflections after watching. Together, let's embrace the call to live meaningfully!

For God & Country,
---
|

name: American Briefing
subject: ‘They Came In Illegally’:Trump Clashes With ‘Meet The Press’ Host Over Deportation Promises
body:

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zus613invdur2gh6mn66uqgiute0248uk78cpsno_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthmeoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnv3oq62nm5id5160mj3ddc3abipbjv9usigrr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthmeoj6c9h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh18nv00kq1l36lt6fileq3ccd8ngjsv6bupth88_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthmeoj6c9h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfp39g2gd9j42g400cu1gttlg89jkm6mro9gm3oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthmeoj6c9h2bs)
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh66r7ja8hvo8vm5g8qt2vvoqbi788r4kps9tvo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthmeoj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cth62p35c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcebnujnguihn3sk4qmnf3eoao63kja6jipbvaa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthmeoj6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpdhgflrtvl4dim4ci0i7vh7hi124md6g1bahgc0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cpjm6pr2cph649fg)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Just 1 SEAT?!
body:
Our new majority is on the brink.

Our new majority is on the brink.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3qnfk0s2n0jk381e4d7p324o9srtpuglchujek0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm1p32c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, friend. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our House majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zre6ru37snlu33h4oug0553ahr05hsc4qilddue8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm1p32c3h2bs)

After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House AND both chambers of Congress. But we also must face a glaring reality: Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT. Yes, you read that right. 1 seat. I know how hard you fought for this new majority, friend. I’m right there with you... Over the course of the election, I transferred $2.5 million from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority. | | | | **The following information is for MTG’s Top Advisors only...**_**If you are receiving this message,_that means you_.**___FOR YOUR EYES ONLY__
---

Friend,

Joe Biden’s pardon of Hunter came as a shock to nobody... _**We knew they were dirty, but now, they aren’t even trying to hide it.**_
I'm staying at my office late to write this letter for you, because **The Fake News Media** & **Big Tech Conglomerates** are going to censor it...
**The Democrats, and the special interests they serve want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**
They are going to be mad as hell that I sent this out...
But I don't care, because I don’t work for them:
_**I work for the American people. I WORK FOR YOU. **_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9A9l/?__vbtrk=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
From 2014 until now, the Biden Crime Family received **over $27,000,000** from foreign individuals and groups as part of a **conspiracy** to get rich from Joe Biden’s positions in government... _**Thousands of these dollars can be traced directly back to _China_**_. The Biden Crime Family went as far as to set up shell companies to _hide these payments from our investigators._
Joe Biden used his position as Vice President to change American policies, making _**millions of dollars**_ for both his son, and his son’s _**foreign business partners**_. Witnesses say Joe Biden was directly involved in business dealings with **_Russian_ , _Ukrainian_** , and **_Chinese groups_.**
****
**You know it. I know it. Even the Democrats and the DOJ know it. **

But the DOJ and FBI _**gave special treatment**_ to Hunter because he is Joe Biden’s son.

We are even learning that the White House _**directly interfered with our investigators**_ by withholding key documents and witnesses!

Friend, the level of corruption we are witnessing is _**unprecedented, in the entire history of our country:**_
_****_
_****__**Joe Biden is the most corrupt President in American history...
And he isn’t even the one that has been controlling the White House.**_

Joe can issue as many pardons as he wants: _**this fight is far from over.**_

_**The American people are _done_ tolerating corruption at the highest levels: We demand better!**_
_****_
[JOIN MTG - EXPOSE CORRUPTION](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9A9l/?__vbtrk=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Deepstate, Corrupt RINO “Republicans,” and Democrat special interest megadonors _**hate**_ that I am exposing this... they want these crimes to stay out of sight, and out of mind.
_**They want the pardons to be filed, and they want the Bidens to ride off into the sunset with their millions of dollars they pillaged from our country...**_
_**[We can’t let that happen.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9A9l/?__vbtrk=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
__**Now that we’ve got real, actionable evidence against Joe Biden, things are about to get much, much worse.**__
We need to raise awareness... We need to mobilize our legal experts... We need to shed light on the Biden family’s corruption _**once and for all...**_
Nobody who loves our country can sit on the sidelines in the face of this sort of corruption: __**[we need to fight back harder than ever.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9A9l/?__vbtrk=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__

_**[Can I count on you to join me in this fight, and help me EXPOSE THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9A9l/?__vbtrk=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0MjYxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Just 1 SEAT?!
body:
Our new majority is on the brink.

Our new majority is on the brink.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9ufl4mtckb1jvmsmd1ir8fp0fm3bpft68ac3c60_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm9p72c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, friend. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our House majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6d4ej8jpsvc2s8vaq9pv8k45omnv9bt53v49ms8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6cthm9p72c3h2bs)

Hey Friend, Do you feel like the policy solutions offered by the government often create more problems than they solve?

From education to healthcare and beyond, it's clear that good intentions don't always lead to good outcomes.
| | That's why I'm excited to share a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's thought-provoking eBook, "Why Government Is the Problem."

In this insightful read, Friedman dives deep into:
* Unveiling how government interventions can worsen the social and economic problems they're trying to fix.
* Revealing the influence of special interests in policymaking, often at the expense of everyday citizens.
* Explaining why limiting government involvement might be the key to solving our most pressing challenges.

It's a must-read for anyone curious about the impact of government actions on our society. Originally written in 1993, Friedman's analysis remains as relevant today as ever.

Are you ready to explore a new perspective? [Click here to get your free copy](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4a1ca23632294577a2296a2f68ba2af3&_e=7EzaUCxqhNLbifwjloHJU1Nb5vd0DUls1-r5mJ98i5rFWbSffzq25ghFVjiwyynYiKVDDcgD_fTINGrfa_c4-sqfG1BTNhUtgtH36OoqMJYdkvMsWplpvdE1Ea1eojild7Oz58QyJUmRMxQWNFmU2ecRmUi8pgLI7KtGsxqxN_fiHG5B4SsFt6AgEoGjiXXQM6KfMqT-bqR2jHPH96qDw9lkrIeiPBgp-GtFWHYWFcKTW5Gwi0nQiMxo_LQSE9901QtrMU9sIwm9XZ6jvSgkbsMf0zkHyemaebNzf8Br3fPceniDStWpKjg6VnX73vwfyi1tFabjmWhkOpO3eecg6qw3jOSbXXnF-Lh51teQTaIKCTBoNRdOKh6sciEc9NlUW10vK1NzTQ9NgfXabXZF5qWXy_JlzkLTjsEvxlH5_pI6belxoWn8Eu47nuHW2bYt) of "Why Government Is the Problem" now.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgbfm34c0k7dojv9lp2pahm2kfldos4kg88ario_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm8pr6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrqb1g9e8ej6lhcgfs38q0857fddql3lsjcqk75g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm8pr6cdh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjsr2anulrsp0d4uge8tadivjth13lr06882d2f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm8pr6cdh2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq5ekoubuf1lhll095r390lq0u1l8lin4mo5uvr8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj7c9gm1p7246h22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm8pr6cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfedps94ml95him16ubicrp24adkjlb6mqoamepo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm8pr6cdh2bs)_

body:
For those asking, “Where do we go from here? What now?” | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98405391/516552600/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241208safeguard_N_HBM_NO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZjU1ZTEzLTNhYjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o8SqCiQGOJaVzCGG3TAxrv4j5Ym7pM5CTkETuP125vU=)
---
Hi Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw this message.

Many Americans – especially American women – have spent the past month wondering: How can we protect all of the progress from the past century in the face of so many real threats to that progress?

**Here’s how:**

It has never been more clear that electing _**WOMEN**_ to public office is the best possible defense against attacks on women – and the best strategy for securing women’s autonomy in America.

[**Since our founding four years ago, Her Bold Move has supported hundreds of women running for office across 42 states and counting. We are the fastest-growing support network for women running for office. We depend on grassroots donations to make our work possible. Hi Peter,

As pundits continue to reflect on the results of the 2024 election, many Americans are feeling despair and distrust in strategies they believed would work to protect from another Trump presidency. Americans are, understandably, searching for what to do next and where to turn our energy.

[**On this Giving Tuesday, we are reaching out to be an outlet for that energy. The truth is, the work we’re doing at Her Bold Move is going to be unbelievably critical over the next four years.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98405400/516552609/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241208safeguard_N_HBM_NO_6_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZjU1ZTEzLTNhYjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o8SqCiQGOJaVzCGG3TAxrv4j5Ym7pM5CTkETuP125vU=)

Women’s issues will continue to be attacked by a cabinet composed of some of the most powerful sexual predators of our time (we wish this were hyperbole...). With that very real threat at the forefront, electing WOMEN to public office is the best possible defense against attacks on women – and the best strategy for securing women’s autonomy in America.

**We have a vision for this country and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. It starts with electing more women to ALL levels of government.** [**This Giving Tuesday, join us in the fight to make that a reality by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98405401/516552610/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241207safeguard_N_HBM_90DO_6_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZjU1ZTEzLTNhYjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o8SqCiQGOJaVzCGG3TAxrv4j5Ym7pM5CTkETuP125vU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98405402/516552611/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241208safeguard_N_HBM_NO_6_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZjU1ZTEzLTNhYjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o8SqCiQGOJaVzCGG3TAxrv4j5Ym7pM5CTkETuP125vU=)

Here is why our work is so important:

✅ By electing qualified, pro-choice women to state and local offices, we are building necessary guardrails to defend against the potential damage of the incoming administration. Research shows women leaders spend time working on women’s issues. The more women in the rooms where decisions are being made – the more likely we are to see women’s rights protected.

✅ We are not afraid to work in deep red abortion ban states. These are the states where women are truly being left behind and most desperately need women representing them in their government. We’re chipping away at the male, GOP supermajorities in those states.

✅ We are building a bench of qualified, pro-choice women. The more women serving in our government, the more opportunities there will be for a woman to run for president and, FINALLY, win.

✅ Seeing is believing. It is critical that our daughters see themselves reflected in their leaders. We must ensure that there is female representation at every level of the American government.

Thanks to your support, we have grown exponentially since our founding. We are seeing results and success stories year after year. This past election, 44% of our winners were women of color, and 47% of our _winners_ came from _abortion-ban states_ (!!!!!). Almost ALL of our winners shattered glass ceilings with their victories. That ^ is the impact that we are having, and we are asking for your support to keep up the fight.

[**We know exactly where we go from here: We must continue the work to elect pro-women WOMEN so we can have a voice in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. This Giving Tuesday, help us continue the fight for our future by rushing $20.25 or more immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241208safeguard_N_HBM_NO_6_NG_N_L5&amount=20.25)

We wouldn’t be able to do all of this without your support. Thank you so much for joining us in this fight. Happy Giving Tuesday!

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98405408/516552617/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241208safeguard_N_HBM_NO_6_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4ZjU1ZTEzLTNhYjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o8SqCiQGOJaVzCGG3TAxrv4j5Ym7pM5CTkETuP125vU=)

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T760d418c-c1c7-4b99-aeb5-27b79c1b6f54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter, Can you [chip in $20.25 to help Virginia and New Jersey stay blue in next year’s statewide elections?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd9aafdf-8465-4b15-9e6d-aa930a7c4e47/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’ll explain why your support is so crucial, but we know your time is valuable so we wanted to get right to the point.
---
| | [CHIP IN $20.25 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d8b427d-12f0-4112-999b-ac5b9e46fc06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If $20.25 could help us stand up to Donald Trump and stop Project 2025, wouldn’t that be worth it? If $20.25 could help Virginia and New Jersey expand their support for Democrats, wouldn’t that be a bargain? And if $20.25 could ensure these two states will protect abortion rights, keep grocery prices down, and put working families first, wouldn’t that $20.25 be well spent? Because at the end of the day, $20.25 doesn’t seem like much – but it makes a huge difference for a non-presidential election year. [So please, Peter: will you invest in these two states and give $20.25 to defend Virginia and New Jersey from the incoming Trump administration**?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb13e204c-fd48-4df8-833b-f88e54d863e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d91e94e-ac02-4c71-831c-7a7597688aa7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: MassGOP
subject: Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_3VOwnWBYNx2xtPA0jcaFDEFsumTin2JdyuikMRWrjDZaXu10WnXhHV0mgalccNIHBfNvFIbL_Lp9hPBq7uSfEIyxSf5VaBflmt_S_nsLfoQHdALgF8X4sbnrxitc48-QpEFgYBqbXKWgScIwrr_yg==&c=wqAfGBh89_2CW5HKO7iaqDoGsFrKdMU5lfCYehH6A3dhLh_bitQ4jA==&ch=kBCf_HLmMeLrdLtQuiijU9EmEj9OSBeWh0sS0mm-EZZV5iOa9N9ahQ==)
---
| Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. Starting in February, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond.
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our first four sessions:
Fall River 🗓️ February 1, 2025 ⏰ 12:00 PM 📍 VFW 486 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA
Holyoke 🗓️ February 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Holyoke Public Library, 250 Chestnut Street, Holyoke, MA
Lawrence 🗓️ March 1, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Parkside Apartments Community Room 260 Haverhill St, Lawrence, MA 01840
Worcester 🗓️ March 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 765 W Boylston Street, Floor 2, Worcester, MA
Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts!
[Register Now](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_3VOwnWBYNx2xtPA0jcaFDEFsumTin2JdyuikMRWrjDZaXu10WnXhOPUjwm01OCZMA6nS4BknUbjIv7fdrfxjrvk9WpBakyykSd9V-xLiSv6oCUk8aibYmWpqdoDpdNKV6FjaYuysTXMSU85yXPq0wD_EKjumeyIGeQ585xcjBcfaU1vf8G50uZBbw9Vs1u91-Ac7zpwLSus8dtyIIdWn7FizwXseyXN1-16aL0GwWDUvWsSgqHlBFYwmmXn1fitii7D26ofg5eenQVhEMmx2jAR_41n2gvz&c=wqAfGBh89_2CW5HKO7iaqDoGsFrKdMU5lfCYehH6A3dhLh_bitQ4jA==&ch=kBCf_HLmMeLrdLtQuiijU9EmEj9OSBeWh0sS0mm-EZZV5iOa9N9ahQ==)
Let's build a stronger Massachusetts, starting with you.

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future | Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. Starting in February, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond. Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed. Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in. Here are the details for our first four sessions: Fall River 🗓️ February 1, 2025 ⏰ 12:00 PM 📍 VFW 486 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA Holyoke 🗓️ February 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Holyoke Public Library, 250 Chestnut Street, Holyoke, MA Lawrence 🗓️ March 1, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Parkside Apartments Community Room 260 Haverhill St, Lawrence, MA 01840 Worcester 🗓️ March 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 765 W Boylston Street, Floor 2, Worcester, MA Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts! == Let's build a stronger Massachusetts, starting with you. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

subject: Sneak Peak of the Republicans’ To-Do list inside >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We know the list is endless, but what should come FIRST?

|
---
| | | **PRESIDENT TRUMP'S TO-DO LIST IS LONG... **

Friend, But House GOP wants to know what YOU think he should tackle FIRST. **[Take the Trump Agenda Survey and let us know what matters most to you.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjp37d7aj4q9bivhm6aa3g7caaj8a89if3gqid08_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "Take the Trump Agenda Survey and let us know what matters most to you.")**

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0do1v0v86qtkfd2jo50dq82qn3k99ms5ntg3alo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "Trump Agenda Survey")
---

The truth is, Friend, we need some salt-of-the-earth Patriots to offer their two cents and get the America First agenda on the right track. **[There are a million and one things to do, so we need to hear from you now to know what to put at the top of the Republican Agenda!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z48s5595elurklhg3vdv053jl444h4i47fira2jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "There are a million and one things to do, so we need to hear from you now to know what to put at the top of the Republican Agenda!")**

---
| | [TRUMP AGENDA SURVEY](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgkmovqmo8rckts6dcv0i16akfm8dqqq9efdkdn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "TRUMP AGENDA SURVEY")
---
_Survey closes in_
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcmpl8mvmiikf57hvg47fiju3hde4lqapjfidon8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "60 Min Timer")
---

With a new Republican Majority in Congress, the possibilities for reform are endless. _**But we need to know where YOU think we should start!**_

**Please, Friend,[take just a couple of minutes to share your insights with House GOP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkgunsto1e852biqgngh70gldat82n1fo5ip065g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "take just a couple of minutes to share your insights with House GOP") and help Republicans have a positive impact on America's future.**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9kd52opr876om4cder8kjpv3ph3c84u8166806g_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmcpb0cjh2bs "Trump Agenda Survey")
---

This survey will only be open for 24 hours, so don't wait!

Hunter Biden's baby-momma Lunden Roberts went on the Patrick Bet-David podcast earlier this year _**[to spill ALL of the details](https://substack.com/redirect/769a0ae8-2a48-4669-8b2d-15a46eaa3bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ about the president's son's sick personal life.
"That sounds weird, right?... But it was part of the Hunter package."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/769a0ae8-2a48-4669-8b2d-15a46eaa3bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Roberts details her experience living with Hunter and particularly the bizarre relationship he had with _**[his brother Beau's widow.](https://substack.com/redirect/769a0ae8-2a48-4669-8b2d-15a46eaa3bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
Hunter once tried to explain the nature of this relationship in _**[an interview with CBS](https://substack.com/redirect/c4b37fe9-7e56-4c07-a1b1-2700407af6ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ while promoting his new memoir at the time.
"I think people were confused by it and I understand that. I mean I really do," he said in the interview. "To me, it's not something that is difficult to explain because it came out of a real overwhelming grief that we both shared and we were together and trying to do the right thing. And that grief turned into a hope for a love that maybe could replace what we lost and it didn't work."
President Biden recently pardoned his son of all federal crimes he has been convicted of or may have committed since 2014. The decision to do so has those on the left and the right questioning what seems to be a clear abuse of power.
Hunter was found guilty of tax evasion to the amount of more than 1 million dollars, as well as a charge concerning an _**[illegal firearm purchase](https://substack.com/redirect/7e36ce68-48a0-4398-92cd-5c3815ff9282?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ while addicted to drugs.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/769a0ae8-2a48-4669-8b2d-15a46eaa3bde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Peter,
While the outcome over November’s election wasn’t what we wanted, it was the honor of a lifetime to fight alongside you and millions of other Americans for our shared values of democracy and freedom.
During our campaign, Vice President Harris and I fought for a new way forward for our nation – a future where families aren't just getting by but getting ahead, and everybody has the freedom to exist safely as their authentic selves.
**Though our campaign is over, this vision for a better future is still as clear as ever.** That's why we must come together, learn from this moment, and prepare to not only defend our shared values during the second Trump administration but move forward.

clean_body: While the outcome over November’s election wasn’t what we wanted, it was the honor of a lifetime to fight alongside you and millions of other Americans for our shared values of democracy and freedom. | Peter, While the outcome over November’s election wasn’t what we wanted, it was the honor of a lifetime to fight alongside you and millions of other Americans for our shared values of democracy and freedom. During our campaign, Vice President Harris and I fought for a new way forward for our nation – a future where families aren't just getting by but getting ahead, and everybody has the freedom to exist safely as their authentic selves. Though our campaign is over, this vision for a better future is still as clear as ever. That's why we must come together, learn from this moment, and prepare to not only defend our shared values during the second Trump administration but move forward. I’m grateful, Tim Walz

subject: I’m making a big announcement

body:
I’m running for Governor of New Jersey.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98408264/516561454/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjA2MmM0NS0zZWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLey_qTkR8MK0ZWSMefpK9Gr-RRRnfL4PbfinlbwhMg=&emci=3e684142-d4b0-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=1f062c45-3eb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=21278485)

_Mikie is one of my closest friends in Congress. She’s now running for governor of New Jersey and I am thrilled to support her. I hope you’ll take a minute to read this message from her and support her candidacy. —Chrissy_
|

Derek, we’ve been through a lot these last couple years. There have been urgent crises in this country, across the world, and here in New Jersey.
As a graduate of the U.S. Naval Academy and a former helicopter aircraft commander, I learned early on that in a crisis, there are only three options: **you can either lead, follow, or get out of the way.**
**[I know which one I pick — and that’s why I’m thrilled to share that I am officially running for Governor of New Jersey. Derek, will you split a contribution between me and Chrissy Houlahan to become a Founding Donor of my campaign for New Jersey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98408266/516561456/1386058216?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1081-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjA2MmM0NS0zZWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oLey_qTkR8MK0ZWSMefpK9Gr-RRRnfL4PbfinlbwhMg=)**

In New Jersey, we don’t whine. **We work.**
We’re inventors, innovators, and builders. We work with our minds — and our hands.
So let’s be the state that builds more housing. The state that fixes the economy. And let’s make life more affordable for hard-working New Jerseyans — from health care, to groceries, to child care.
In Congress, I’ve fought every day to address these challenges. They aren’t new, and I’m ready to keep confronting them head-on.
**But we won’t stop there.**
This is the state, more than any other, that guaranteed our freedom as we fought for our nation’s independence. Today, we can also be the state that sets the gold standard for protecting rights and freedoms we know will be under attack from Donald Trump’s Washington – beginning with abortion rights.
Because in New Jersey, we love our country. We’re proud of our state. We value our freedoms. **And we’ll defend them with everything we’ve got.**
In the Navy, I was on a mission to protect our country. Now, I’m announcing my candidacy for governor on a mission to get things done for New Jersey.
**[Derek, I’m asking you to join us. * * *
**** In both his campaign and his past administration, President-elect Donald Trump frequently used violent rhetoric and threats aimed at the media. His re-election poses a significant threat to the safety of American journalism and press freedom worldwide. Trump has called the press “the enemy of the people” and he has openly suggested that his critics should face imprisonment, while his former advisor Steve Bannon has called for “heads on pikes” for dissenters. Trump’s pick to lead the FBI, Kash Patel, advocates for lawsuits and imprisonment for critics, creating a chilling atmosphere for free expression. **These threats are not just bluster; they represent a dangerous trend that undermines our democratic values. name: MassGOP
subject: Mayor Wu Exposed: Fear-Mongering and Misleading Tactics Undermine Boston Homeowners and Businesses
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x68GrHvV2BWyj6JWCJIluZZC7_euyFd392lbNJuhB7xVXhoiGVC8XX_Akd2DzkujDncc36mptTDM5NBgUvpbgVYLJYSnml-W7Ebc1Ni0LzgiHME-dM2IIipn4_hqZtz51sj7epSRRU6czBKPqqwGeA==&c=wpvwUDL0tzAOenVvsHVNY7KO6_3UlR3F2U1JYhaFr3rHUu7bLqCBYA==&ch=OXmy4o-9zYJ-OIc96YrXmUvzTb76aOo2g0rusaq2SLprAZJIkMrHkw==)
---
| Mayor Wu Exposed: Fear-Mongering and Misleading Tactics Undermine Boston Homeowners and Businesses
---
---
| Boston, MA- Boston Mayor Michelle Wu has lost all credibility, demonstrating a clear pattern of bad-faith negotiations with the legislature, the business community, and the public. When first introducing the commercial tax hike to the City Council and the legislature, Mayor Wu claimed it was necessary to prevent a staggering 33% residential property tax increase for Boston homeowners. She has wielded this inflated figure as a bargaining chip, effectively holding Boston homeowners hostage throughout the negotiation process.
However, recent revelations show that if this legislation does not pass, residential taxes would rise by just 10.5%--a figure far closer to the 9% average increase over the past five years than the dramatic 33% Wu initially claimed. This represents an increase of $284 for the average single family homeowner throughout the course of a year.
"Mayor Wu has deliberately and flagrantly misled the public, instilling fear in Boston residents that they would be priced out of their homes unless commercial real estate taxes were raised. This fear-mongering has proven false," said MassGOP Executive Director John Milligan. "Commercial real estate in Boston has already suffered greatly post-pandemic, with vacancy rates exceeding 40% in many highly leveraged properties. Further tax hikes on these businesses would undermine Boston's economy and, by extension, Massachusetts' economic stability."
Milligan added, "Mayor Wu's conduct during these negotiations has been nothing short of unethical. It's evident that she's not prioritizing the interests of Boston's residents or businesses. Instead, she's pursuing an extreme progressive agenda aimed at expanding government control rather than fostering private sector growth."
"If Mayor Wu were truly committed to improving City Hall's budget, she might start by reducing spending on bike lanes, which has cost the city an arm and a leg, widely disliked by Bostonians, and has made the city less accessible than ever. Alternatively, she could focus on tackling the waste, fraud, and abuse within City Hall, including investigating the city council's spending habits--such as misappropriating thousands of dollars for kickback schemes made in City Hall bathrooms," Milligan concluded.
###
---
---

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:
We know the list is endless, but what should come FIRST?

|
---
| | | **PRESIDENT TRUMP'S TO-DO LIST IS LONG... **

Friend, But House GOP wants to know what YOU think he should tackle FIRST. **[Take the Trump Agenda Survey and let us know what matters most to you.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3jhkep29qu1i2pgun3ngtkbohuhs2j9veoqr7bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjmapj0cdh2bs "Take the Trump Agenda Survey and let us know what matters most to you.")**

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Join Us TOMORROW for Nina Ahmad's Holiday Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24]
Hi Friend,
I hope this email finds you renewed from the Thanksgiving celebration. As we approach the holidays, I am again reminded of the importance of coming together in the spirit of gratitude, celebration, support, and connectivity. During these difficult and chaotic times, community is more important than ever and and I am resolved to lean into those around me.
In that spirit, we hope that you will join us for a Birthday and Holiday Party on Tuesday, December 10th, 2024 from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm at XI West - 3939 Chestnut Street, Philadelphia, PA 19104.
We will be collecting new toys to donate to Philadelphia children for the holidays. All donations are appreciated!
To RSVP, please click below or email AmandaDeMaria@DeMariaConsultingLLC.com.
We hope to see you there!
Nina
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ninaholiday24]

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWeTB-xWgN
Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes
enriches our understanding of the faith.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeTB-xWgN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

Learning
about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes
enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are
especially important today, as Christians face increasing
opposition from the culture.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to
proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the
foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history,
can make understanding the most important historical points
difficult.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online
course, "Ancient Christianity," now available on DVD.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you
help support this course so we can make it available to millions
of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your
support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for
any donations of $100 or more.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of
"Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63999232:WeTB-xWgN:m:3:2627245898:C610F695955502A8002CCA84F71E32F9:r

Thank you
for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story
of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best
regards,

Jeremiah
Regan, Ph.D.
Executive
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Hi there, could we have a moment to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi there,
Today, we’re reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
If you already know that you’d like to add your contribution today, thank you! You can use this link:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/December24**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241209-1-b&t=1&akid=9590%2E3935704%2E6bWyRp)
If you need a little more convincing, allow us to explain:
At the end of this month we’re not facing our typical monthly fundraising deadline—it will be our end-of-year fundraising deadline.
This is also our last quarterly FEC fundraising deadline of the year. After December 31st, we will have to **publicly report** our final fundraising numbers of 2024.
We know we asked a lot of you this year, especially during the peak of election season. But our work here at GIFFORDS PAC doesn’t stop after Election Day. And with the challenges we’ll face next year under the new administration and our new Congress, we have to make sure we finish the year out with the resources we’ll need for the work ahead.
[**So please, now that you have an explanation, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us prepare for this month’s FEC fundraising deadline?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241209-1-b&t=2&akid=9590%2E3935704%2E6bWyRp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&amount=3&refcode=em241209-1-b&t=21&akid=9590%2E3935704%2E6bWyRp)**

[**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98413555/516576250/-487728681?source=20241209_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUxNTZkYS00M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYDJlLEsSRmeRT5zZsedGusbdi8vA8OefXPqjSGARGE=&emci=573eb658-1ab4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=34e156da-43b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) Folks like YOU hosted 10,000 events to help people share their personal stories across the country – and we STOPPED him. [**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98413556/516576252/-487728681?source=20241209_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUxNTZkYS00M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYDJlLEsSRmeRT5zZsedGusbdi8vA8OefXPqjSGARGE=&emci=573eb658-1ab4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=34e156da-43b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219) Democrats need to step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again. | Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. [_**That’s why I’ve selected you to be one of the first Democrats to complete my survey and share your thoughts. Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care:
* 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately.
* 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage.
* Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26.
* Prescription drug prices would skyrocket.

I’ll be honest.
**[Passing the Affordable Care Act into law was the happiest day of official life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98413563/516576258/-487728681?source=20241209_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUxNTZkYS00M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYDJlLEsSRmeRT5zZsedGusbdi8vA8OefXPqjSGARGE=&emci=573eb658-1ab4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=34e156da-43b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)**
Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier.
Now, with the open enrollment period starting, millions of Americans are choosing their health care provider – we need to ensure that the health care they chose today is with them throughout 2025.
[_**With so much at stake, I’m asking you one final time. Together, Democrats STOPPED Trump’s disastrous plans to crush our health care during his first term. We can do it again – but only if grassroots supporters like you step up and share your insight. I need 25,000 responses to build a large enough sample size to ensure accurate results. Will you take 3 minutes to share your feedback and help us Save Our Health Care from Donald Trump and Republicans? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98413566/516576261/-487728681?source=20241209_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_grassroots_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGUxNTZkYS00M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iYDJlLEsSRmeRT5zZsedGusbdi8vA8OefXPqjSGARGE=&emci=573eb658-1ab4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=34e156da-43b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16320219)
I’m looking forward to reading your responses.
Thank you,
Nancy

name: Dyneco Gibson
subject: ICYMI: You're Invited to an Exclusive Virtual Townhall on December 19th
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | Good Afternoon, Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our freedoms and rights remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “**Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall.”** **When:** Thursday, December 19, 2024** ****Time:** 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOM **Invited Speakers:**
* Keith Thirion, Interim Co-President and Vice President of Strategy, Alliance for Justice
* Kadida Kenner, Founder and Chief Executive Officer, New Pennsylvania Project and New PA Project Education Fund
* Mohan Seshadri, Executive Director, Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance

It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts to ensure they remain fair and independent. In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025’s judicial elections. Conversely, federal judges are nominated and confirmed for lifetime appointments. Their rulings have an expansive impact on our daily lives.
Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement.

Our work is just beginning. Peter, this year, this incredible team of fearless fighters has stood by me without fail in our fight for progress – and because of that, we've won some incredible victories for New Yorkers and folks around the country.
**But our work is far from over. In fact, in many ways, it's just beginning.**

With Republicans preparing to attack our most fundamental freedoms in the year ahead, the risk has never been greater – and I can't ensure affordable health care is secured, reproductive rights are safeguarded, and consumers are protected without your support.
**We set a goal to****activate**** 1,000 Team James Memberships by my critical midnight deadline. So please, will you pitch in so that I can close the 125-donation gap on that goal and keep up this fight? **

Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/james-for-ny-24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98414481/516579071/-1997846893?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1769-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzEwMWNmMy00NWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kmy4-cr664as0a-7kMjXhihqks3U05dgE3KY4G3bqJA=)**
Thank you,
Letitia James

name: MAHA Action
subject: Confirm RFK Jr. — Sign Now
body:
The Senate needs to hear from you.

| | | [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_2_12_5_24&n=1)
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/petition-hhs?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_2_12_5_24&n=2)
---
# This is Our Chance to Transform a Broken System
---
| [](https://www.mahaaction.com/petition-hhs?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_2_12_5_24&n=3 "SIGN THE PETITION") [SIGN THE PETITION](https://www.mahaaction.com/petition-hhs?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_2_12_5_24&n=3)
---
Dear Na The moment is here—Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has been nominated to lead the Department of Health and Human Services. This is our chance to transform a broken system. In the early 1980s, only 13% of U.S. children suffered from chronic conditions. Today, nearly 60% of children are affected, and a staggering 77% of young adults are unfit for military service due to health issues. This is a crisis we cannot ignore. Chronic disease and mental health now account for 90% of America’s $4.3 trillion annual healthcare costs. For decades, RFK Jr. has fought for transparency, accountability, and the health of Americans. As HHS Secretary, he will bring bold solutions to reverse America’s chronic disease epidemic and prioritize the well-being of our children and families. **But the Senate needs to hear from you.** [**Sign the Petition Now >>**](https://www.mahaaction.com/petition-hhs?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_2_12_5_24&n=4) The stakes have never been higher—**add your voice to demand RFK Jr.’s confirmation today.**
---

clean_body: The Senate needs to hear from you. | | | This is Our Chance to Transform a Broken System | "SIGN THE PETITION" Dear Na The moment is here—Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has been nominated to lead the Department of Health and Human Services. This is our chance to transform a broken system. In the early 1980s, only 13% of U.S. children suffered from chronic conditions. Today, nearly 60% of children are affected, and a staggering 77% of young adults are unfit for military service due to health issues. This is a crisis we cannot ignore. Chronic disease and mental health now account for 90% of America’s $4.3 trillion annual healthcare costs. For decades, RFK Jr. has fought for transparency, accountability, and the health of Americans. As HHS Secretary, he will bring bold solutions to reverse America’s chronic disease epidemic and prioritize the well-being of our children and families. But the Senate needs to hear from you. The stakes have never been higher—add your voice to demand RFK Jr.’s confirmation today. | "SIGN THE PETITION" MAHA Action | | ---|--- @2024 MAHA Action. ** 8000 Towers Crescent Drive, 13th Floor Vienna, VA 22182, USA This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com ·

name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Tracking poll: Ballot languages
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_1&amount=25]
NPR: A federal law requires translated voting ballots but not in Arabic or Haitian Creole [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_BallotLanguages.png]
Section 203 of the 1965 Voting Rights Act has required certain states and local governments to provide voting ballots, registration forms and other election materials in more than just English. But not all languages are covered by Section 203's protections.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should ballots be available in more languages to make sure all citizens can vote?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120924_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=120924_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_1&amount=25]
