name: Andrew Yang
subject: Sports Betting Hurts American Men. Time To Rethink Its Regulation
body:
I do something regularly that I wish I didn't. I bet on sports online. These apps are now enormous businesses. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=e4c55a8901&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ca5398e2b3&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Hello, I hope your December is off to a great start! Last week, I wrote a Newsweek [op-ed](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=a87967479e&e=0f227c2ae3) about the growing dangers of online sports betting and its impact on American men. I hope you’ll take a moment to read and reflect on this important issue.

_**Sports Betting Hurts American Men. Time To Rethink Its Regulation**_

I do something regularly that I wish I didn't. I bet on sports online.

Perhaps you've seen the advertisements for FanDuel, DraftKings, Fanatics, and the like. You definitely have if you've turned on any sports program recently, as the advertisements come in hot and heavy every few minutes, including on SportsCenter, which now has segments on what bets to make. Heck, ESPN has even gotten in on the action — literally — with ESPN Bet.

These apps are now enormous businesses. Estimates are that online sports betting companies are taking in around $15 billion in 2024, and that 37.6 million people bet online in the United States. About three in four betters are men. Broadcasts and sporting events are regularly sponsored by one of the online sportsbooks.

I'm one of their customers. I watch a lot of sports and started betting on various games and events a couple years ago. I was enticed in part by a promotion that would give me $250 if I made a couple of bets. Who would turn down free money? Not me.

This is all a relatively recent development, as in 2018 the Supreme Court ruled that it was up to each state to decide whether sports betting would be legal within its borders. New Jersey was first to declare betting legal and many others quickly followed; today we are up to 38 states that have legalized betting in some context.

So what are the problems?

The data are clear and compelling — and not good. As author Charles Fain Lehman put it, "The rise of sports gambling has caused a wave of financial and familial misery, one that falls disproportionately on the most economically precarious households."

First, households save less. One study showed that for every $1 spent on betting, households put $2 less into investment accounts. You see more families overdrafting a bank account or hitting the limit on a credit card. This makes sense to me; the money I bet remains either in the app or in a bank account to be recycled for the next bet.

Second, personal bankruptcies go up. Economists have found that legalizing sports betting increased the risk of a household going bankrupt by 25 to 30 percent, with the risk highest among young men living in low-income counties. Bad debt rates also went up.

Third, domestic violence increases. This is hard to say out loud but anyone who has bet on sports can see the connection. When you lose money on a bet, it puts you a terrible mood. It stresses you out. If you go home to a partner, it could be your partner that suffers. Researchers estimate that legalized sports betting leads to a 9 percent increase in domestic violence.

These are measurable phenomena, but addiction has been connected to feelings of anxiety and depression as well. I get it. I used to watch a sporting event and root for a team, or a player or outcome. The emotions are different when money is involved. It has transformed a sense of disappointment into calamity — and in my case the money I'm betting isn't going to keep me from putting food on the table. Imagine if it did?

Athletes now also report that fans bark at them for "ruining their parlay." It used to be that maybe the fan liked the athlete or identified with them. Now, the fan's bet is the dominant thing on his mind.

Betting on sports online is a perfect storm for men in that it combines things we enjoy at a visceral level: sports, money, speed, risk, and thinking that we know something that others don't. It's social, and it makes spending time on sports seem like a job that will pay you money. But what makes it such a powerful intoxicant also gives it the ability to ruin your financial life, your relationships, and your mental health.

I would love to see the regulation on this issue rethought. The main imperative right now is for the states that have not made sports betting legal — Alabama, Alaska, California, Georgia, Hawaii, Idaho, Minnesota, Missouri, Texas, and Utah — to keep it from reaching people's phones. I'm sure the companies are in your statehouses right now making their case. "It's easy tax revenue and everyone else is doing it! It's fun!" But the facts are clear. Online sports betting is the equivalent of a new tax on Americans that preys upon vulnerable, low-income men in particular. It increases financial stresses and emotional problems. It's not what your citizens need.

\----

Struggling with gambling or know someone who is? You're not alone — [resources](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=8bbc201c7f&e=0f227c2ae3) are available to help you and your loved ones. This week on the [podcast](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=141ab21710&e=0f227c2ae3), Donté Stallworth shares his incredible journey from underdog to NFL superstar, offering a unique perspective on the impact of sports gambling on professional athletes. Plus, I’m honored to have made the list of the top 10 most-viewed TED Talks of 2024 — check out my TED Talk [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=5c21d31b72&e=0f227c2ae3)!
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ca5f8c9797&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=4e9aee3825&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=d2cbb87585) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=d2cbb87585).
---

subject: You’re Invited: Israel Ambassador Prayer Call
body:
RSVP Now: Pray for Mike Huckabee.
| | | | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=90c95f7084fd4296a323b66932beafd9&_e=wSGB-4Ip2ZpKq1L2PE4JRcdhPVOsLENX2XBRf3cruPbv6nJlshvjzZN2txJpG5BHqhiRKV-Lx2VgSeUfvG2zbCCpGdz6HFZga98wZlBrMo75NB5X3hSNBc33gJ3Nge0rkYOzMybpUfpzUR_94MD-scCfWZbL_BwkUbKnFjjRjAl-INSGjNuVE6LGXEikmz2skezX9MiJl5rkCj9p6spcCwlo3GbJn80xBUIGAQCTZBDRCFh69zs_40JQtzO3GzcCriX3SZZfcQw6lqqbnDuDHylJoIFk3rygpgh7NowBjmjJ8mhWgiLTrOYfAC9VkrTCUxcbHjOuUbGBSQOoSRd7tuCp_QsDBvZw3_tFyje2-yUnXeC-KSiYOIM5qz9Dw6f6NdXcw0m24rqv4FH6APeNTw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
NFAB PRAYER CALL: Pray with Mike Huckabee, Israeli Ambassador Appointee
We are excited to invite you to our Israeli Ambassador Prayer call as await his confirmation as United States Ambassador to Israel. This call will activate thousands of faithful Americans to pray for the continued support of our important ally. Please join us Thursday, December 12th at 7pm EST.

[RSVP NOW](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=90c95f7084fd4296a323b66932beafd9&_e=wSGB-4Ip2ZpKq1L2PE4JRcdhPVOsLENX2XBRf3cruPbv6nJlshvjzZN2txJpG5BHqhiRKV-Lx2VgSeUfvG2zbCCpGdz6HFZga98wZlBrMo75NB5X3hSNBc33gJ3Nge0rkYOzMybpUfpzUR_94MD-scCfWZbL_BwkUbKnFjjRjAl-INSGjNuVE6LGXEikmz2skezX9MiJl5rkCj9p6spcCwlo3GbJn80xBUIGAQCTZBDYsAHDulvTKxFyTFg-D9pzAIrBu-keXEU8yjaVOk2OntPyW0TJQjdEl4PVvGHej4yO3BaSC2-RdUlvsNo1r8W9SseWdTLiXfs_rQ1BrgsZxm4XXrlFr9kScEPf5UtfEoitMH9fmTbTgiSXX8Q0E1ZAOT8SlCiIafPeZRXWiXtVAw%3D%3D)

You will hear directly from Mike Huckabee himself, who is prepared to defend Israel against all enemies, and broker lasting support with the United States.

name: Frank Wojtash - Political Director: Rob for PA
subject: Interviews, Dinners, and a Huge Night for a Team Rob Member
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob for PA]()
body:
Always Here for NEPA | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/20b81c9b6e17/interviews-dinners-and-a-huge-night-for-a-team-rob-member?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Hello,
We had a busy week throughout NEPA and traveled to New York for the Pennsylvania Society Dinner. Rob had an interview with Fox News where he explained our movement and how we took down a six-term incumbent. [**Click here to watch the Reel Fox posted.**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=d8043d57e4&e=131e83a3c2) He also had an interview with Larry Kudlow. [**The link to watch that interview is here**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=a4010b69a2&e=131e83a3c2). Rob also met with Larry Malski and Charlene Doyle of the PA Northeast Regional Railroad to learn more about reestablishing Amtrak passenger rail in our region. We will always do what’s best for Northeastern Pennsylvania, and will hear everyone out.
---
|
---
|
---
| We wanted to give one of our best volunteers, Robin Medeiros a HUGE shout-out for being sworn in as the President of the Greater Scranton Board of Realtors. Robin is one of the hardest workers in NEPA and will do a phenomenal job as President!
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=47797568a8&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Frazetta’s Costumes, in East Stroudsburg. Be sure to support local businesses like Frazetta’s, and head down to pick up your Santa suit for the holiday season!
---
|
---
| The road to 2026 starts TODAY! Congressman-Elect Bresnahan will face the same California donors getting ready to spread lies about Rob, and we need your help to fight it!
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!
---
[Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=361a250437&e=131e83a3c2)
| Best Regards,Frank WojtashPolitical Director - Rob for PA
---

name: Letter to Trump
subject: It would mean a lot if your name was on this thank you letter to President Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztep4o0t1c7cng1smn7ui7nf3s82435ejivsbogo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm1p76c9h2bs "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**
**THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP**
---
| | | [SIGN THE THANK YOU NOTE](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb4jhtelii6icj8ajsg53bovf6jk0boidpceltuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm1p76c9h2bs "Generic Button")
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8tmb6a9jh9cdtkn6p51015pj31p5f63gc5qhi40_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm1p76c9h2bs)
---

You've been with the MAGA movement for so long, and as one of the most dedicated patriots in the movement, it would mfl a lot if your name was on this thank you letter.

**[So, without further ado, will you please sign House Republicans thank you note to President Trump?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjfpt51k9ln7tb5j1uqu7ebvg8v7cdulo5g08ld8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm1p76c9h2bs "So, without further ado, will you please sign House Republicans thank you note to President Trump?")**

#
Peter –
We'll make this quick.
This period around the holidays is hard for campaign fundraising. It’s understandable. Some people are planning to get together with loved ones, some people are shopping, and others are just offline. We get it.
But if we are going to fight back against Trump's incoming administration, we can't afford a holiday slump.
We've set up a big **$75,000 end-of-year goal** and we're hoping to reach as many people as we can today. It doesn't matter how much you give, but that you can pitch in anything today.
[**So please, can you contribute any amount to help our holiday slump and fight back against Trump by reaching our important end-of-year goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98417400/516587721/-1444662483?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.09_Update_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTg0NGQ0Yy00OWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpevkMRyS6zsKiifKlVSsZYevo4evLI4saJ9WGRBhgQ=)

body:
Christmas is right around the corner and we’re in the FINAL STRETCH before President Trump takes the oath of office

| |

Friend -

_It 's the most wonderful time of the year! _

Christmas is right around the corner and we're in the FINAL STRETCH before President Trump takes the Oath of Office.

_But don't forget what led up to this historic election. The Radical Left forced the Trump Family to endure:_
* A kangaroo court that convicted President Trump over nothing
* Armed federal agents raiding their home
* An endless slog of Fake News hit pieces

But they NEVER gave up.

**That 's why we want to do something extra special for the Trump Family this Christmas. _[We're looking for 500,000 Patriots to add their names to our official Christmas card for our President, Donald J. Trump, and his family!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq36f5tbkb18ihpr7u9b979rh9andg4o8upr1i7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm1p76c9h2bs "We’re looking for 500,000 Patriots to add their names to our official Christmas card for our President, Donald J. Trump, and his family!")_**
| | [SIGN THE CARD](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6qsqtqkhh0d9c7ukmh5j9ba0qipgpu6uh23n83o_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm1p76c9h2bs "SIGN THE CARD")

The Trumps have poured their blood, sweat, and tears into saving America from the Radical Left. The least we can do is wish them a Merry Christmas!

We specifically chose YOU out of the tens of millions of Patriots in our country because you've proven yourself to be a dedicated member of the Conservative movement. So what do you say?

Thank you.

- Team Scalise

body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l-INYwZmFwAAWFSvYiUyIdjsy6EyyaNLFpk_1HCAOC_0kf5y0kZCKJPeAJqQvIMuJiwKVZHWi8M-sgPf-DrfsSdVB9vJs8JpbOJbQ6TUQNoIThkC9wAf-zbruPUzWC7kmqPl_i3erbLD43fz8_Ni9mo%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8lyZMAyWUFB7pAMTk4eoLj2UzFsS8HzspJVqEtEcZPUvJD6TNS7YnCcdkApZQU-oUmokNIHRHByvNV2iusii2QghgTE5CUMZ8tNrJvMTmis6UANpcCDH-GdkUvDUTycbKfpNB4KB739_szoosRRMkxrs%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l83iP6NR9iN5tGfbsCuDfbFp_48CYHjoM7RQ_IYpY0Cy3nfotUsrCZQT56C4-ob1RX7rMTsDCse3a4WUCwaCCn9zxGM59r_98gNrclLNxqhFFurDNcUXRKqO8-1JSm0esMWwjVyR1Af3NjvYuDn6EUw%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **[hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l2MnLOZqRNfqoxNw20XAir1l4IgLnKpEnhZHY9QuysXaU-bQkrFZhYjbErPku5fOe-A4TVR8jcPEU-M8qPNELEl8_eUswuUHtfGB64wjJhf19eI15WFfLFQqzTEMkVN5syCZyYkhlzjPsx_8PyqH6_s%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l5raIE5Yn46eO2XlbAIvVPP6eNYZhnoR0F5xFmxAiaUwUz5-v8APk_Za4wQ3KBR2OsfAgxJYozHyfZyb5pf_Qo8WaajehwpowlDkr9-OV9wD6As7vz7BUgGn96nuEthngbfgNnYdqEvAHvmqM69AiR4%3D)
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l398xEZ227zDbRFRbr-ViHgLkFIV769MZKwwcQ2SuObjLZ72pNZGG6hQOc3URaaYnXe47LElAu41Z0QHPDbQ2lFUnL-csaXtWxaMzBLyN9Rg0RNq5nb2tww5YpzJX7TpTz2xlAioYvBf1iGB0yXK1kk%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l8yHLpDwlO5lW2uRLc1PFAEOYM92V2dNiEnfT5UhmoTIsTMjB-IOklw8DsAhNMns5VcvZu6MMTayRfKnqSaWnotB9mVErEDHBUmT3VqE7---lXS2mic7vAo_ArgW-HAG2ycOnri815YGJlwrSTBbPh8%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l42poGcGKNkhthUS0y5Ju3KuWxFDEsMoGP80kxrAMjjV6oYFgDAdvFnVlMUH5IIubIvxkpicS8UtyATFJAmh4i_0rHs2zYQ0wq0n8TQrFtk-iyrytL2fq2UDrOwoFIzWuQ7H80wDYBvEtAtvrGbKrXU%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d5998cc2003464fa76ed94b9a260b84&_e=t59VaX3obpFlK1tPH8JFwNYpe8wsOZgEsA7hDv3dpEFOKlktoP-cXnVSxYJJf9DChJiUs1Va9wa_rvhQnwhN8JNEqIlIFnnGDI68k-9m2T1g_MKQb9V4Zv4-FBqDO3UHcaVf8mDKS2Ye5c7mQRYMI_bIwF7Gh1Lo4o3vCeflrPPnVXPTkPcrygrfuznH5SIZQxiTWajQ-zwTZJjPwFJXRE6w591HqzKFShgMzJZgnlxdWC2RPwNFgBrjf3HOL9k2b7dO-DSfTTHBI0eJUarWyYpMLDx0L81oGOHEHLtw1PF8GjBRju6vIGIy3rIFTgv3gIng1rp-UQ69JiO_WCZ8l-lmfqU4vvOkirjA9MP_cD_3gbt-3kkQLXibEQ2A1vtONLIJeab4fZRt2h9FyVsGt00e-k3ATL8X2Bi3hJbJmHbDbErdR13JF6zHD0_k0yUaDbg4Uy2tjYx41Ni_Q8_6YJkRh47q_sqxJkU1fItngSc%3D) founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It's no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It's one of the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. "It's not just about volume," explains founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize." In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design! | Peter,

As I prepare to get sworn in as MD-06’s next representative this January, I’m already working to deliver for Marylanders.

With Republicans controlling all majorities next year, it will be an uphill battle to protect and restore reproductive rights nationwide, work toward healthcare for all, and build an economy that works for all of us.

I won this race not by giving in to extremist rhetoric but by abiding by my commitment to finding common sense, and common ground solutions, much like I plan to do in Congress.

Election Day may be behind us, but our work to retake the House in 2026 is just beginning.

Grateful,

April

# [What an assassin reveals about our politics](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=152843820&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyODQzODIwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzM3NjE5NDMsImV4cCI6MTczNjM1Mzk0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XpemTKgJ-MKMX1dkvFZO7yObeykz6ROZWHRDYhJMIZg)
### And how the response to his act--both by public officials and everyday people--gives us an opportunity to look at one thing Democrats can do to flip the narrative
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---
| Dec 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---

---

---

A couple days ago I wrote about the burning question that so many Democrats ask: [why do so many people keep voting against their own self-interest?](https://substack.com/redirect/02fadde5-6dec-497f-8851-021f724e9856?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

We talked about how one big reason that people vote the way they do is because they believe our system is broken and they are mad about the lack of accountability for elites. An example I used was how the big banks ruined our economy and housing market, were then bailed out when Democrats had full control in Washington, and how not a single one of those bankers were ever held accountable--even though many broke the law. Many who suffered during that time blame Democrats for supporting that system.
Thank you to everyone for the hundreds of comments and strong engagement. I read through all of them and your thoughts and comments encourage me to go deeper into these topics. If you find these Substacks interesting, please share them with people who you think might feel the same way!
Many of you brought up the media in your replies, and so I promise to write about my experience with the media during the campaign in a future post. A lot of people also asked for a solution to the problem and how Democrats can flip the narrative. I have a lot of thoughts on that based on my experiences on the trail, and plan on going deep on it in the future.
However, right now an assassin is on the loose! And the response to his act--both by public officials and everyday people--gives us an immediate opportunity to look at one thing in particular that Democrats can do, so we are going to seize the opportunity.
If you're not up to date, last week a young man laid in wait outside an investor meeting of America's biggest healthcare monopolist, UnitedHealth Group (UHG), in Manhattan and shot the company's CEO, Brian Thompson, in the back, killing him, with an old school manually operated silenced pistol modeled after a WWII special service firearm.
As of writing this, he is still on the loose. Shell casings found at the scene were inscribed with words the insurance industry uses to profit off of suffering, like "deny, defend, depose," although there is some question as to which exact words were on the casings. And the suspect's discarded backpack was also stuffed with monopoly money. No one knows if the killing was motivated by healthcare industry practices or if it's just a cover. But if it's a cover, it's a good one.
Because right now, if I had to guess, the killer would be acquitted by a jury of his peers in most towns in America. I can guarantee he would be acquitted here in Independence.

Which reinforces the depth of the anti-establishment mood in our country and illustrates why people are willing to vote for politicians who say they are going to burn the system down without thinking any more about what that means.
Let's take a closer look at the different ways people reacted to this.
The official civilized response has been outrage at a cold-blooded murder of a father in broad daylight. I didn't pay close attention to the story at first, so my exposure is about the same as a normal person (which is a good thing in this case). The limited responses I noticed at the time were from Minnesota politicians, where UHG is headquartered, and the Governor of New York and Mayor of New York City where the incident occurred, and they were all very supportive of the CEO and the company. I went back and collected a couple from Minnesota just now, here they are:
Tim Walz [called ](https://substack.com/redirect/ec7354b8-66f7-4720-ac30-1d0b72b851ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)the shooting "Horrifying news and a terrible loss for the business and health care community in Minnesota."
Amy Klobuchar [called it](https://substack.com/redirect/887d24f1-103d-439a-ae96-47377d60cb09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "horrifying" and "shocking" and expressed thoughts for the CEO's family and also for the "UHG family."
When you contrast those to the responses of everyday people in this country, the only thing shocking about this murder is that it hasn't happened before.
One of the more popularly quoted posts, by a _Professor at Columbia University_ , [reads](https://substack.com/redirect/bd17d6eb-b9d7-4d8c-bc38-2aaa5a227594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "Today, we mourn the death of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson, gunned down.... wait, I'm sorry - today we mourn the deaths of the 68,000 Americans who needlessly die each year so that insurance company execs like Brian Thompson can become multimillionaires."
Internet boards, comment sections, Reddit, are full of the feelings of real people in this country, and they overwhelmingly, almost unanimously, express a sentiment that this man had it coming, and so does his whole industry.
Here is just one example of hundreds from the campaign trail for why we are where we are: a battle between a single working mom and her monolithic insurance company. This is what she told me.
Her son has type one diabetes and needs insulin to survive. She said they get their insulin every three months through the insurance company, put it in the refrigerator, and use it throughout the three months until they re-supply.
One day, right after they had gotten a 90 day supply, they went to visit family out of town. When they got back a couple days later, she realized that the power was out and her heart just dropped. She immediately ran to the refrigerator and yanked it open to check on her son's insulin. She said everything in the fridge was spoiled, but she didn't even think about the food, just the insulin, because she had only taken enough with them for the days they were gone and she was terrified for her son.
She called her insurance company and asked them what to do. They told her she had already gotten her 90 day supply so she would need to go to the pharmacy and buy it out of pocket.
She tried, and discovered it would cost something like $6,000 to replace it. Desperate, she called her insurance company back and begged them for a solution. They told her that if she went back and bought it out of pocket she could fill out some paperwork and request reimbursement and that she might get reimbursed at some point.

When she told the company that she didn't have that type of money to front, and that she couldn't even get a credit card that would give her access to that type of money, they told her it wasn't their problem, that they had met their obligation.
Crying, she told me that the worst moment of her life was when she gave her son that warm insulin and prayed that it would still work.
Her son is fine, she was able to work with his doctor to figure something out, perhaps even through the insurance. But how many people in this country have a story like that?
How many people have gone bankrupt because of medical conditions, like my parents did when my sister needed open heart surgery when we were kids?
How many hours every year do you spend fighting insurance companies who deny, defend, and delay every single payment they should be making? I spent so many hours last spring calling back and forth between providers and an insurance company who just kept pointing the finger at one another that I nearly boiled over with real rage, despite being a generally calm guy.
As CEO of UHG, Thompson oversaw an empire whose sole purpose is to extract as much wealth as possible from everyday people's health and lives, people like you and me, like that woman and her son, and transfer it to the shareholder class. Converting death and suffering into shareholder profit.
Has he or anyone at UHG ever been held accountable for that? Thompson's latest innovation was [to use AI algorithms](https://substack.com/redirect/3c88ac33-aa93-4e5a-b2d8-b6bf54442474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to automatically deny patient claims that their physicians had already approved in order to increase profits.
Converting patient health into profit isn't even an unspoken secret now as UnitedHealth, alongside other insurance companies, have bought into [a program they call "the dial"](https://substack.com/redirect/daf7e878-8d5e-45ea-86f5-bc5c3e98eb1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that cranks up AI-initiated claim denials when they need more profit.
Quarterly report coming up? Crank the dial!
If there is a system that Democrats could be attacking and tearing down, this is one great example. And they would probably have it all to themselves.
But, instead, they are talking about the "UHG family" and what a terrible loss this supposed health innovator's death is for the business and healthcare community. I get it, it's tricky considering that the man was gunned down. But most people care a hell of a lot more about their own family, the family that these people's system has been screwing for years, than the supposed "UHG family." Which is just a twisted executive construct to try to make big corporations seem like something other than what they are, and no one buys that crap anymore.
The response in New York has been just as eye-opening on who the system does and doesn't work for. The mayor pulled out all the stops for security in New York City after this guy was murdered, at who knows what cost. In a targeted killing. That was very specifically aimed at one person and most likely put no one else at risk.
The governor called for the state police to come in and aid.
This is the stuff that anyone or their family who has ever been the victim of a violent crime, or really any crime, hopes for and believes is going to be there for them. This is what you see on TV.
In reality? Unless you're a big-time CEO, there "aren't enough resources" to solve your crime. The murder clearance rate in New York right now? [About 50%](https://substack.com/redirect/c678b90b-fbf9-460b-97c3-166919bb5968?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And I can guarantee you that most of those ones that are cleared don't require a lot of evidence or investigation because the assailant was caught on scene. Because the system sure as hell isn't investing in protecting everyday people.
I can guarantee you the cops are just as pissed about the dump of resources into this vs. other crimes as anyone else.
There is no justice for everyday victims in this country just like there is no justice for elite law-breakers in this country.
In order to augment the lack of justice and investigation that everyday people experience in this country, something unique has developed: TikTok sleuths have been popping up left and right. They use social media to help solve crimes that law enforcement doesn't have the resources for.
Their reaction? [None of them were willing to use their resources](https://substack.com/redirect/5b7bcf7e-e1d9-45ed-8c46-e4b56b692444?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or networks to help identify the killer.
That's where our country is at.
People in the replies to my last post asked how voters could bring themselves to vote for a criminal like Donald Trump. Well, people of all stripes right now, [nurses](https://substack.com/redirect/f35e4069-277d-40e4-8e95-04f5d7ad54a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), professors, patients, and others are, if not celebrating, at least understanding and internally supporting a cold-blooded murderer (pretty big crime) because they know how broken this system is and it's the first sign of justice or power they have seen in years.
I mean, just ask yourself how you feel about it and give yourself an honest answer. I bet the feelings are at least mixed, and for many of you they slant much further toward the young murderer than the slain executive.
Yet the most public responses we have seen from a bunch of Democrats makes it look like they are just UnitedHealth company men and women who actually believe in this system. I know, the CEO was Walz's and Klobuchar's constituent. And they were probably all pals, too, because that's how it works with Democrats and big healthcare here in Missouri. So it makes sense.
But if Democrats want to capture the mood in this country, win elections, and then actually fix things and make lives better again, it might be a good idea to drop the company man mentality and start talking about how some of these things need to be torn down and replaced.
One of the big problems I ran into with my campaign, and that we saw over and over again in response to our anti-corruption and broken-system narrative, is that right now no one in Missouri, and probably most of the country, believes that Democrats have the will to break things in order to rebuild them.

Although I'm not sure people would name it, the original ACA fight was a good example of that lack of will in this very healthcare/insurer sector. When Democrats had full control--the Presidency, the House, and 60 in the Senate--they chose to preserve the health insurance industry. Even if people don't remember that specifically, the cultural memory exists, and is reinforced over and over again not just by Fox News, but also by Democrat politicians taking the company line with insurers like UHG.
I'll dig more into that in a future post, because we found over and over again in our focus groups that my anti-corporate power messaging made them think I must be a Republican, not a Democrat, and they were surprised to hear I was a Democrat. This is a critical thing that needs to change.
Thank you all again for being a part of this. Please continue to engage and share with anyone you think would be interested, and I'm looking forward to continuing the dialogue!
-- Lucas

Amy Klobuchar "horrifying" and "shocking" and expressed thoughts for the CEO's family and also for the "UHG family." When you contrast those to the responses of everyday people in this country, the only thing shocking about this murder is that it hasn't happened before. One of the more popularly quoted posts, by a Professor at Columbia University , "Today, we mourn the death of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson, gunned down.... wait, I'm sorry - today we mourn the deaths of the 68,000 Americans who needlessly die each year so that insurance company execs like Brian Thompson can become multimillionaires." Internet boards, comment sections, Reddit, are full of the feelings of real people in this country, and they overwhelmingly, almost unanimously, express a sentiment that this man had it coming, and so does his whole industry. Here is just one example of hundreds from the campaign trail for why we are where we are: a battle between a single working mom and her monolithic insurance company. This is what she told me. Her son has type one diabetes and needs insulin to survive. She said they get their insulin every three months through the insurance company, put it in the refrigerator, and use it throughout the three months until they re-supply. One day, right after they had gotten a 90 day supply, they went to visit family out of town. When they got back a couple days later, she realized that the power was out and her heart just dropped. She immediately ran to the refrigerator and yanked it open to check on her son's insulin. She said everything in the fridge was spoiled, but she didn't even think about the food, just the insulin, because she had only taken enough with them for the days they were gone and she was terrified for her son. She called her insurance company and asked them what to do. They told her she had already gotten her 90 day supply so she would need to go to the pharmacy and buy it out of pocket. She tried, and discovered it would cost something like $6,000 to replace it. Desperate, she called her insurance company back and begged them for a solution. They told her that if she went back and bought it out of pocket she could fill out some paperwork and request reimbursement and that she might get reimbursed at some point. When she told the company that she didn't have that type of money to front, and that she couldn't even get a credit card that would give her access to that type of money, they told her it wasn't their problem, that they had met their obligation. Crying, she told me that the worst moment of her life was when she gave her son that warm insulin and prayed that it would still work. Her son is fine, she was able to work with his doctor to figure something out, perhaps even through the insurance. But how many people in this country have a story like that? How many people have gone bankrupt because of medical conditions, like my parents did when my sister needed open heart surgery when we were kids? How many hours every year do you spend fighting insurance companies who deny, defend, and delay every single payment they should be making? I spent so many hours last spring calling back and forth between providers and an insurance company who just kept pointing the finger at one another that I nearly boiled over with real rage, despite being a generally calm guy. As CEO of UHG, Thompson oversaw an empire whose sole purpose is to extract as much wealth as possible from everyday people's health and lives, people like you and me, like that woman and her son, and transfer it to the shareholder class. Converting death and suffering into shareholder profit. Has he or anyone at UHG ever been held accountable for that? Thompson's latest innovation was to automatically deny patient claims that their physicians had already approved in order to increase profits. Converting patient health into profit isn't even an unspoken secret now as UnitedHealth, alongside other insurance companies, have bought into , that cranks up AI-initiated claim denials when they need more profit. Quarterly report coming up? Crank the dial! If there is a system that Democrats could be attacking and tearing down, this is one great example. And they would probably have it all to themselves. But, instead, they are talking about the "UHG family" and what a terrible loss this supposed health innovator's death is for the business and healthcare community. I get it, it's tricky considering that the man was gunned down. But most people care a hell of a lot more about their own family, the family that these people's system has been screwing for years, than the supposed "UHG family." Which is just a twisted executive construct to try to make big corporations seem like something other than what they are, and no one buys that crap anymore. The response in New York has been just as eye-opening on who the system does and doesn't work for. The mayor pulled out all the stops for security in New York City after this guy was murdered, at who knows what cost. In a targeted killing. That was very specifically aimed at one person and most likely put no one else at risk. The governor called for the state police to come in and aid. This is the stuff that anyone or their family who has ever been the victim of a violent crime, or really any crime, hopes for and believes is going to be there for them. This is what you see on TV. In reality? Unless you're a big-time CEO, there "aren't enough resources" to solve your crime. The murder clearance rate in New York right now? . And I can guarantee you that most of those ones that are cleared don't require a lot of evidence or investigation because the assailant was caught on scene. Because the system sure as hell isn't investing in protecting everyday people. I can guarantee you the cops are just as pissed about the dump of resources into this vs. other crimes as anyone else. There is no justice for everyday victims in this country just like there is no justice for elite law-breakers in this country. In order to augment the lack of justice and investigation that everyday people experience in this country, something unique has developed: TikTok sleuths have been popping up left and right. They use social media to help solve crimes that law enforcement doesn't have the resources for. Their reaction? or networks to help identify the killer. That's where our country is at. People in the replies to my last post asked how voters could bring themselves to vote for a criminal like Donald Trump. Well, people of all stripes right now, , professors, patients, and others are, if not celebrating, at least understanding and internally supporting a cold-blooded murderer (pretty big crime) because they know how broken this system is and it's the first sign of justice or power they have seen in years. I mean, just ask yourself how you feel about it and give yourself an honest answer. I bet the feelings are at least mixed, and for many of you they slant much further toward the young murderer than the slain executive. Yet the most public responses we have seen from a bunch of Democrats makes it look like they are just UnitedHealth company men and women who actually believe in this system. I know, the CEO was Walz's and Klobuchar's constituent. And they were probably all pals, too, because that's how it works with Democrats and big healthcare here in Missouri. So it makes sense. But if Democrats want to capture the mood in this country, win elections, and then actually fix things and make lives better again, it might be a good idea to drop the company man mentality and start talking about how some of these things need to be torn down and replaced. One of the big problems I ran into with my campaign, and that we saw over and over again in response to our anti-corruption and broken-system narrative, is that right now no one in Missouri, and probably most of the country, believes that Democrats have the will to break things in order to rebuild them. Although I'm not sure people would name it, the original ACA fight was a good example of that lack of will in this very healthcare/insurer sector. When Democrats had full control--the Presidency, the House, and 60 in the Senate--they chose to preserve the health insurance industry. Even if people don't remember that specifically, the cultural memory exists, and is reinforced over and over again not just by Fox News, but also by Democrat politicians taking the company line with insurers like UHG. I'll dig more into that in a future post, because we found over and over again in our focus groups that my anti-corporate power messaging made them think I must be a Republican, not a Democrat, and they were surprised to hear I was a Democrat. This is a critical thing that needs to change. Thank you all again for being a part of this. Please continue to engage and share with anyone you think would be interested, and I'm looking forward to continuing the dialogue! -- Lucas | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Lucas Kunce P.O. Box 1240, Independence, MO 64050 ? ?

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Inmate Number P01135780
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both
President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.

Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and
President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just
got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.

According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_,
_“SHE’S GOING FULL TILT WITH VENGEANCE AND EMOTIONS.”_

How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and
“vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the
Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the
cold hard _facts_.

But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch
hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk
free.

“‘IT IS UNDISPUTED’: FANI WILLIS HARSHLY CHASTISED BY JUDGE FOR
VIOLATING OPEN RECORDS LAWS IN LAWSUIT SEEKING HER COMMUNICATIONS WITH
JACK SMITH AND JAN. 6 COMMITTEE”

[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]

When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as
INMATE NUMBER P01135780.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/7bc24a02206124ef/?utm_campaign=20241204&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]
__

IN FANI’S EYES, THE “P” STOOD FOR “PRISONER.” BUT, AS AN
INNOCENT MAN FIGHTING FOR HIS FREEDOM, TO ME THE “P” STANDS FOR
“PATRIOT.”

And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your
last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this
despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I
fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in
Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!

body:
Christmas is right around the corner and we’re in the FINAL STRETCH before President Trump takes the oath of office

| |
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zud07s1l3n07jnsue2jf0alklrtiso2r41prdos8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm9o74chh2bs "Trump Christmas Card")
Friend -

_It 's the most wonderful time of the year! _

Christmas is right around the corner and we're in the FINAL STRETCH before President Trump takes the Oath of Office.

_But don't forget what led up to this historic election. The Radical Left forced the Trump Family to endure:_
* A kangaroo court that convicted President Trump over nothing
* Armed federal agents raiding their home
* An endless slog of Fake News hit pieces

But they NEVER gave up.

**That 's why we want to do something extra special for the Trump Family this Christmas. _[We're looking for 500,000 Patriots to add their names to our official Christmas card for our President, Donald J. Trump, and his family!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2r1ninc2chqmom82925o7tkdt92inamie7t1728_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm9o74chh2bs "We’re looking for 500,000 Patriots to add their names to our official Christmas card for our President, Donald J. Trump, and his family!")_**
| | [SIGN THE CARD](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuoje7i9n5kvb98q4afr3tj1hrd1lgdvsb1dgbag_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm9o74chh2bs "SIGN THE CARD")
---

The Trumps have poured their blood, sweat, and tears into saving America from the Radical Left. The least we can do is wish them a Merry Christmas!

**We 're not opening this Christmas card up to just anyone. **

We specifically chose YOU out of the tens of millions of Patriots in our country because you've proven yourself to be a dedicated member of the Conservative movement. So what do you say?
| [SIGN THE CARD](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv1msc3sb6vgvbbbdccp4igrtj5g5fd3s42tgvho_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm9o74chh2bs "SIGN THE CARD")

**_[Will you wish President Trump and his family a Merry Christmas?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl9ncekkoufafisrtmbj22olbavrr8hgekii4mfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm9o74chh2bs "Will you wish President Trump and his family a Merry Christmas?")_**

Thank you.

- Team Scalise

---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoiman41bmvn4a63f8e2kargu4r5i86n563huen8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctjm9o74chh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

subject: 12 years later

body:
Please use your voice.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=HULgdhT65cGYV8c8zemetsVnOMQ9aYxzrsI9jPhyNhleBddX9uIxEE0dnrc%2BqUNu1CebnChlzt0VVvS7tPSpBkmwIZlfgGqOBInTzv5ti81tF2C3Np8OxwpE9uoXTMU3y48SMxjXaAp4rmxWCwRoFriiDU9ew%2BZmEd8xVIBdCWy2jAFNCyoieKzHN1bUGrtLihmMjS60pztIRObr8RRl9jWZ9232UnTAmQU8JM9wmSGgOCiwxhAG23s4PJfQxcbrmbV8SIa7sT6VzxDXkUMaJFXuSnEXrqCJLVqHfJ0KnqOROuEs6hVhyMPmRKYrRgVnaO9hf1Izql6zZQaX7tLX8Vbzh%2BMniobo3lM2mssXozJwt5ypLn6oQtcrAlrEb557bJNcrE6d1sfqA2I2yY48etbDGCRo%2BvlJ1M4VAIhFZm4%3D)

Peter, **This Saturday, December 14, will mark 12 years since the Sandy Hook massacre.** On that fateful day, 20 children between the ages of six and seven years old were tragically killed in their own classrooms — along with 6 adult staff members. Had those 12 girls and 8 boys’ futures not been taken away, they would now be between 18 and 19 years old. **They would have graduated high school, voted in their first elections, started college, and followed their path into adulthood. But, they were robbed of these opportunities.** In the 12 years since the Sandy Hook massacre, our nation has only witnessed further tragedies as a result of gun violence. Our government has systemically failed to enact critical gun violence prevention laws — leading to innumerable loss of life and preventable heartache for their loved ones. The passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act was a step in the right direction. But, it still isn’t enough. We need to fight for tighter gun laws and regulations to ensure no more communities befall the same fate as Sandy Hook, Robb Elementary School, Parkland High School, and so many others. We need immediate, urgent action to honor the many souls lost to gun violence. [Please, Peter, join me in fighting for a future free of gun violence by adding your name to the petition:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98418714/516591906/717271575?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_120924_1_1_Gun-Violence-Petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg1OThlZS00Y2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qHOLwTIE5odKhKzhIU1RnFIAbTVpXYbONjim1Wf8yR4=&emci=27970c3b-f0b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=808598ee-4cb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=799895) | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98418717/516591913/717271575?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_120924_1_1_Gun-Violence-Petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg1OThlZS00Y2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qHOLwTIE5odKhKzhIU1RnFIAbTVpXYbONjim1Wf8yR4=&emci=27970c3b-f0b3-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=808598ee-4cb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=799895)

— Valerie

---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tHALj9biCImQindtjkcHiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOa4YP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPU9HVC0yMDI0MTIwOVcDc3BjQgpnVeceV2ds_F1SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: (For Winners Only) Victory Hats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl1p27pta3s0sn85ivh5ld5vuf7al4u3btvkl3a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge0pr4cjh2bs)
Friend,

Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

YOUR support for Turning Point PAC made a BIG impact on this election.

Trump won over first-time young voters and outperformed the youth vote. This was directly related to our ballot-chasing operations.

What we accomplished this year is remarkable.
* No longer will America First candidates be at a disadvantage to Democrats in ground operations.

* No longer will conservatives rely exclusively on expensive TV ads that don’t move the needle for young voters.

Turning Point is on the ground. We are meeting voters and turning out new voters to secure election victories. But it is only the beginning.

**That’s why I have a special offer exclusively for Turning Point PAC donors.**

[If you continue to support our work with a $25 or more donation, I will send you an exclusive Turning Point Trump 47 hat.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7hdqe1ebqn9bbf7v25o2901siq2gd68chaa9p88_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge0pr4cjh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z34kjmar2q5g8fcu2stboj7c2alle6b5c79kdn58_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge0pr4cjh2bs)
Please let me explain to you why I am asking you to continue your support.

Turning Point PAC has a proven concept. We know that ballot chasers can have a decisive impact on the direction of our country.

But if we are to truly transform America to make it great again, _it will require sustained ground operations in key districts_.

My plans were never about winning just one election.

Turning Point PAC is building an America First movement that will last for decades.

Will you join me in growing this movement?

[Please donate $25 or more today to get your exclusive Trump 47 hat.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zasgk2oou3gvrcl1qpeafohm6tcfbpneqmq5ads8_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge0pr4cjh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf9jop061tpshjgbof4uajd3n6bn7d91b2fofv10_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge0pr4cjh2bs)
For Freedom,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dc780f9fc9448389e1c1aa2716b0b43&_e=Dn19iLJMOUEfPN72j4jBpWF_jFScADKK5YA14e6PThbTdGwaF5LYVUXArqqxnsPpiHIvLHtdwOUrKd4Pa_RS4oXwsYhwbZzYykYr6KjKUCYKvG6ICsO7trQPryHqFwD-_fQB40bTRwhBMchjvAJosa1CX8NhOZbtCS8V80yIFcn2W_unGL2ZkcGQqdM6NttZu4KBks2cc8uDVEUln6yQrTSPR5uu-1DrplmtCB2ByFTSA-egFEBUCy279odwsVvtNsrma_KQgo_NXzQ3wJuuVFvmmc04LoNio48wkUwrk_zyYDj_a1SbfH-2QxyfPcfHnQfa_WkBE1gjOW3xVdqiuNrAIbUOosU3l0QSQ3PeFW8CnbnW_e23XKyRAoM9jMVb)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dc780f9fc9448389e1c1aa2716b0b43&_e=Dn19iLJMOUEfPN72j4jBpWF_jFScADKK5YA14e6PThbTdGwaF5LYVUXArqqxnsPpiHIvLHtdwOUrKd4Pa_RS4oXwsYhwbZzYykYr6KjKUCYKvG6ICsO7trQPryHqFwD-_fQB40bTRwhBMchjvAJosa1CX8NhOZbtCS8V80yIFcn2W_unGL2ZkcGQqdM6NttZu4KBks2cc8uDVEUln6yQrTSPR5uu-1DrplmtCB2ByFSRzCUHJBacpgcvbbPUSqCRpGg-8_e4NUc4mE58VeTCB_JOuRlVInGsPgLE68JmimuF4M87Qf4xjpKChari96oSMds5eZt2baddktxQk8w_x2ASEmYnJl2H_fBcyNRAy3TPYPOMYj5pPPUUZWSyV3SJ)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dc780f9fc9448389e1c1aa2716b0b43&_e=Dn19iLJMOUEfPN72j4jBpWF_jFScADKK5YA14e6PThbTdGwaF5LYVUXArqqxnsPpiHIvLHtdwOUrKd4Pa_RS4oXwsYhwbZzYykYr6KjKUCYKvG6ICsO7trQPryHqFwD-_fQB40bTRwhBMchjvAJosa1CX8NhOZbtCS8V80yIFcn2W_unGL2ZkcGQqdM6NttZu4KBks2cc8uDVEUln6yQrTSPR5uu-1DrplmtCB2ByFRghYUFwyWeW-UJ-Gzly4jnYh9nSJG6gxni44E714K59MrYohuYDDbfpcSRmmFaZBQcPF9zX-VrMlZ4setW2PPwz_xzIfvyV2EmCbEL3kSjv-_Hej4oCIfHVS1spFLA-6ryB4ciCaBi1NEv2RkzgYPN)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dc780f9fc9448389e1c1aa2716b0b43&_e=Dn19iLJMOUEfPN72j4jBpWF_jFScADKK5YA14e6PThbTdGwaF5LYVUXArqqxnsPpiHIvLHtdwOUrKd4Pa_RS4oXwsYhwbZzYykYr6KjKUCYKvG6ICsO7trQPryHqFwD-_fQB40bTRwhBMchjvAJosa1CX8NhOZbtCS8V80yIFcn2W_unGL2ZkcGQqdM6NttZu4KBks2cc8uDVEUln6yQrTSPR5uu-1DrplmtCB2ByFTzQH7AbbpCzjYyd-QC17m_hQgb6gSJL_cgbtdlAQP25PTEyrg0JKNfMGpsl161REwbXkwHKHPCQBn3l_msb7Nvx0UzfeR0SBQqdbgf2LUSYuI7W2VF_wG4j-nGcJMdjnelb6HAHPi55IYRReFrUM5p)
---
| |
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d44b97cf3134308ae8a8c2574ebd7f6&_e=vBWVHkZ00-48zKSmgNM-wWa8CREKzEInoLze0LhjmDK5ZfzB9NIzrKIP7TGdRhQOllWEmcuwQGDNBJ_MqBav1j_AVVXVWAEvLgbXyDc7_xMbknri7K6ytAOFT-3whpFYIUftEniYAjRfZRwYMTEmVFjSjKzjWsVfbOZTea1KBCriR6Wc7vNeXoqWK86NV3FBJ1bU6mHouHXCd3snL7Ab64DfUwiOgi4EhxJmXPVVR2KN3PPP0uDsgUp8KV0ouEfiGO4BwH58qc8ugFhVK5GRhtf_npOa0EjnF_XWq3mD-xKKYoZmlJdfGjjpPeKjrayi3bWVqFRagF3T3wyVB245y6rGtsgSFzazpArQJihqRXfLPFNtvO58eW2n8CNgJtet)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d44b97cf3134308ae8a8c2574ebd7f6&_e=vBWVHkZ00-48zKSmgNM-wWa8CREKzEInoLze0LhjmDK5ZfzB9NIzrKIP7TGdRhQOllWEmcuwQGDNBJ_MqBav1j_AVVXVWAEvLgbXyDc7_xMbknri7K6ytAOFT-3whpFYIUftEniYAjRfZRwYMTEmVFjSjKzjWsVfbOZTea1KBCriR6Wc7vNeXoqWK86NV3FBJ1bU6mHouHXCd3snL7Ab64DfUwiOgi4EhxJmXPVVR2JmcPqrUsZWAzpt5TJIc4FGJ40iDDWW7VQwUhGq9busn6Ro7f1Etdf69j3tOcpRmkvIDsdJsJbGB29KH3ovrND63EsRbMyqPh9uoeDbuUokm-LI4yHjp7zlLEnKCDfrjPK84c_knLZ-ecj_Y5Vh4M9O)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d44b97cf3134308ae8a8c2574ebd7f6&_e=vBWVHkZ00-48zKSmgNM-wWa8CREKzEInoLze0LhjmDK5ZfzB9NIzrKIP7TGdRhQOllWEmcuwQGDNBJ_MqBav1j_AVVXVWAEvLgbXyDc7_xMbknri7K6ytAOFT-3whpFYIUftEniYAjRfZRwYMTEmVFjSjKzjWsVfbOZTea1KBCriR6Wc7vNeXoqWK86NV3FBJ1bU6mHouHXCd3snL7Ab64DfUwiOgi4EhxJmXPVVR2JivauWHffSjo1FKNEw0ZhY9-Vy6sbIuzkRmfDeel17lNLymw7jpHgUvpQYNBxOQOOVfY_RQl13B8QqlKPGKIkjef19gPxGvyeeA5sqNnySvM3l3PWU34tvkJEcnpDXwtpsNaiUk8WJWEnSC6kvgeQy)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3d44b97cf3134308ae8a8c2574ebd7f6&_e=vBWVHkZ00-48zKSmgNM-wWa8CREKzEInoLze0LhjmDK5ZfzB9NIzrKIP7TGdRhQOllWEmcuwQGDNBJ_MqBav1j_AVVXVWAEvLgbXyDc7_xMbknri7K6ytAOFT-3whpFYIUftEniYAjRfZRwYMTEmVFjSjKzjWsVfbOZTea1KBCriR6Wc7vNeXoqWK86NV3FBJ1bU6mHouHXCd3snL7Ab64DfUwiOgi4EhxJmXPVVR2I6Oeo4wGWCksB1PjiqJbwz3q1Ghw9swN_7TrrmhefRagQgy8wxfum7RtW-34rbrl6OMhawirDtszR7JwNvwCPBQlL7ElNS0h_VFQcU-axWJj8-AZ48dGUA5TNHmMVObbzwIbQoSePQ4u5tC0A4RzmB)

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: Do you have a story like Lauren's?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
freedomva.org [freedomva.org]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/Screenshot%202024-12-05%20132229.png]
“My husband has a lot of health problems, even though he has healthcare coverage. You never know how much medication costs and there's no rhyme or reason. Prescription medication is literally the one thing that I cannot budget for because the absorbing price is too high. No one is ever upfront about how much the prescription medication is going to be. My husband currently has an ongoing stomach issue, and he is on a medication called Erythromycin prescribed by our gastroenterologist. When we filled the prescription, the medication cost us $900. A few years ago, this exact same medication only cost $5. Not having to pay such high costs would be something that would significantly help my husband, who already goes through so many health issues.”
-Lauren, Fredericksburg
Do you have an experience like Lauren’s? [https://forms.gle/gnVLwYttT2pvCtmT8] It may be more common than you think. 1 out of every 4 Virginians [https://www.healthcarevaluehub.org/advocate-resources/publications/virginia-residents-worried-about-high-drug-costs-support-range-government-solutions] who depend on prescription medication decides not to take those medications because they cannot afford them, and 63% of Virginians [https://www.aarp.org/content/dam/aarp/research/topics/health/prescription-drugs/virginia-prescription-drug-survey-2023-annotated-questionnaire.doi.10.26419-2Fres.00710.002.pdf] are worried about whether they can afford necessary prescriptions in addition to other essential costs like groceries and rent.
As we prepare for this next General Assembly session, we want to hear from YOU about your experiences with affordability issues in Virginia. Whether it’s affording prescription drugs, taking time off to care for yourself or a loved one, or finding affordable childcare and housing, your story should be heard.
Share Your Story [https://forms.gle/gnVLwYttT2pvCtmT8]
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva] https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia [https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/q_CpamaVEkCe6YwjAflTPw2?unsubscribedata=rN39X0GK8qYH4P7ibBedMPhJogZzrjHKKaegmn0iRBSs4cpJm1T%2BEcVIzMoy47Om5mNI49CMbKsQsbXFt4hfGGTxA6XCE%2Bj16iW76zY9Sr6qQWC8d4IDc7YC7HwX3K4IcwLRb%2BgnFDDQItWuvUh%2F9OlS%2Fd%2FLaAJMln0YwSjNK2Sl9UJzfFEneXVZUVusiTtBAvPZp281KqG9z5PHNrNAEl4Lk5JwIUEUTwQVCFfgHwL2GvQqk1eM1jmQBhDhHowZSJmbnr2YyAGYT1LkbcwnA0pcRDWi0EtBhS3OhCKYbzvf0HoeSpqRu9gwAbdQhZXPiOi8ESOLQ3vGCYhbpgy4nV23C2zUR%2BSAa778xN74ZSSeKSJyfvXbe7bSIKAXpjjzAtadDlHZbVsndxjOu%2F3q9mRtF3G99Z6lAuvjbzE43pA%3D .
