subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=76c6c9e28b054af39889091ab5c8ac2e&_t=G50xENXKB8VLt5G_Dg4jif8raDbuYtNVqsN8_xAT6Lg7DBu_FmnlYr3s-PLxfJz-La-ytu9yzGz0iY0_SqnzI9kGDuWNs_nBsnMX9Fh1wZeibjb0iojx2btJyGaOdeUJ)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=76c6c9e28b054af39889091ab5c8ac2e&_e=cphW_2du82GATdLjygktKKBEUQc-v4TDMtVOQI2-uhp6cUTL11fp2SYc1H8HqXqgH11C3ERoiHENCGJzM1-dlFt86h-2VBJQUk84ROad7XykcgmDuKWArpS4L9IwLQ0UrotsKNsM30-YLjogSXXWddVcXlVJ0dTacy2h3njJ84qa4lsfSqxvr8F0jAaZT5kYvhTPoFs2KGIXjvQ2CPtf4mrAIchac0cHQbTkAHCgHvKU9BS2gGfIMy1xQEZvSGKNfbWRq4mfhL8h3Db28bnYjSDfENsJCM1BMVfHaO93blPcNb2DlfGwqfKeCUJ33LKYiQhlcVwL0lXZlGQdBNJ5jI4YDByhtUEIfQ2cT7ggdJSRBL-JOS_tYSUdhH0yWIuXuv7r7s0pj4wSZU8lfTUaHQ%3D%3D)
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before December 31st by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=76c6c9e28b054af39889091ab5c8ac2e&_e=cphW_2du82GATdLjygktKKBEUQc-v4TDMtVOQI2-uhp6cUTL11fp2SYc1H8HqXqgH11C3ERoiHENCGJzM1-dlFt86h-2VBJQUk84ROad7XykcgmDuKWArpS4L9IwLQ0UrotsKNsM30-YLjogSXXWddVcXlVJ0dTacy2h3njJ84qa4lsfSqxvr8F0jAaZT5kYvhTPoFs2KGIXjvQ2CPtf4mrAIchac0cHQbTkAHCgHvLheRw5_BJRM3UjDa7i_T4h8KuSJBpb9exAR5AD7wP_44R05D59Es82mRAJo0XO4fTN0jzAmd3Fci7DTO3qx7BifJKG847pBjwd1e_ia3D5a3EfgmzBFs9yS2NYdqG_LmtXWLXfIcUp68iOPlyQxC29Ugtmam97Gb2YKZ5oIiQCPg%3D%3D)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=76c6c9e28b054af39889091ab5c8ac2e&_e=cphW_2du82GATdLjygktKKBEUQc-v4TDMtVOQI2-uhp6cUTL11fp2SYc1H8HqXqgH11C3ERoiHENCGJzM1-dlFt86h-2VBJQUk84ROad7XykcgmDuKWArpS4L9IwLQ0UrotsKNsM30-YLjogSXXWddVcXlVJ0dTacy2h3njJ84qa4lsfSqxvr8F0jAaZT5kYvhTPoFs2KGIXjvQ2CPtf4mrAIchac0cHQbTkAHCgHvIuGaR1fGanQ8K5_d8tXIRK70B4eVDQAUXtWuiUamI-u2fcBJnEitwHTaCWNYSUPwhmxraOezs7ffA552y-owhiR7lR-Qr80GaapYVpG2EWz266anav6-kQ96rWNI6I9oqZgPjTYkdEzn_49_BdCGKtCznJ_tLiJL31hYx1xhARyA%3D%3D)

And when you do, you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**. But you must act before December 31st.

Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before December 31st at the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=76c6c9e28b054af39889091ab5c8ac2e&_e=cphW_2du82GATdLjygktKKBEUQc-v4TDMtVOQI2-uhp6cUTL11fp2SYc1H8HqXqgH11C3ERoiHENCGJzM1-dlFt86h-2VBJQUk84ROad7XykcgmDuKWArpS4L9IwLQ0UrotsKNsM30-YLjogSXXWddVcXlVJ0dTacy2h3njJ84qa4lsfSqxvr8F0jAaZT5kYvhTPoFs2KGIXjvQ2CPtf4mrAIchac0cHQbTkAHCgHvI_3BohQ955LxdBzCxTuheaWr-6yPLWVWivEV-XAvu7mxWWwFcNov6BQwRKffOn-QHIv_LzjBX5pRhlyfnkn-L8FjAyhTjJHm1rxKoypLc-ShygGpAE8CNUosnB8hT3G_Ml6xFMqrPQVPkyHPFyFjj-HpI0TNRxavMoAFQ1cRXK4g%3D%3D)

When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. **Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission!**
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=76c6c9e28b054af39889091ab5c8ac2e&_t=G50xENXKB8VLt5G_Dg4jif8raDbuYtNVqsN8_xAT6Lg7DBu_FmnlYr3s-PLxfJz-La-ytu9yzGz0iY0_SqnzI9kGDuWNs_nBsnMX9Fh1wZeibjb0iojx2btJyGaOdeUJ).

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT! Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of Imprimis , and restore excellence to K-12 education. Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below: And when you do, you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar. But you must act before December 31st. Thank you for being a steadfast Hillsdale supporter. Your generosity is needed now more than ever. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before December 31st at the secure link below: When you do, you will defend liberty and help us accomplish our mission year after year. Everything we accomplish is only possible due to your continued generosity, so thank you for your support of our mission! . | |

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98419935/516596360/-1995327540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUwMTAyYi00ZmI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcjaBShDlPH4zq3M_0GbwveU1bBqLk4UR0YFrICwoEA=&emci=2f418672-40b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2050102b-4fb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)

Hey team —
Since the election, we’ve gotten messages from people all over the country wondering how we keep up the fight for our democracy against Trump’s second term.
Before we answer them, we want to thank every single person who pledged to vote, advocated for change, and headed to the polls last month. We may not have won everything we wanted, but the victories we did win will be _critical_ to our democracy in the coming month.
[If we’re going to keep up the fight for our rights and future, we have to stand together against Trump and his cronies’ extremism. Take action TODAY against MAGA extremism and keep up the fight for our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98419936/516596361/-918159641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUwMTAyYi00ZmI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcjaBShDlPH4zq3M_0GbwveU1bBqLk4UR0YFrICwoEA=&emci=2f418672-40b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2050102b-4fb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)
| [Join the Fight →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98419937/516596362/1810723714?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUwMTAyYi00ZmI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcjaBShDlPH4zq3M_0GbwveU1bBqLk4UR0YFrICwoEA=&emci=2f418672-40b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2050102b-4fb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)
---
Now, let’s address some of your concerns:
**How much can we really do when Republicans control the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives?**
We won’t lie to you: The road ahead is going to be challenging. And the likelihood of being able to stop _everything_ Trump and his MAGA cronies try to push through Congress isn't high.
But that doesn’t mean Trump gets a free pass to do whatever he wants. Republicans’ majorities in the House and Senate will be _slim_. And not every Republican has been willing to bow down to Trump’s demands.
So what do we do? **_We keep applying pressure!_**
When Trump tries to push the Project 2025 agenda through Congress, we let our elected officials know we won’t tolerate it. And trust us when we say, members of Congress care _way_ more about getting reelected than about pleasing a president in his final term of office.
**What about the Supreme Court?**
It’s true — the far-right majority on the Supreme Court has cost us student loan relief, abortion access, affirmative action, and much more.
So we’re going to apply pressure on Congress to hold the Court accountable. Passing judicial reform measurements like the TERM Act will be critical in our fight against Trump and his MAGA allies.
**But we’re up against powerful people with so much money!**
Yes. And?
Look, we know it’s scary. Elon Musk alone spent at least $133 million bankrolling Trump’s campaign. Billionaires and mega corporations alike have made it clear that they’re only interested in their bottom line.
But when we stand up, work together, and reject the status quo, _we make progress a reality_. So we’re keeping up the fight for corporate accountability and demanding that the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share.
**What can I do right now to help keep up the fight against Trump’s agenda?**
[Take action NOW so that young voters like us can mobilize and take action against MAGA extremism.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98419938/516596363/244639773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUwMTAyYi00ZmI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcjaBShDlPH4zq3M_0GbwveU1bBqLk4UR0YFrICwoEA=&emci=2f418672-40b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2050102b-4fb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)
| [Join the Fight →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98419940/516596365/-1321444168?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDUwMTAyYi00ZmI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JcjaBShDlPH4zq3M_0GbwveU1bBqLk4UR0YFrICwoEA=&emci=2f418672-40b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2050102b-4fb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=6787172)

name: Ellen R. Malcolm, EMILYs List
subject: Reasons for hope:
body:
A message from our founder |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98420633/516598231/162262288?refcode=WTEFEX17_20241209_ERMRS_PL&sourceid=1055482&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTczMDMxYy00ZmI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dshLcyVrmdanr5Mf0-9UWDlY1QoOQBRyq67cBu6ok8s=) Hi Peter,

I'm writing to you today because I want you to know I feel your pain. Kamala's loss — and Trump's win — were great disappointments. I feel like I'm cycling through the stages of grief: fear, sadness, rage...

But that's only part of the story. Finding opportunity in defeat is what has kept me doing this work for nearly 40 years.

Here's what I know for sure: We're not going to sit by while Trump tries to destroy our democracy. We will capitalize on our anger, we will fight back, and we will win.

**I want to tell you a story from the early days of EMILYs List that I've been thinking about a lot lately. It's about defeat, hope, and what comes next:**

In 1992, in the wake of Anita Hill's bravery during Clarence Thomas' Supreme Court hearings, women nationwide rose up. They were sick and tired of the harassment and discrimination they'd been forced to endure at work for decades. They demanded real political power. _**And they turned out in _historic numbers_ to elect Democratic women.**_

EMILYs List's membership grew from 3,000 to 24,000 that year. We raised $6.5 million for our candidates. And we elected four Democratic women to the U.S. Senate and 20 to the U.S. House. It was an extraordinary, record-shattering year. And I'll be honest, Peter — after all that success, we felt a little invincible. We thought we could accomplish _anything_.

And then came 1994.

Newt Gingrich rolled out the GOP's "Contract with America" legislative platform, seeking to nationalize the midterm elections. And it worked. Republicans picked up 54 U.S. House seats and 10 U.S. Senate seats, taking control of both chambers. We lost some of the women we had just worked _so hard_ to elect in 1992.

It was dubbed the "Republican Revolution." And in the aftermath, all the media wanted to talk about was how voters were sick of Democrats, how we had alienated the white men in our base, and how the American people no longer believed our party could deliver for them. It was a real moment of reckoning for our party. (Sound familiar?)

So here's what we did: We doubled down. We launched our "Boot Newt" campaign to combat the new speaker's extremist agenda, and we fought voter apathy by going straight to the press to let Americans know exactly what we stood for. We created the EMILYs List major donor program, which has gone on to raise hundreds of millions of dollars. We built a powerful political program that directly assists our women in launching and running their campaigns. And we launched Women Vote, our massively successful independent expenditure arm, which has helped elect hundreds of Democratic pro-choice women over the past 30 years.

**1992 is the year that put EMILYs List on the map. But if it weren't for the losses of 1994, EMILYs List may not have become the powerhouse institution it is today.**

The business of making real social change through electoral politics isn't easy, and it isn't linear. I call it "leaping and creeping" — we make big leaps forward, and then we face some tough losses, and then we creep forward again, win by win. After almost 40 years of EMILYs List, I'm here to tell you, Peter: _We're always moving forward_. Even when we lose. Even when it feels like all is lost. _Over time, we are making real and lasting change_. That's the story of EMILYs List, it's the story of the Democratic Party, and it's the story of America.

Peter, there's no way around it: We experienced a devastating loss last month. The incoming Trump administration poses an existential threat to our rights and our democracy. And while there are many reasons for fear, outrage, and disappointment, there are just as many reasons for hope. Together, we will rebuild and recover. The next leap is around the corner.

Thank you for being with EMILYs List, today and always.

Ellen Malcolm
Founder, EMILYs List

clean_body: A message from our founder | = Hi Peter, I'm writing to you today because I want you to know I feel your pain. Kamala's loss — and Trump's win — were great disappointments. I feel like I'm cycling through the stages of grief: fear, sadness, rage... But that's only part of the story. Finding opportunity in defeat is what has kept me doing this work for nearly 40 years. Here's what I know for sure: We're not going to sit by while Trump tries to destroy our democracy. We will capitalize on our anger, we will fight back, and we will win. I want to tell you a story from the early days of EMILYs List that I've been thinking about a lot lately. It's about defeat, hope, and what comes next: In 1992, in the wake of Anita Hill's bravery during Clarence Thomas' Supreme Court hearings, women nationwide rose up. They were sick and tired of the harassment and discrimination they'd been forced to endure at work for decades. They demanded real political power. And they turned out in historic numbers to elect Democratic women. EMILYs List's membership grew from 3,000 to 24,000 that year. We raised $6.5 million for our candidates. And we elected four Democratic women to the U.S. Senate and 20 to the U.S. House. It was an extraordinary, record-shattering year. And I'll be honest, Peter — after all that success, we felt a little invincible. We thought we could accomplish anything. And then came 1994. Newt Gingrich rolled out the GOP's "Contract with America" legislative platform, seeking to nationalize the midterm elections. And it worked. Republicans picked up 54 U.S. House seats and 10 U.S. Senate seats, taking control of both chambers. We lost some of the women we had just worked so hard to elect in 1992. It was dubbed the "Republican Revolution." And in the aftermath, all the media wanted to talk about was how voters were sick of Democrats, how we had alienated the white men in our base, and how the American people no longer believed our party could deliver for them. It was a real moment of reckoning for our party. (Sound familiar?) So here's what we did: We doubled down. We launched our "Boot Newt" campaign to combat the new speaker's extremist agenda, and we fought voter apathy by going straight to the press to let Americans know exactly what we stood for. We created the EMILYs List major donor program, which has gone on to raise hundreds of millions of dollars. We built a powerful political program that directly assists our women in launching and running their campaigns. And we launched Women Vote, our massively successful independent expenditure arm, which has helped elect hundreds of Democratic pro-choice women over the past 30 years. 1992 is the year that put EMILYs List on the map. But if it weren't for the losses of 1994, EMILYs List may not have become the powerhouse institution it is today. The business of making real social change through electoral politics isn't easy, and it isn't linear. I call it "leaping and creeping" — we make big leaps forward, and then we face some tough losses, and then we creep forward again, win by win. After almost 40 years of EMILYs List, I'm here to tell you, Peter: We're always moving forward. Even when we lose. Even when it feels like all is lost. Over time, we are making real and lasting change. That's the story of EMILYs List, it's the story of the Democratic Party, and it's the story of America. Peter, there's no way around it: We experienced a devastating loss last month. The incoming Trump administration poses an existential threat to our rights and our democracy. And while there are many reasons for fear, outrage, and disappointment, there are just as many reasons for hope. Together, we will rebuild and recover. The next leap is around the corner. Thank you for being with EMILYs List, today and always. Ellen Malcolm Founder, EMILYs List PS: If you're ready to help EMILYs List chart a new path forward, =. Thank you. | = = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. [**"It is no longer safe to be pregnant in Idaho."**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98421948/516602948/164907700?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&sourceid=1150100&utm_campaign=25emjge-1201aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_content=eoy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Y1ZjExYi01MWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moFniPVLNrUrC4g5x3r0bGja27mL-QcJ0qSEKwER-Jw=&emci=7137244e-86b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0cf5f11b-51b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237) These are the devastating words of Jennifer Adkins, a lead plaintiff in our case against Idaho's cruel abortion ban. Her story is a stark reminder of the life-threatening consequences of these extreme laws. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98421949/516602949/164907700?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&sourceid=1150100&utm_campaign=25emjge-1201aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_content=eoy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Y1ZjExYi01MWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moFniPVLNrUrC4g5x3r0bGja27mL-QcJ0qSEKwER-Jw=&emci=7137244e-86b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0cf5f11b-51b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237) When Jennifer's 12-week ultrasound revealed that her pregnancy wasn't viable, Idaho's abortion ban forced her to leave her home state to access life-saving care. Her doctors admitted they would have referred her for an abortion locally—if Idaho's laws allowed it. Instead, Jennifer and her husband had to travel to Portland, Oregon, only after receiving financial support from abortion funds.

[**Jennifer's story makes it clear: these so-called "medical exceptions" are vague, unworkable, and dangerous. Pregnant women deserve better.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98421950/516602950/164907700?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&sourceid=1150100&utm_campaign=25emjge-1201aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_content=eoy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Y1ZjExYi01MWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moFniPVLNrUrC4g5x3r0bGja27mL-QcJ0qSEKwER-Jw=&emci=7137244e-86b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0cf5f11b-51b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237)

The Center for Reproductive Rights is representing Jennifer and six other plaintiffs in Idaho as they sue their home state to clarify and expand the so-called "medical exceptions" to Idaho's cruel and extreme bans.

[**Jennifer's story is difficult to hear—but it demands to be told. Share her story and join us in the fight for reproductive rights in Idaho.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98421951/516602951/330749134?sourceid=1150100&utm_campaign=25emjge-1201aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Y1ZjExYi01MWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moFniPVLNrUrC4g5x3r0bGja27mL-QcJ0qSEKwER-Jw=&emci=7137244e-86b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0cf5f11b-51b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237#jennifer-adkins) | [**JOIN THE FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98421952/516602952/2141984067?sourceid=1150100&utm_campaign=25emjge-1201aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Y1ZjExYi01MWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=moFniPVLNrUrC4g5x3r0bGja27mL-QcJ0qSEKwER-Jw=&emci=7137244e-86b2-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0cf5f11b-51b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=954237 "JOIN THE FIGHT")

clean_body: Exceptions don't work. | | | ---|--- These are the devastating words of Jennifer Adkins, a lead plaintiff in our case against Idaho's cruel abortion ban. Her story is a stark reminder of the life-threatening consequences of these extreme laws. When Jennifer's 12-week ultrasound revealed that her pregnancy wasn't viable, Idaho's abortion ban forced her to leave her home state to access life-saving care. Her doctors admitted they would have referred her for an abortion locally—if Idaho's laws allowed it. Instead, Jennifer and her husband had to travel to Portland, Oregon, only after receiving financial support from abortion funds. The Center for Reproductive Rights is representing Jennifer and six other plaintiffs in Idaho as they sue their home state to clarify and expand the so-called "medical exceptions" to Idaho's cruel and extreme bans. | "JOIN THE FIGHT" In solidarity, Center for Reproductive Rights "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Matthew Frohlich, WAGOP
subject: The Cost of Protecting Your Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WAGOP is doing something new for the first time - creating new programs and being more aggressive is what it's going to take for the WAGOP to... | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1168fe2991&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | Fellow Conservatives,
This is Chairman Jim Walsh. WAGOP recently launched the **Project to Resist Tyranny** in Washington State. This is a multi-front approach to pushing back against unlawful, unethical and unconstitutional actions of incoming Governor Bob Ferguson, State Attorney General Nick Brown, School Superintendent Chris Reykdal and Commissioner of Public Lands Dave Upthegrove.

Some of these fronts are legislative, some are media-focused but many of the most urgent are going to be in the courts.

WAGOP is committed to filing lawsuits that will protect our state’s elections, our state’s school kids, our state constitution and so many of the good things in this state. We’ve already started the **Project to Resist Tyranny** with lawsuits that challenge unlawful election practices and attempts to hide public information.

**The WAGOP and Project to Resist Tyranny** need your help to keep up our courtroom pressure on Ferguson, Brown & Co. Please make a contribution today to help fund the fight!

---
| [Contribute here to the 'Project to Resist Tyranny'](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4841fe6bc7&e=6a281f566d "Contribute here to the 'Project to Resist Tyranny'")
---
| _**Lawsuits are expensive**_. And, given the political biases of many trial-court judges in Washington, WAGOP often has to appeal cases to higher courts in order to get a fair hearing. We don’t mind. We’re in this for the long haul. Please support our efforts.

---
| [Contribute here to the 'Project to Resist Tyranny'](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=32c50dba9f&e=6a281f566d "Contribute here to the 'Project to Resist Tyranny'")
---
| Despite some early—and mistaken—media reports, Washington did vote a little “redder” in 2024 than it did in 2020. Just a little bit, though. WAGOP will build on this incremental improvement. But, for the next few years, lawsuits...what we call “good lawfare”...are going to be an important part of fixing what’s broken in our beautiful state. **With good trial lawyers costing $500 or $600 an hour, WAGOP chooses its courtroom fights carefully.**

[_**We still need your help, to keep the pressure on Ferguson & Co. Please make a contribution today. You can do it quickly by clicking on the button below.**_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=27d3c5d1e3&e=6a281f566d)

Everyone knows how Bob Ferguson behaved during his years as State Attorney General. He’s anti-business, anti-cop and pro-criminal. He’s obsessed with Donald Trump. He needs to be kept in check. Occupying him in court is an effective way to do that. Help WAGOP keep Ferguson in check by contributing to the **Project to Resist Tyranny** and our courtroom “conservative lawfare” strategy today.

WAGOP thanks you. The people of Washington thank you. And your children and grandchildren thank you!

---
| [Click here to contribute to the 'Project to Resist Tyranny'](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8d6fb8a1ce&e=6a281f566d "Click here to contribute to the 'Project to Resist Tyranny'")
---
|
---
| | Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/smooth-transition-2698156?e=6a281f566d)
---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b974357ff444eb3aa72ec9ddb3a1a31&_e=6cjJyuWExJ_SrdjgZu6E4j4sLFZ0dfUUiDwS0czoVFs8y7JsPCLO2VJToGpIWKGDxAp25D5IYK5QpbKwFBhrnUaE35s1elyURznS46EbSloRNoZoGxFzZ9botByz9qpTUMoPDKY_2bFT7W3kJkTOVC_XSmD4zGzFhQltmGPCbpPIj8gahETtf_KAzt6gBYGwSRXv1jojFhsKE03Bl69B-jRypGgA-KJw5aM_uOSnkNtyb8f1LPt8xlf_jDCd7AKpkSMi8A4RO6fUNf_yvnedXYnOIB_3-Yaq82CtqzUjBMSwe7EEVl8_xLEDqxVyb0LAASjCfhodp4I1QUcu8HoeLWcAmoq-U_dNA3JDeqlNfzvwbDU-jnHMJZJFk4Ta6Czr)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b974357ff444eb3aa72ec9ddb3a1a31&_e=6cjJyuWExJ_SrdjgZu6E4j4sLFZ0dfUUiDwS0czoVFs8y7JsPCLO2VJToGpIWKGDxAp25D5IYK5QpbKwFBhrnUaE35s1elyURznS46EbSloRNoZoGxFzZ9botByz9qpTUMoPDKY_2bFT7W3kJkTOVC_XSmD4zGzFhQltmGPCbpPIj8gahETtf_KAzt6gBYGwSRXv1jojFhsKE03Bl69B-jRypGgA-KJw5aM_uOSnkNtS8l4uJBgOu6UrD9dh8YNBRr4Ar9aX4d9rFmCUfoUBEdBbbwOFn86NBMDmQM1qC8sTw2H7mKdOFLYcHYMPj-0MPxand1yTKJCX6Ew8-9w_q8XWkAool4l4Ct9Uu23NJSlN8vpRhwpirKysRNyaAAzr)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b974357ff444eb3aa72ec9ddb3a1a31&_e=6cjJyuWExJ_SrdjgZu6E4j4sLFZ0dfUUiDwS0czoVFs8y7JsPCLO2VJToGpIWKGDxAp25D5IYK5QpbKwFBhrnUaE35s1elyURznS46EbSloRNoZoGxFzZ9botByz9qpTUMoPDKY_2bFT7W3kJkTOVC_XSmD4zGzFhQltmGPCbpPIj8gahETtf_KAzt6gBYGwSRXv1jojFhsKE03Bl69B-jRypGgA-KJw5aM_uOSnkNvJrlSj6LI4os79aVXVKC8443ysgvR752Ldg7wdn8NqVjWhuN7axfNf-c889foBwj7BbPHdiD7bzr1WUimgYNG2e_I77aXPf09JQSEfY29XtJEn5x0BN3lHuQbcPAWjrrUTEKk82gxM7eKtfFTzI7gr)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

subject: Trump’s first act: Erasing Jan. 6th—unless we stop him
body:
Don’t let them rewrite history.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98423582/516607422/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlMTQ1NTktNTRiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NaSoNdHfCNJQSagjWYtRRlIUaBQP_YMAClxZ0NKckjg=&emci=804f2053-54b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5ae14559-54b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
One of the hallmarks of authoritarian regimes is a war on truth.
Yesterday on NBC’s _Meet the Press_ , Donald Trump announced that he would pardon the January 6th rioters on day one of his new administration—a decision that could rewrite history and normalize one of the darkest days in our nation’s history.
But Trump won’t wage his war alone. From _Fox News_ to Elon Musk’s _X_ , he’ll have the full force of right-wing media working tirelessly to help him cast insurrectionists as patriots, downplay the violence, and obscure the truth.
**On Jan. 6th 2021, Trump became the first president in history to defy the peaceful transfer of power.**
To fight back, we need a progressive media strong enough to counter the lies.
At COURIER, we’re building just that. With your support, we can stand up to the right-wing media, defend the truth, and protect our democracy from Trump’s authoritarian agenda.
[**Your support powers the independent journalism our nation needs right now. Can you chip in $25 today to help COURIER build the media network democracy needs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98423583/516607423/-593472309?refcode=20241209-EM-WarforTruth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlMTQ1NTktNTRiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NaSoNdHfCNJQSagjWYtRRlIUaBQP_YMAClxZ0NKckjg=)
Trump’s actions are an assault on the rule of law and the foundations of our republic. January 6th wasn’t just a breach of the Capitol—it was the gravest violation of our Constitution by any president in American history.
That’s the truth. And while Trump and the right-wing media will do everything they can to bury it, COURIER will ensure it’s heard—freely, by anyone who needs it.
We’re not like the legacy media. There are no paywalls or corporate sponsors standing between the public and the facts we report.
**COURIER is a progressive media network built to deliver fact-based, values-driven journalism directly to the people who need it most.**
Together, we can make sure the truth about January 6th is never erased—and that Trump’s authoritarian agenda is met with facts, accountability, and resistance.
[**Can you chip in $25 today to help COURIER protect the truth and deliver it to communities across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98423584/516607424/-593472309?refcode=20241209-EM-WarforTruth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlMTQ1NTktNTRiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NaSoNdHfCNJQSagjWYtRRlIUaBQP_YMAClxZ0NKckjg=)

name: Dan Carr
subject: The Constitution
body:
Cornerstone of Liberty and the American Experiment:

| |
---|---|---
|
# The Constitution
### Cornerstone of Liberty and the American Experiment:
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Dec 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
The United States Constitution stands as a testament to the vision of a nation rooted in liberty, justice, and enduring principles. Drafted in 1787, it serves as the supreme law of the land and the framework for governance. Its influence extends beyond America's borders, inspiring countless democracies around the globe. Understanding the Constitution's significance is vital not only for its role in the founding of the nation but also for preserving its values for future generations. [#WeThePeople](https://substack.com/redirect/3a597a58-9810-4cff-8a52-5604b612322e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#ConstitutionMatters](https://substack.com/redirect/d84a2b5d-9097-4a05-add5-3cdee44928bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#FoundingPrinciples](https://substack.com/redirect/e7800730-6340-475b-bd37-066d129f72e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#LibertyAndJustice](https://substack.com/redirect/27b3013f-f694-40e2-bb94-6e7aa303eab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#BillOfRights](https://substack.com/redirect/9fcfa4d0-745a-46fd-ac9e-d5c4cb9d282c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:

| |
---
| | | **CHRISTMAS CAME EARLY THIS YEAR!**
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70eda2caf9ad4b1a945e8a1f83594780&_e=8LLBOlrieIVvWG3Ot_FPN2EQaC_ACuvZ1YmLLVw6yxjUBmnpCezuoLHDEP2CmCV-365wFk8hSeMQOGT_dGaLR8zwCyn42EXWGBVuY1xmszFXK8LbHi4999BhvLlZdIoJudCBtRb4ajJf-dJVi1SroSGs4nFrAAKvpv8WDv5ojVrG6OJzXOBwBQG94pxjVxDVW1xMweFMxhvwNjwut_jg3Dt8e_3cDDHpyHYqZvtWMo5OQz_RhQNJ1c0D5M6G0AoRTKSelYCJZD7K_HeClAQW8kBSnasw7VYSTqChq0gDInXnQt0jllHstnDU3r0g_tJJmGCe2Zxyzx8jkVSYmdU3Bv56jgoLYaot5MWX4n_GPEYNYYu_bIp-69G1_IqG6uJMvR2xfls2QutZwNHZKaJ_fI169LXAFnJgrTwbV3eY-bnocPGM09ZvpmSzolAXucyO "GET YOUR SWEATER TODAY")
---
_**On November 5th, Americans unwrapped the ultimate gift: a Trump presidency.**_ As we deck the halls and prepare for the merriest of seasons, we're still basking in the joy of our historic victory.

Now, we're spreading the cheer with a special 'Christmas Came Early' sweater - the perfect addition to your holiday wardrobe and a great way to show your support for our President-elect.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0930e803e75d4fd890c809ac04f60b96&_e=dAhzi-h-iwOAauvFT_OEmo8988m7G7IWLftoH98wlz1xq4WBHpE-y_G6AdztsaMTeBOk1FjZHfcEg5GJSswBxwTBzDlVlJUWuwIQd7EDKOdPQJ_Hu_Qc4h9i3REerqV618Xu-GjIZCTJAX6Knuers5rmVXidh21i8Ehd29cFvpQ3oxMVIWp0BqmgMH2IXJkv1NcWq218UdyrqqmZRggwj_aYlksoaj7C_cKrV7wbYUfjcjh2g8u6Rz8h60SQ67dOMK4A6jqhGjfYyjNroi7TeNq3aSZHQWoAn2st_vdJRWL4WYHVGlrW7sH8LlcN0bkeIw5YmCIoZsR8VCK4MEZAhkLKi73jxE7v6DOY-oMILryOhLz8rWc7V2zck8Fid725), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0930e803e75d4fd890c809ac04f60b96&_e=dAhzi-h-iwOAauvFT_OEmo8988m7G7IWLftoH98wlz1xq4WBHpE-y_G6AdztsaMTeBOk1FjZHfcEg5GJSswBxwTBzDlVlJUWuwIQd7EDKOdPQJ_Hu_Qc4h9i3REerqV618Xu-GjIZCTJAX6Knuers5rmVXidh21i8Ehd29cFvpQ3oxMVIWp0BqmgMH2IXJkv1NcWq218UdyrqqmZRggwj_aYlksoaj7C_cKrV7wbYUeDLXrjd95bkWq4LNtfy4ovhzYBWTQLKxnXOM8YKltoOSyBcuDkmsG_9MJ1BGGxXyVj29vyE-Gx5QSpB3p_PPi0qEgmWFFYwhkRvrF47ZuXs2AL6yMHCENd6oaEyiJOkhknEh4tFfXkeohUEQiytHiv) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0930e803e75d4fd890c809ac04f60b96&_e=dAhzi-h-iwOAauvFT_OEmo8988m7G7IWLftoH98wlz1xq4WBHpE-y_G6AdztsaMTeBOk1FjZHfcEg5GJSswBxwTBzDlVlJUWuwIQd7EDKOdPQJ_Hu_Qc4h9i3REerqV618Xu-GjIZCTJAX6Knuers5rmVXidh21i8Ehd29cFvpQ3oxMVIWp0BqmgMH2IXJkv1NcWq218UdyrqqmZRggwj_aYlksoaj7C_cKrV7wbYUcKgoI-hxZA-1e6RR7w_GrJVImxxZWR1PTweKwzTODYLhK0KfO50fWCCUba0jDU-0B84bEAbGd83WYF8FHQjmtVAl0_56Mf-PZ7AynjUbuExLEb639o-PR8horUpWN_0i9Z7RU6wGnO73LB_IrbMEp3) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0930e803e75d4fd890c809ac04f60b96&_e=dAhzi-h-iwOAauvFT_OEmo8988m7G7IWLftoH98wlz1xq4WBHpE-y_G6AdztsaMTeBOk1FjZHfcEg5GJSswBxwTBzDlVlJUWuwIQd7EDKOdPQJ_Hu_Qc4h9i3REerqV618Xu-GjIZCTJAX6Knuers5rmVXidh21i8Ehd29cFvpQ3oxMVIWp0BqmgMH2IXJkv1NcWq218UdyrqqmZRggwj_aYlksoaj7C_cKrV7wbYUfv3upKwr4bCQaCWIiW0OMhzR8xiVDV_o5mGKi38czPOSXd9rGWBNOjatuvfnecLVtCDMmOn-A685Yfd-wcNDiTwPxjBrvzt-xq8zYqUWjZdYl5l-qSB1lju0YnZmdlAo9Cax1gQKkpZPi9TeZudfKV) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0930e803e75d4fd890c809ac04f60b96&_e=dAhzi-h-iwOAauvFT_OEmo8988m7G7IWLftoH98wlz1xq4WBHpE-y_G6AdztsaMTeBOk1FjZHfcEg5GJSswBxwTBzDlVlJUWuwIQd7EDKOdPQJ_Hu_Qc4h9i3REerqV618Xu-GjIZCTJAX6Knuers5rmVXidh21i8Ehd29cFvpQ3oxMVIWp0BqmgMH2IXJkv1NcWq218UdyrqqmZRggwj_aYlksoaj7C_cKrV7wbYUfRg1IU-02qRuEPa9O7Ko4jZOKPKO_ncafi3xEr9bzldPdXt9ivrs3qpzmaWLPrjxByKmEjRsE1s-8Aa0uBp5H3ndL8voA_uh3hFNgPbbrfhrl-eVjT0yUZalVJWhKgiKHYlFIqPwr92GOGnlRxZ_Qe)

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Dustin Burrows says he has votes to be Texas House speaker after David Cook wins GOP Caucus vote,** " Texas Tribune's **James Barrag an, Renzo Downey and Jasper Scherer **-- "In a stunning turn of events, state Rep. **Dustin Burrows** of Lubbock claimed Saturday evening that he had the necessary votes to become the next speaker of the Texas House.

"The speaker's race is over," he said in a news conference that lasted less than two minutes. "I have secured enough to be speaker of the House for the next session."

Burrows released a list of 76 supporters -- 38 Republicans and 38 Democrats. However, three members say they should not be on the list, debasing Burrows' claim to have the necessary votes to be elected speaker.

Burrows' announcement**** came just minutes after Rep. **David Cook** of Mansfield, Burrows' main rival for the speaker's gavel, had been declared the endorsed candidate by the House GOP Caucus by a vote of 48-14 after a contingent of Burrows' supporters dramatically left the meeting after the two rivals had stalemated in the first two rounds.

All 88 GOP caucus members are tied by the group's rules to vote for the endorsed candidate, which would help Cook surpass the 76-vote threshold**** at the beginning of the legislative session in January to be elected speaker. But Burrows made his announcement surrounded by fellow Republican supporters indicating that those lawmakers were willing to go against the rules to back Burrows.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/c94f9070-9181-40e5-a5c2-b2205e66b3d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After the caucus meeting, Cook thanked the 62 members who remained "committed to the process" and stayed until the caucus chose a candidate. Additionally, he committed to unifying the caucus by**** working with those who walked.

"This is still a race," Cook told reporters. "That was something obviously we were hoping for today. We were hopeful that the 88 Republicans in the Texas House Republican Caucus would come together and make a decision, to a unified decision, that unifies all Texas House Republicans so that the Texas House can move forward. So, no, it's not over."

Later, asked by the Tribune for his plan if Burrows puts out a list of 76 supporters, Cook said he would continue working with members to earn the majority.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/c94f9070-9181-40e5-a5c2-b2205e66b3d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After Burrows published his list, Cook published a list of 56 Republican supporters. The two lists contained several duplicated names, including **Don McLaughlin** , **Charles Cunningham** , **Janie Lopez** , **Mano DeAyala** , **Jeff Barry** and **Paul Dyson**.
McLaughlin said that he did not give permission to be on Burrows' list and remained committed to Cook.

"I stand firm with my conservative colleagues -- my vote for speaker is with David Cook," McLaughlin said in a statement. "Any claim that I support Dustin Burrows is pure deception."

Another newly elected lawmaker on both lists,**Paul Dyson** , said in a statement that he would support Cook for speaker.

"During the campaign, I pledged to support the caucus nominee, and I applaud David and the other speaker candidates for spending countless hours sharing their vision for a united Republican House caucus," he said. "I look forward to working with you, David, to deliver conservative results for Texas."

A GOP lawmaker familiar with the matter said they were aware of at least two other Republican members who were asking for their names to be removed from Burrows' list.

Later in the evening, Democratic Rep. **Josey Garcia** , whom Burrows had included on his list, said she had not endorsed him.

"I have not endorsed a candidate for speaker of the House at this time," the San Antonio lawmaker said in a statement. "Like all of my colleagues, I take great responsibility in electing our next speaker, and I look forward to casting my vote soon."

After the GOP caucus meeting, Cook said that the race was not over and that he wanted to work with the 26 Republican caucus members who left to win over their support. Cook also said he was willing to talk to Democrats to earn their support.

The dueling claims of victory are a sign that the intraparty Republican war could continue into the next legislative session. On Saturday night, the Texas GOP put out a statement urging House Republicans to unite behind Cook and calling on other speaker candidates to drop out of the race.

House GOP Caucus Chairman **Tom Oliverson** , who withdrew his bid for speaker to support Cook, said he expected the group's members to abide by its rules and vote for Cook. He said he agreed that the race was over but that it was Cook who was victorious.

"[Burrows] knows how that process works because he helped write that process" as former caucus chair, Oliverson said. "What has happened outside of the caucus meeting is very much what **Joe Straus** used to do and that is the reason why the rules were put in place."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Dustin Burrows says he has votes to be Texas House speaker after David Cook wins GOP Caucus vote, " Texas Tribune's James Barrag an, Renzo Downey and Jasper Scherer -- "In a stunning turn of events, state Rep. Dustin Burrows of Lubbock claimed Saturday evening that he had the necessary votes to become the next speaker of the Texas House. "The speaker's race is over," he said in a news conference that lasted less than two minutes. "I have secured enough to be speaker of the House for the next session." Burrows released a list of 76 supporters -- 38 Republicans and 38 Democrats. However, three members say they should not be on the list, debasing Burrows' claim to have the necessary votes to be elected speaker. Burrows' announcement** came just minutes after Rep. David Cook of Mansfield, Burrows' main rival for the speaker's gavel, had been declared the endorsed candidate by the House GOP Caucus by a vote of 48-14 after a contingent of Burrows' supporters dramatically left the meeting after the two rivals had stalemated in the first two rounds. All 88 GOP caucus members are tied by the group's rules to vote for the endorsed candidate, which would help Cook surpass the 76-vote threshold at the beginning of the legislative session in January to be elected speaker. But Burrows made his announcement surrounded by fellow Republican supporters indicating that those lawmakers were willing to go against the rules to back Burrows. After the caucus meeting, Cook thanked the 62 members who remained "committed to the process" and stayed until the caucus chose a candidate. Additionally, he committed to unifying the caucus by working with those who walked. "This is still a race," Cook told reporters. "That was something obviously we were hoping for today. We were hopeful that the 88 Republicans in the Texas House Republican Caucus would come together and make a decision, to a unified decision, that unifies all Texas House Republicans so that the Texas House can move forward. So, no, it's not over." Later, asked by the Tribune for his plan if Burrows puts out a list of 76 supporters, Cook said he would continue working with members to earn the majority. After Burrows published his list, Cook published a list of 56 Republican supporters. The two lists contained several duplicated names, including Don McLaughlin , Charles Cunningham , Janie Lopez , Mano DeAyala , Jeff Barry and Paul Dyson. McLaughlin said that he did not give permission to be on Burrows' list and remained committed to Cook. "I stand firm with my conservative colleagues -- my vote for speaker is with David Cook," McLaughlin said in a statement. "Any claim that I support Dustin Burrows is pure deception." Another newly elected lawmaker on both lists,Paul Dyson , said in a statement that he would support Cook for speaker. "During the campaign, I pledged to support the caucus nominee, and I applaud David and the other speaker candidates for spending countless hours sharing their vision for a united Republican House caucus," he said. "I look forward to working with you, David, to deliver conservative results for Texas." A GOP lawmaker familiar with the matter said they were aware of at least two other Republican members who were asking for their names to be removed from Burrows' list. Later in the evening, Democratic Rep. Josey Garcia , whom Burrows had included on his list, said she had not endorsed him. "I have not endorsed a candidate for speaker of the House at this time," the San Antonio lawmaker said in a statement. "Like all of my colleagues, I take great responsibility in electing our next speaker, and I look forward to casting my vote soon." After the GOP caucus meeting, Cook said that the race was not over and that he wanted to work with the 26 Republican caucus members who left to win over their support. Cook also said he was willing to talk to Democrats to earn their support. The dueling claims of victory are a sign that the intraparty Republican war could continue into the next legislative session. On Saturday night, the Texas GOP put out a statement urging House Republicans to unite behind Cook and calling on other speaker candidates to drop out of the race. House GOP Caucus Chairman Tom Oliverson , who withdrew his bid for speaker to support Cook, said he expected the group's members to abide by its rules and vote for Cook. He said he agreed that the race was over but that it was Cook who was victorious. "[Burrows] knows how that process works because he helped write that process" as former caucus chair, Oliverson said. "What has happened outside of the caucus meeting is very much what Joe Straus used to do and that is the reason why the rules were put in place."" * **TOP NEWS**

"**Dustin Burrows says he has votes to be Texas House speaker after David Cook wins GOP Caucus vote,** " Texas Tribune's **James Barrag an, Renzo Downey and Jasper Scherer **-- "In a stunning turn of events, state Rep. **Dustin Burrows** of Lubbock claimed Saturday evening that he had the necessary votes to become the next speaker of the Texas House.

"The speaker's race is over," he said in a news conference that lasted less than two minutes. "I have secured enough to be speaker of the House for the next session."

Burrows released a list of 76 supporters -- 38 Republicans and 38 Democrats. However, three members say they should not be on the list, debasing Burrows' claim to have the necessary votes to be elected speaker.

Burrows' announcement**** came just minutes after Rep. **David Cook** of Mansfield, Burrows' main rival for the speaker's gavel, had been declared the endorsed candidate by the House GOP Caucus by a vote of 48-14 after a contingent of Burrows' supporters dramatically left the meeting after the two rivals had stalemated in the first two rounds.

All 88 GOP caucus members are tied by the group's rules to vote for the endorsed candidate, which would help Cook surpass the 76-vote threshold**** at the beginning of the legislative session in January to be elected speaker. But Burrows made his announcement surrounded by fellow Republican supporters indicating that those lawmakers were willing to go against the rules to back Burrows.

After the caucus meeting, Cook thanked the 62 members who remained "committed to the process" and stayed until the caucus chose a candidate. Additionally, he committed to unifying the caucus by**** working with those who walked.

"This is still a race," Cook told reporters. "That was something obviously we were hoping for today. We were hopeful that the 88 Republicans in the Texas House Republican Caucus would come together and make a decision, to a unified decision, that unifies all Texas House Republicans so that the Texas House can move forward. So, no, it's not over."

Later, asked by the Tribune for his plan if Burrows puts out a list of 76 supporters, Cook said he would continue working with members to earn the majority.

After Burrows published his list, Cook published a list of 56 Republican supporters. The two lists contained several duplicated names, including **Don McLaughlin** , **Charles Cunningham** , **Janie Lopez** , **Mano DeAyala** , **Jeff Barry** and **Paul Dyson**.
McLaughlin said that he did not give permission to be on Burrows' list and remained committed to Cook.

"I stand firm with my conservative colleagues -- my vote for speaker is with David Cook," McLaughlin said in a statement. "Any claim that I support Dustin Burrows is pure deception."

Another newly elected lawmaker on both lists,**Paul Dyson** , said in a statement that he would support Cook for speaker.

"During the campaign, I pledged to support the caucus nominee, and I applaud David and the other speaker candidates for spending countless hours sharing their vision for a united Republican House caucus," he said. "I look forward to working with you, David, to deliver conservative results for Texas."

A GOP lawmaker familiar with the matter said they were aware of at least two other Republican members who were asking for their names to be removed from Burrows' list.

Later in the evening, Democratic Rep. **Josey Garcia** , whom Burrows had included on his list, said she had not endorsed him.

"I have not endorsed a candidate for speaker of the House at this time," the San Antonio lawmaker said in a statement. "Like all of my colleagues, I take great responsibility in electing our next speaker, and I look forward to casting my vote soon."

After the GOP caucus meeting, Cook said that the race was not over and that he wanted to work with the 26 Republican caucus members who left to win over their support. Cook also said he was willing to talk to Democrats to earn their support.

The dueling claims of victory are a sign that the intraparty Republican war could continue into the next legislative session. On Saturday night, the Texas GOP put out a statement urging House Republicans to unite behind Cook and calling on other speaker candidates to drop out of the race.

House GOP Caucus Chairman **Tom Oliverson** , who withdrew his bid for speaker to support Cook, said he expected the group's members to abide by its rules and vote for Cook. He said he agreed that the race was over but that it was Cook who was victorious.

"[Burrows] knows how that process works because he helped write that process" as former caucus chair, Oliverson said. "What has happened outside of the caucus meeting is very much what **Joe Straus** used to do and that is the reason why the rules were put in place."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Dustin Burrows says he has votes to be Texas House speaker after David Cook wins GOP Caucus vote, " Texas Tribune's James Barrag an, Renzo Downey and Jasper Scherer -- "In a stunning turn of events, state Rep. Dustin Burrows of Lubbock claimed Saturday evening that he had the necessary votes to become the next speaker of the Texas House. "The speaker's race is over," he said in a news conference that lasted less than two minutes. "I have secured enough to be speaker of the House for the next session." Burrows released a list of 76 supporters -- 38 Republicans and 38 Democrats. However, three members say they should not be on the list, debasing Burrows' claim to have the necessary votes to be elected speaker. Burrows' announcement** came just minutes after Rep. David Cook of Mansfield, Burrows' main rival for the speaker's gavel, had been declared the endorsed candidate by the House GOP Caucus by a vote of 48-14 after a contingent of Burrows' supporters dramatically left the meeting after the two rivals had stalemated in the first two rounds. All 88 GOP caucus members are tied by the group's rules to vote for the endorsed candidate, which would help Cook surpass the 76-vote threshold at the beginning of the legislative session in January to be elected speaker. But Burrows made his announcement surrounded by fellow Republican supporters indicating that those lawmakers were willing to go against the rules to back Burrows. After the caucus meeting, Cook thanked the 62 members who remained "committed to the process" and stayed until the caucus chose a candidate. Additionally, he committed to unifying the caucus by working with those who walked. "This is still a race," Cook told reporters. "That was something obviously we were hoping for today. We were hopeful that the 88 Republicans in the Texas House Republican Caucus would come together and make a decision, to a unified decision, that unifies all Texas House Republicans so that the Texas House can move forward. So, no, it's not over." Later, asked by the Tribune for his plan if Burrows puts out a list of 76 supporters, Cook said he would continue working with members to earn the majority. After Burrows published his list, Cook published a list of 56 Republican supporters. The two lists contained several duplicated names, including Don McLaughlin , Charles Cunningham , Janie Lopez , Mano DeAyala , Jeff Barry and Paul Dyson. McLaughlin said that he did not give permission to be on Burrows' list and remained committed to Cook. "I stand firm with my conservative colleagues -- my vote for speaker is with David Cook," McLaughlin said in a statement. "Any claim that I support Dustin Burrows is pure deception." Another newly elected lawmaker on both lists,Paul Dyson , said in a statement that he would support Cook for speaker. "During the campaign, I pledged to support the caucus nominee, and I applaud David and the other speaker candidates for spending countless hours sharing their vision for a united Republican House caucus," he said. "I look forward to working with you, David, to deliver conservative results for Texas." A GOP lawmaker familiar with the matter said they were aware of at least two other Republican members who were asking for their names to be removed from Burrows' list. Later in the evening, Democratic Rep. Josey Garcia , whom Burrows had included on his list, said she had not endorsed him. "I have not endorsed a candidate for speaker of the House at this time," the San Antonio lawmaker said in a statement. "Like all of my colleagues, I take great responsibility in electing our next speaker, and I look forward to casting my vote soon." After the GOP caucus meeting, Cook said that the race was not over and that he wanted to work with the 26 Republican caucus members who left to win over their support. Cook also said he was willing to talk to Democrats to earn their support. The dueling claims of victory are a sign that the intraparty Republican war could continue into the next legislative session. On Saturday night, the Texas GOP put out a statement urging House Republicans to unite behind Cook and calling on other speaker candidates to drop out of the race. House GOP Caucus Chairman Tom Oliverson , who withdrew his bid for speaker to support Cook, said he expected the group's members to abide by its rules and vote for Cook. He said he agreed that the race was over but that it was Cook who was victorious. "[Burrows] knows how that process works because he helped write that process" as former caucus chair, Oliverson said. "What has happened outside of the caucus meeting is very much what Joe Straus used to do and that is the reason why the rules were put in place."" FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. subject: (For Winners Only) Victory Hats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

|
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zcj6oa38p9h53hbmgaim542gisofhppp73jipmq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge2pj4c1h2bs)
Friend,

Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

YOUR support for Turning Point PAC made a BIG impact on this election.

Trump won over first-time young voters and outperformed the youth vote. This was directly related to our ballot-chasing operations.

What we accomplished this year is remarkable.
* No longer will America First candidates be at a disadvantage to Democrats in ground operations.

* No longer will conservatives rely exclusively on expensive TV ads that don’t move the needle for young voters.

Turning Point is on the ground. We are meeting voters and turning out new voters to secure election victories. But it is only the beginning.

**That’s why I have a special offer exclusively for Turning Point PAC donors.**

[If you continue to support our work with a $25 or more donation, I will send you an exclusive Turning Point Trump 47 hat.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zf59ae9a1cn3kefqt34ksn0jqgk9c7be6sl2rg10_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge2pj4c1h2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlv2v6kabmmd7d579lpbhlspo1vc8gdi04q0gbc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge2pj4c1h2bs)
Please let me explain to you why I am asking you to continue your support.

Turning Point PAC has a proven concept. We know that ballot chasers can have a decisive impact on the direction of our country.

But if we are to truly transform America to make it great again, _it will require sustained ground operations in key districts_.

My plans were never about winning just one election.

Turning Point PAC is building an America First movement that will last for decades.

Will you join me in growing this movement?

[Please donate $25 or more today to get your exclusive Trump 47 hat.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvo4unju9o2m9m7m150ccab0aanshgv71qok5kvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge2pj4c1h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdlv0i92c882kcl0fi7vuhq4be7449c88p8arnqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj6ctge2pj4c1h2bs)
For Freedom,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: We Know How to Throw a Christmas Ball
body:
A chance to reflect on 2024 and set the stage for 2025
| | |
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D18kqdZTVautVmZTP7Jswju1MagHuZxMMDOQbsjKR6fKDTGMlCLicS5a4HiBv5byqs-kMiM2wk827gLnP3swuiTK70GzcfKhfT2oDfslq2MJn5SxvGfnrnP1mHQCJcLW5t69HeBp7It-JEBib2xivmth39zd-sR1Gh48Ab1j9r3hdNkfsqpV7E_W7HS2RzbQfn24cMgfuCw-oDxPsCpREw==&c=QpCYCMf0k1TQf_TJzB_k_YFVbXTVnRkiS3fDHV5R2SyUUpkqkPvWTg==&ch=bZ8UZ3g1l-v5i4ZKunsJZZc0N2XhiajcKV-HIdHVrStjdtohuzpjyg==)
---
| Friends,

I've never been more honored to serve as President of the American Principles Project.
Last Thursday night, over 600 of us came together for our annual Christmas Ball to celebrate all of you who stepped up and charted a new path for our country.
The things we accomplished together in 2024 are truly staggering.
---
|
* We completely changed the blueprint for addressing social issues in America.
* We are building a movement that embraces the nuclear American family.
* People are returning to the basics of faith, uniting politics and culture in lockstep.
* And most importantly; we re-elected President Trump and delivered him a congressional majority.

---
| |
---
Changing the culture to combat the woke left's "mind virus" was central to these successes. We were thrilled to have Daily Wire's Matt Walsh as the evening's keynote speaker, especially after he joined us on the[ steps of the Supreme Court just](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D18kqdZTVautVmZTP7Jswju1MagHuZxMMDOQbsjKR6fKDTGMlCLiccDqKq0wJKlteYMSX6yGl5_E-5fU3m9QT9J3r7vq3yAVhEtoGKpBE2eHKKOlhziXfGnlcSwPdJ71wPpRM8JMgQ0Cxnp4o9xl1aY4tE3sabG6JkXtqeibsdMGU8JXjtJsxY6IDKhALK8yar1JWclRh7E=&c=QpCYCMf0k1TQf_TJzB_k_YFVbXTVnRkiS3fDHV5R2SyUUpkqkPvWTg==&ch=bZ8UZ3g1l-v5i4ZKunsJZZc0N2XhiajcKV-HIdHVrStjdtohuzpjyg==) days earlier for the United States vs. Skrmetti case hearing.
Matt has been a steadfast culture warrior, leading the charge against the trans agenda through his groundbreaking film [What Is a Woman?](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D18kqdZTVautVmZTP7Jswju1MagHuZxMMDOQbsjKR6fKDTGMlCLiccDqKq0wJKlti3G8O9PX5yfwRHelXatoukzFciQ3eq6tj3-1JLOq1HT_M-umLyM0S1VyJeZKd66Usrws2gz4AdarUfVA17xPkumar91l1qP3tOLHs-J86SiAyNZN7KWjbbG7PUo2K60P&c=QpCYCMf0k1TQf_TJzB_k_YFVbXTVnRkiS3fDHV5R2SyUUpkqkPvWTg==&ch=bZ8UZ3g1l-v5i4ZKunsJZZc0N2XhiajcKV-HIdHVrStjdtohuzpjyg==) His work even played a pivotal role in the Supreme Court case United States vs. Skrmetti just last week.
---
| [Support APP](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D18kqdZTVautVmZTP7Jswju1MagHuZxMMDOQbsjKR6fKDTGMlCLiccXtmt-3QVg1A1cOeUCjEgySDgm2xrhWvZAUUe4EpYWm4hwVfWnkK8VH38zrlQszj7FivWKtJiZKwkZEQ4RJLo-B3Ua3GjxodoXN1HojfiZaBCEvmwkzCAqvDT-uoxfSiGzpOZ43Y9ELsPdkk1XQVVsoWRsnxxvq8g==&c=QpCYCMf0k1TQf_TJzB_k_YFVbXTVnRkiS3fDHV5R2SyUUpkqkPvWTg==&ch=bZ8UZ3g1l-v5i4ZKunsJZZc0N2XhiajcKV-HIdHVrStjdtohuzpjyg==)
---
Getting key fighters into elected office is a core function of what we do, and Senator-Elect Jim Banks is a perfect example. That's why we were honored to award him the Jeff Bell Human Dignity Award, named for APPF's co-founder, longtime policy director, and conservative movement pioneer - the award is given in recognition of extraordinary leadership in defense of human dignity and the family in the political arena.
Senator-Elect Banks has been tireless in his work to defend our children in Congress and will be a steadfast ally for us serving in the Senate.

---
| |
---
| Representative Greg Steube, a steadfast ally of our family agenda and someone whose company I always enjoy, spoke at our VIP reception about the critical importance of protecting women's sports from the woke trans agenda and the vital role Congress plays in this fight.
Greg has been a tremendous leader in the House, consistently standing up for conservative values and fighting for the issues that matter most to American families. His dedication to advancing President Trump's agenda is unwavering, and I look forward to continuing to work alongside him in the future to ensure we protect our freedoms, strengthen our nation, and uphold the principles that make America great.
Kathaleen Wall, as I said in my speech, is more than just a MVP supporter, she's more than just a friend, she IS family, and I was truly blessed to present her as the recipient of the 2024 Defender of the Family Award. Her support for our organization has been instrumental as we've grown and we would not be where we are today without her.
---
| |
---
| While we celebrate what we have accomplished so far, we're also looking forward.
And candidly, our challenges are immense.
Yes, we are going to be unrelenting bulldogs for President Trump and his pro-family agenda, we are going to hold corrupt politicians benefiting from the trans movement accountable, work as hard as possible to ensure we keep Virginia red and expand the map to do things like bringing family issues to the forefront and flip New Jersey.
And we are going to rip apart anyone who gets in the way of our agenda.

---
| | [Watch a Clip](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D18kqdZTVautVmZTP7Jswju1MagHuZxMMDOQbsjKR6fKDTGMlCLiccDqKq0wJKltQSyGJSBeLgSwykHlKJ-6xYB5eTqPVrO_ht-I1IKm0RLVE_27IvIyhLE_ttP4YipdxEwiuJ5zxuG1gdwBH-eXC76CbRyrEWncLw0duxT6qoc4nNvcwgBeF7n1ZMbydi7jCWYOzFvKiYw=&c=QpCYCMf0k1TQf_TJzB_k_YFVbXTVnRkiS3fDHV5R2SyUUpkqkPvWTg==&ch=bZ8UZ3g1l-v5i4ZKunsJZZc0N2XhiajcKV-HIdHVrStjdtohuzpjyg==)

---
| In order to get this work done, we need your support! Can you partner with us as we continue to fight for our families?
---
| | [PARTNER WITH US FOR 2025](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D18kqdZTVautVmZTP7Jswju1MagHuZxMMDOQbsjKR6fKDTGMlCLicS5a4HiBv5byqs-kMiM2wk827gLnP3swuiTK70GzcfKhfT2oDfslq2MJn5SxvGfnrnP1mHQCJcLW5t69HeBp7It-JEBib2xivmth39zd-sR1Gh48Ab1j9r3hdNkfsqpV7E_W7HS2RzbQfn24cMgfuCw-oDxPsCpREw==&c=QpCYCMf0k1TQf_TJzB_k_YFVbXTVnRkiS3fDHV5R2SyUUpkqkPvWTg==&ch=bZ8UZ3g1l-v5i4ZKunsJZZc0N2XhiajcKV-HIdHVrStjdtohuzpjyg==)
---
|
Thank you!
In Freedom,
---

| Terry Schilling President American Principles Project
