clean_body: A chance to reflect on 2024 and set the stage for 2025 | | | | | == | Friends, I've never been more honored to serve as President of the American Principles Project. Last Thursday night, over 600 of us came together for our annual Christmas Ball to celebrate all of you who stepped up and charted a new path for our country. The things we accomplished together in 2024 are truly staggering. | We completely changed the blueprint for addressing social issues in America. We are building a movement that embraces the nuclear American family. People are returning to the basics of faith, uniting politics and culture in lockstep. And most importantly; we re-elected President Trump and delivered him a congressional majority. | | Changing the culture to combat the woke left's "mind virus" was central to these successes. We were thrilled to have Daily Wire's Matt Walsh as the evening's keynote speaker, especially after he joined us on the== days earlier for the United States vs. Skrmetti case hearing. Matt has been a steadfast culture warrior, leading the charge against the trans agenda through his groundbreaking film == His work even played a pivotal role in the Supreme Court case United States vs. Skrmetti just last week. | == Getting key fighters into elected office is a core function of what we do, and Senator-Elect Jim Banks is a perfect example. That's why we were honored to award him the Jeff Bell Human Dignity Award, named for APPF's co-founder, longtime policy director, and conservative movement pioneer - the award is given in recognition of extraordinary leadership in defense of human dignity and the family in the political arena. Senator-Elect Banks has been tireless in his work to defend our children in Congress and will be a steadfast ally for us serving in the Senate. | | | Representative Greg Steube, a steadfast ally of our family agenda and someone whose company I always enjoy, spoke at our VIP reception about the critical importance of protecting women's sports from the woke trans agenda and the vital role Congress plays in this fight. Greg has been a tremendous leader in the House, consistently standing up for conservative values and fighting for the issues that matter most to American families. His dedication to advancing President Trump's agenda is unwavering, and I look forward to continuing to work alongside him in the future to ensure we protect our freedoms, strengthen our nation, and uphold the principles that make America great. Kathaleen Wall, as I said in my speech, is more than just a MVP supporter, she's more than just a friend, she IS family, and I was truly blessed to present her as the recipient of the 2024 Defender of the Family Award. Her support for our organization has been instrumental as we've grown and we would not be where we are today without her. | | | While we celebrate what we have accomplished so far, we're also looking forward. And candidly, our challenges are immense. Yes, we are going to be unrelenting bulldogs for President Trump and his pro-family agenda, we are going to hold corrupt politicians benefiting from the trans movement accountable, work as hard as possible to ensure we keep Virginia red and expand the map to do things like bringing family issues to the forefront and flip New Jersey. And we are going to rip apart anyone who gets in the way of our agenda. | | == | | == | In order to get this work done, we need your support! Can you partner with us as we continue to fight for our families? | | == | Thank you! In Freedom, | | | Terry Schilling President American Principles Project | | == | Thank you for standing with us in the fight for America's families. Together, we can make a lasting difference. | == == == == | | | | American Principles Project | 2800 S Shirlington Rd Ste 901 | Arlington, VA 22206-3601 US | | |

---
California Chronicles and Chuck’s DNC Decision
The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 67
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid dive into holiday misadventures, including a highway patrol ticket and Thanksgiving reflections from California to the Dominican Republic. **Chuck reflects on his consideration (and ultimate decision not to) run for the DNC chair** , sharing insights on the challenges and responsibilities of leadership in politics.

Chuck will continue to be a driving force for democrats as he highlights the strategies he utilized to help **flip key California House seats**. Mike delivers a sharp critique of both parties' approaches to engaging Latino voters, **emphasizing the need for authentic messaging and long-term investments in the community.**
---
|
---

body:

| | Dear Fellow American,

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I serve as president of Hillsdale College. I'm writing to you today because you're a concerned American who keeps up with current events.

That means you know something is seriously wrong in too many of our nation's schools.

You know a fierce ideological battle is raging in classrooms across the country, and our children are at risk.

**This is no accident.**

The far-Left, guided by a Marxist vision of a radically transformed society, has strategically targeted education, including K-12 classrooms across America.

That's why I'm asking you to complete the **NATIONAL OPINION SURVEY ON THE MARXIST HIJACKING OF AMERICAN EDUCATION.**

You can take your survey at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/marxist-hijacking-of-american-education-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4322ab207d004fa7a1b31f5d8ea46ee9&_e=_ik6AemAnxaq7bdsbuE8-Ikhco31l-FMXhXtc1u08sF_xGFhyKOZWRNFvATdCYTG-mJf-dSvCYSbqt2i9ZAdReaQ1RuHvgKQUM6e6x6UtU3rx3a9hwJSPaALCHrqlmJs3a2z1uxJ-Uj_HvtCaytQsrKAvG7_5PsfeBooP4hu9o4WQz4XcGvGFUnLVnz4mxx8htVwm3Q6zB8Qb2IsYSXs3oFs9BWVrQfac6BiXm77F9Js3y-mz7Tk6BRqazhkXQOYCBRz7UBIwdW_bT_eapFFq7ozHtl8_xWjdLlfD7IhoWYWdDOBt3GbYVAvq3mgAaDkoDbn_uD2Qxlzw9sIrhAJrW0cd8sQsZcLQnUlIy2A9QQ-qZ3IO-LFlwCdXTriCFrru8AC0R8jE95IKVgwFnVGhxCjgNGWyquGLOp7MLrN7tP3Ij3QurHbGMmeSzeyDip0)

Thank you in advance.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Fwd: Have you RSVPed yet?
body:
Join us on December 19th for OLCV's Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden! RSVP now. | | Hi Peter, Did you see Britney's last email? I want to make sure you don't miss this special opportunity to hear directly from Senator Wyden and ask him a question about your top environmental priority. **WHEN:** Thursday, December 19th, at 11:30 am PT
**WHERE:** Zoom webinar (link will be shared a few days before the town hall)
[**RSVP for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98424710/516611811/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwYmJjYjY2LTU3YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-qtMRuLL3dMJ40CVKOevCrdo5V82mPzATQoF1lKI7oI=&emci=0584fc02-03b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c0bbcb66-57b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Make sure you use [this form](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98424712/516611815/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwYmJjYjY2LTU3YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-qtMRuLL3dMJ40CVKOevCrdo5V82mPzATQoF1lKI7oI=&emci=0584fc02-03b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c0bbcb66-57b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) to submit your question and RSVP so you'll receive a link to the Zoom webinar! Can we count on you to be there? Sincerely,
Sarah Kline
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98424714/516611818/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwYmJjYjY2LTU3YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-qtMRuLL3dMJ40CVKOevCrdo5V82mPzATQoF1lKI7oI=&emci=0584fc02-03b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c0bbcb66-57b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, I wanted to remind you of [**OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98424716/516611821/138054893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwYmJjYjY2LTU3YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-qtMRuLL3dMJ40CVKOevCrdo5V82mPzATQoF1lKI7oI=&emci=0584fc02-03b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c0bbcb66-57b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) on Thursday, December 19th. This will be a great opportunity to learn more from Senator Wyden on what he’s working on now, how climate investments of the IRA will benefit Oregon and how the federal election outcome may impact those investments, the latest on efforts to protect the Owyhee Canyonlands, and hear his answer to selected audience questions. **WHEN:** Thursday, December 19th, at 11:30 am PT. Mark your calendars today!
**WHERE:** Zoom webinar (link will be shared a few days before the town hall)
[**RSVP for OLCV’s Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Wyden**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98424718/516611824/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwYmJjYjY2LTU3YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-qtMRuLL3dMJ40CVKOevCrdo5V82mPzATQoF1lKI7oI=&emci=0584fc02-03b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c0bbcb66-57b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) We’re hosting this town hall to prepare for the newly elected president and Congress to take office. Leadership to safeguard our air, water, forests, wildlife, and communities at the federal level is now more important than ever. Senator Ron Wyden, is one of these leaders, and has been standing up for conservation and environmental values in D.C. If you’ve got a question on an environmental issue you’d like Senator Wyden to answer, [make sure you submit your question at the bottom of the RSVP form](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98424719/516611827/-1782305511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwYmJjYjY2LTU3YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-qtMRuLL3dMJ40CVKOevCrdo5V82mPzATQoF1lKI7oI=&emci=0584fc02-03b4-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c0bbcb66-57b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230). name: House Republicans
subject: We can’t afford to lose THIS to the Left, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t believe it’s come to this

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Democrats are trying to stop President Trump's agenda at all costs. **And now, they 've found their latest foothold: Special Elections in Florida. **

They're working hard to fill these two open House seats with radical, Leftist candidates who will _put all of their efforts into halting our MAGA agenda in Congress. _

**Nancy Pelosi and liberal billionaires are scheming as we speak: could funnel COUNTLESS dark money dollars into winning these critical Special Elections to slow down Trump 's agenda. **

If we want to make sure that the Left doesn't stop Trump's legislative priorities, we MUST save these seats. _But the damage isn 't done yet, Friend_! We have enough time to stop Pelosi's scheme before it becomes a dismal reality.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Just 1 SEAT?!
body:
Our new majority is on the brink.

Our new majority is on the brink.
| [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkMHOnCAUhZ8GdxrgouiCxd8Yky6maTqLWRIGrg4TEQPYef3G1D5At9_NPTnfedz0zfjVb8sPE1D5nHXKOn2yfsfkzFa_j1xqVmc0RXPKRc14TQfNKqdazvq5r1AxCSAl7QWrXgrQCngODoZu5vSJs2lxkNLSAbAVPVZenTmM04H1lLe8sUYIJ4TBueNu7gYi6LE7U7DxW_YOs41x3-Pqi7e5iWmpVvUqZc8EvgifCJ8y2iNh8_FbQtfYGAifCppQ_5UgfJISgXUALWVo5v55_sF0lKCtCbvxy0ZgvHp1hHfnJaDzRyAwYjB-vWCOR7JIYPz10N8uZuNWcCsExp9fFyqWwPj9fq__uVZJuf3j19XnThJBlzPzrFqV_1n9t-J_AgAA__-1IYkN)
---
Friend,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, friend. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size to match my commitment to DEFEND our House majority and SAVE AMERICA.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkMHOnCAUhZ8GdxrgouiCxd8Yky6maTqLWRIGrg4TEQPYef3G1D5At9_NPTnfedz0zfjVb8sPE1D5nHXKOn2yfsfkzFa_j1xqVmc0RXPKRc14TQfNKqdazvq5r1AxCSAl7QWrXgrQCngODoZu5vSJs2lxkNLSAbAVPVZenTmM04H1lLe8sUYIJ4TBueNu7gYi6LE7U7DxW_YOs41x3-Pqi7e5iWmpVvUqZc8EvgifCJ8y2iNh8_FbQtfYGAifCppQ_5UgfJISgXUALWVo5v55_sF0lKCtCbvxy0ZgvHp1hHfnJaDzRyAwYjB-vWCOR7JIYPz10N8uZuNWcCsExp9fFyqWwPj9fq__uVZJuf3j19XnThJBlzPzrFqV_1n9t-J_AgAA__-1IYkN)

body:
Our new majority is on the brink.

Our new majority is on the brink.

_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _

But we also must face a glaring reality:

**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e31db04dc5274e629b009564b799d702&_e=Ml0u0pcwqoLK6oMoyVte7DwfbmUTcQqTkWSs1RewdZBNTzIwFssZqzR7xxVeqSszJWq51jjt2tx7IzrYtmBwHW5fxvawXqI8VYUnrDbybwAFvlTy4Yu4k3Jo25J5xMQspt0MvR-HI1v9RLFp3xTS34apagqa9LnQPJmRmf1TM0kKQpPYWSP9ONlFw_Wj59h1f9806P3qrPKdsxmnj0_AzJPwBahmQFxkhKvnhY0Sb4BCocP5Ta7820iF2MdYv4aOP-Ct5Z8STz8ABUbE0LrhbpP-l9A8rO_h6vnwsM0bnI6vEI2H4_uByPtHbozYlhahVVer04nv8AcXgaBmX4E64-Lj1pboVDbXijdihulDlF1GYs7B1YVPzz-41fywXK1rAibmT0lWrCPNiqnwsXz9qruDAqFEaP-pjp1ij2ygZls%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e31db04dc5274e629b009564b799d702&_e=Ml0u0pcwqoLK6oMoyVte7DwfbmUTcQqTkWSs1RewdZBNTzIwFssZqzR7xxVeqSszJWq51jjt2tx7IzrYtmBwHW5fxvawXqI8VYUnrDbybwAFvlTy4Yu4k3Jo25J5xMQspt0MvR-HI1v9RLFp3xTS34apagqa9LnQPJmRmf1TM0kKQpPYWSP9ONlFw_Wj59h1f9806P3qrPKdsxmnj0_AzJPwBahmQFxkhKvnhY0Sb4BCocP5Ta7820iF2MdYv4aOP-Ct5Z8STz8ABUbE0LrhbpcTaOJnSrJf9WwwHr16z6HGcsr7itlusdjuwkZPZTQC2zndFPc2FGtZWHZwmj_FBqmBdLjHDfo4iRCJYM-nXmnFz2xcRM8cPpVUTHgf29VLz_H4yFzkfkGK5HD--I1380z8C1CLrwYwZq77xy9oNlY%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e31db04dc5274e629b009564b799d702&_e=Ml0u0pcwqoLK6oMoyVte7DwfbmUTcQqTkWSs1RewdZBNTzIwFssZqzR7xxVeqSszJWq51jjt2tx7IzrYtmBwHW5fxvawXqI8VYUnrDbybwAFvlTy4Yu4k3Jo25J5xMQspt0MvR-HI1v9RLFp3xTS34apagqa9LnQPJmRmf1TM0kKQpPYWSP9ONlFw_Wj59h1f9806P3qrPKdsxmnj0_AzJPwBahmQFxkhKvnhY0Sb4BCocP5Ta7820iF2MdYv4aOP-Ct5Z8STz8ABUbE0Lrhbjus-0KcHakjZuXkKR86_F_QClAVAdCJEbEYT4a__DZhMLtFu4luMCXhnLx9-D60xLE7cuoKt0Lf1Xe0m2ZAEn4ahAwveRHgrBKshnqudQb7siWKMxzYXdqZmsBKgaEjb6Dq0nnEorRC1Vl_A9v16u8%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

clean_body: | | | | Hey friends, Here’s the real talk for where we stand in Nevada. In a few weeks, our legislative session begins and our chair, DMM, will be barred from fundraising while fighting for Nevada families in Carson City. We need to hold Republicans accountable and build for 2026, with the ground game operation that engages voters early and often, but we’ve spent nearly all our funds on reelecting our Congressional delegation and defending our majorities in the state senate and assembly. Your contributions right now will have an outsized impact for our future victories — helping us make key investments and power our ground game year-round to talk to voters early. LFG, Hilary If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Baldwin
subject: Have you taken our survey yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy wants to hear from you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655)
Peter — Have you taken Tammy’s Post-Election Priorities Survey yet? It’s thanks to this grassroots team that Tammy is headed back to the Senate, where she will keep up the fight to make life better for every Wisconsinite. She couldn’t have done it without you, Peter. **Now, Tammy is counting on you to share your thoughts and help her deliver long-lasting change for people across the country.** **[Please share what’s on your mind with Tammy by taking our Post-Election Priorities Survey. It should only take a quick minute!](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/PostElection_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/PostElection_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655)
---
Tammy’s highest priority in the Senate is fighting for solutions that will serve you and your family, so thank you for sharing your input.
— Team Baldwin
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Baldwin
Date: Fri, Nov 22, 2024
Subject: Our work continues_
Peter — Thanks to your grassroots support, you helped send Tammy back to the Senate, where she's going to continue fighting for ALL Wisconsinites, no matter where they live or who they voted for.
Now, our work continues — to restore reproductive rights, protect Social Security and Medicare, take on corporate greed, and keep building an economy that works for everyone.
As she prepares for her next term in the Senate, Tammy wants to do everything she can to deliver long-lasting change for Wisconsinites and people across the country.
**Nothing is more important to her than making sure she knows what issues matter most to you and your family so that she can fight for solutions in Washington.**
**[Tammy wants to hear from you, Peter. Please take a minute to complete our Post-Election Priorities Survey and share your most pressing concerns with Tammy:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/PostElection_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655)**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/PostElection_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655)
---
Thanks in advance for sharing your thoughts with our team. We’re looking forward to reviewing your responses with Tammy in the coming days.
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4542%2E35263%2ELBS655)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36b97d4bf7b1415cb4f3db32875106a4&_e=1YZykN5p_7-TaqaOVtnCJrPGlsGaSYldvG5SaYovi3bN-BaLaiti_cCjWVfsuOPEhJcYDX_cSLYD59okUFLochBM7HxOZFgEt0gkN_oluwJmWl_qPZx7eTy_K8galudc-OiBkfIs8I-RwxpLeJNBbjSyKdyaRunbs6NCfmKiV6GHm0uRmFywuj3Xuw0GmS5LXLpSaZ7l4KJcdN0ehr2w4LR6jjrqDBXZcSo1G9m1AlL7ujs4gai2XvKG7vel2T39O3z-odB_wKNZCP7cxH2qnl0uGTupfb4skfutbewf3ho5DvCVyJKUyYNEz76kB2eOHK8hwH9iDrcO0o8YazKIqu-3klpGRdWF_X2ZV-4SOtMCJYJ6UQP8NIfk_nQPKB5a), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36b97d4bf7b1415cb4f3db32875106a4&_e=1YZykN5p_7-TaqaOVtnCJrPGlsGaSYldvG5SaYovi3bN-BaLaiti_cCjWVfsuOPEhJcYDX_cSLYD59okUFLochBM7HxOZFgEt0gkN_oluwJmWl_qPZx7eTy_K8galudc-OiBkfIs8I-RwxpLeJNBbjSyKdyaRunbs6NCfmKiV6GHm0uRmFywuj3Xuw0GmS5LXLpSaZ7l4KJcdN0ehr2w4LR6jjrqDBXZcSo1G9m1AlIsy83w6zcFJMcTltt8gjUlVkmO-f8NRB2gqWOgMSDGqLa4qjDd4REbllvpjMfVZNRK6v4BNBk3Eyx_FfMR3VjeBC4yfDbLjpsCxOnNGwNmBXiccsiLtbjF4eKx9NZl9ocKHrNfDMHR1FrZ9QYXAcll) [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36b97d4bf7b1415cb4f3db32875106a4&_e=1YZykN5p_7-TaqaOVtnCJrPGlsGaSYldvG5SaYovi3bN-BaLaiti_cCjWVfsuOPEhJcYDX_cSLYD59okUFLochBM7HxOZFgEt0gkN_oluwJmWl_qPZx7eTy_K8galudc-OiBkfIs8I-RwxpLeJNBbjSyKdyaRunbs6NCfmKiV6GHm0uRmFywuj3Xuw0GmS5LXLpSaZ7l4KJcdN0ehr2w4LR6jjrqDBXZcSo1G9m1AlJroAvYWio5N-FeS37cDlckmkG8lAoDdrwd-gN86b6bBYOANEjJdu5ISmxkrwsarGNfWfzTuotPOnc8hCsp06pR2GCamLZMILdGDQ5fYSGLoX2rtO1DsNZPWp2O7NBvWm66sP6xl6wmXL9xJ-XwVwJh) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36b97d4bf7b1415cb4f3db32875106a4&_e=1YZykN5p_7-TaqaOVtnCJrPGlsGaSYldvG5SaYovi3bN-BaLaiti_cCjWVfsuOPEhJcYDX_cSLYD59okUFLochBM7HxOZFgEt0gkN_oluwJmWl_qPZx7eTy_K8galudc-OiBkfIs8I-RwxpLeJNBbjSyKdyaRunbs6NCfmKiV6GHm0uRmFywuj3Xuw0GmS5LXLpSaZ7l4KJcdN0ehr2w4LR6jjrqDBXZcSo1G9m1AlIf1JqA9PHquxcJdmANLzmSysYU5gJUv67EsdBuAvoXdRNo4B-bxw9eewKdW6-VkqJqUix_U9KOEKVVSJVZH7USFsY7a-49bOm9bQpaG1JonVp89mIQC4CniWlG6L7LBZ1ifBFljKKYfjtmzRAAmQpg) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36b97d4bf7b1415cb4f3db32875106a4&_e=1YZykN5p_7-TaqaOVtnCJrPGlsGaSYldvG5SaYovi3bN-BaLaiti_cCjWVfsuOPEhJcYDX_cSLYD59okUFLochBM7HxOZFgEt0gkN_oluwJmWl_qPZx7eTy_K8galudc-OiBkfIs8I-RwxpLeJNBbjSyKdyaRunbs6NCfmKiV6GHm0uRmFywuj3Xuw0GmS5LXLpSaZ7l4KJcdN0ehr2w4LR6jjrqDBXZcSo1G9m1AlISq29H4sm8kzaoGBAmfR1tZbycsfa_GqgkLF6M4ynwcolKV0a4UuYuGaODV1y46enRZSETW5ac_tEqvcmSimlIMncac_wkiDxP-UJQeYXpwFAH8u1itcANCjGcU81Jcqldeg4AiyNm8zFFBgkyS6Z8)

clean_body: When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Justice for All? Or just some?
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – History was made. President Trump’s overwhelming victory proves one thing: the American people are ready for **bold leadership** and **fearless action**.
But there’s a dark cloud that we cannot ignore.
**The men and women who stood up on January 6th, 2021, have been targeted relentlessly by a corrupt system desperate to crush their voices.**
These patriots deserve our gratitude—not persecution.
**__[That’s why I’m demanding immediate action: a full pardon for every American wrongfully prosecuted for standing up for what they believed in.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**

[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
These aren’t criminals—they’re **citizens**. **Fathers**. **Mothers**. **Veterans**. **Neighbors**. _**The very fabric of our great nation.**_
They gathered at the Capitol to exercise their rights, **_and now they need us to exercise ours_**.
This is more than a petition— _**_[it’s a fight for our freedom](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**_. A fight against a government that thinks it can silence you.

What was done to those brave men & women on that day proves one thing:
The Deep State doesn’t just want to silence you... **They want to erase you**. They want to watch you sit in prison, and smear anybody who would stand up to them over it.
I won’t be silenced, and I will _**never**_ stop fighting for what’s right. I’m reaching out to you, Friend, because I know... _**you feel the same**_.
[SIGN THE OFFICIAL J6 PARDON PETITION NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_For Freedom_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaG/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| |
---

_[Unsubscribe from this list](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9AaH/?__vbtrk=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY0Mjc2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f41e7f02d4848f2b52d7adaf502d5b9&_e=C1Wgf66lYdFP0Eq89wF-My-PS2OUcWrDX6gCKoHFI5audgDd2MfPBWt-MopnJ1JqHDiZm0W4_aLsiaHyQZk-39-Raq7LfMiGC5WR_KB9dPHhSpTWyBJYhTF1Ma1xQ-ILO43NFb3sp0XxdMQOVBdx_brUvF88I0nP25SmbgGhIohAVhovgTdz39kK1LUjvZ9hpYio8WAq2wQrxYpRbINF0rSLfzaLJKIdAL4r00kr2wJSFWfJShPCC3k_Tfjhe0h6oB5qVTt32KH4-7CNSCDdDssuruSM1p4TjPdxbbnaTf1h-zGMyBP91dl4kRr3r4giVct-cVT-DZ4DR7VskutMHWlL03X3ACn5QqfsxbW26ycyeUNd-MavWWymjNFPA88Xjswl1KlKjGCjZ2fqxYlDx9-O8xg41WQb8jEKJiHyD1U%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f41e7f02d4848f2b52d7adaf502d5b9&_e=C1Wgf66lYdFP0Eq89wF-My-PS2OUcWrDX6gCKoHFI5audgDd2MfPBWt-MopnJ1JqHDiZm0W4_aLsiaHyQZk-39-Raq7LfMiGC5WR_KB9dPHhSpTWyBJYhTF1Ma1xQ-ILO43NFb3sp0XxdMQOVBdx_brUvF88I0nP25SmbgGhIohAVhovgTdz39kK1LUjvZ9hpYio8WAq2wQrxYpRbINF0rSLfzaLJKIdAL4r00kr2wJSFWfJShPCC3k_Tfjhe0h6oB5qVTt32KH4-7CNSCDdDn6hC81_Lc9nE-sNHcnUfbHR30YznYo0nVnqPLKYlS_s6UuqeGEaSfvyPfpe-nAD1cSTHe173Q26sl4D6Fepgp-B32jHuuiQfQ66cVeIuIAPq0SGpRUOLUQUkRrmYWVETiI6cTBSLqJUHr4AL2cmNxU%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f41e7f02d4848f2b52d7adaf502d5b9&_e=C1Wgf66lYdFP0Eq89wF-My-PS2OUcWrDX6gCKoHFI5audgDd2MfPBWt-MopnJ1JqHDiZm0W4_aLsiaHyQZk-39-Raq7LfMiGC5WR_KB9dPHhSpTWyBJYhTF1Ma1xQ-ILO43NFb3sp0XxdMQOVBdx_brUvF88I0nP25SmbgGhIohAVhovgTdz39kK1LUjvZ9hpYio8WAq2wQrxYpRbINF0rSLfzaLJKIdAL4r00kr2wJSFWfJShPCC3k_Tfjhe0h6oB5qVTt32KH4-7CNSCDdDkDLoUpkb8MDJUBiunLq2wOB5J1EVNleJHjskIfYo1BquvnsgTptVY5m9LrQ1HqXhTNjtIw7XL_aBqGj-VFtE6rbWc_i7TDA6St_bOTPHlJpws8OsHGtPyBeXpA3YKaQ4UnTcYUkgll1gSKjHYOtinE%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=4f41e7f02d4848f2b52d7adaf502d5b9&_t=dCW2I4iDsj7C_2W3MZTCdQpcHIpjMTZREhkfJ9uUcczcQD_B1rwDHxEdMNSkEZtq1RkvEZZTPZp7dVmI3bjEvEMLnxPMtaiPJUsoyL5mTqQGwEI3KCRiCc1E91ldGal-czQONDWDp2Z3im4NbxwJpXKybqzsstmxp_Dfo634xOM%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f41e7f02d4848f2b52d7adaf502d5b9&_e=1q5ju2-d_VngvVQU3JzmXjkk8R8vqLFgivEaKaj2ZftVa1gn6qp60qASHps3tga7X2PG451PAXV3555ALswjUTAZCZUYGC8_uLRauPUt5y-XM-jBPJ7S4LqTiXaYmLmLigZWKb9OL08lPqHT1ux40kgTQBLVW9eEuVeNbG_oL3g5ZAbZKUpm-isQjlXLQZMCdas3VHda8N_7J0cih_EMkH1FwDSZen4dmn3fcy2hox-cnzqZIa_yyyVAD4TR2dU-iu8u7s0XRY18uWaE_RVHmCzIm_Pn99GcStnU8-2P3Ns%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f41e7f02d4848f2b52d7adaf502d5b9&_e=C1Wgf66lYdFP0Eq89wF-M0PDQC1d5K84F2eSQlCeIokUFDC7-kD5uhetYhC3EKBDIVKSUlmfaQ9LZNfLIlMR7z0bALDZUDW05Tdnh6ySnJ_NSIIiGGwtF7i77SHuJT-RV3FAII7YCG53AJXdDtnwDFknuLxdrsTOnLUwE2i2VPQNe4fK3_75v-rQaOwWjcaZmjmWoEr0dlElLcEtUhYQ6XM6QUVio_mQpFx3GyQFuqc%3D)_

| | | Republicans in Congress have once again blocked the ethics report on Matt Gaetz from being released to the public. The lengthy report details an investigation into Gaetz's felony crimes, sexual misconduct, sexual trafficking, drug use, and God only knows what else. Republicans think they can bury this report since Gaetz withdrew his bid for Trump’s Attorney General and resigned from Congress. But Gaetz is still close to Trump – and who knows what office he’ll run for in the future! The public deserves to know what’s in that report. [**Sign to tell Republicans in Congress to stop being such cowards and RELEASE the Matt Gaetz ethics report >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td62e82f2-7c39-4593-92f9-a11b80f17fe6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: MAGA Victory Prize
subject: We still have a plane ticket reserved for Pres. Trump’s HISTORIC inauguration!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defending America's Future
body:

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Stand with me and fight back against the radical transgender movement
body:
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkArFFZUEw843s1YHVl32k61evsoJ8xO1vjA0_1C-G2obt7DZicC9qdNAP4KguwFRWgVkvuxF7SZbfQvWrp64LY7Dey_JwfaulU_YuMJ6yNUnJnA9XOiCjMGLPHP2OeA9SSUtj1WLsBJY38etalRe-MwF0sb18JUk2ube4G6Ooo-jg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkCCQHMXs9mnAXKu5IbD7u4WjkoKNkBVtu1CZ0JLfmNRjjuCH_dmRMUPnIOoctmynXHEbLued8mPHZdzrQ8_QnRZ2FYYgE0fodBrlFsTwz34kqiV55IL8Mh6g8KkZt804KJFXMrEUVYjbPQjm3gvyGw4z6iZQzZ764XSWSerLaXScg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkAJtb51vza2yzfZzaiD2GVEaFDW7eElo13gmIZsSK9fL-YOTahc2b6GyGFseMD_eQjBj5Ay1zpy1FxlSgwUsVtxrz8uigUBVFawdrggvK9rw1RRwA7Gktb7AMqS_ZkIhd22GoTjNQNMOVbybSoW67DOg1rY1ikY-OcrP05xHn8TRw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkCr4WtBLkiVw-2JCyAK28ls1SU83m_KLpL1SyFvQKt2AaBtsb3gsa0mqkOMbtatSYzLsjizeCDoEIASietscVpLEY7B96PyJEVwX--RGBCEwHBhTWTrQ93yVtN_ObEzDIUjmvLClkca07X5lookSNThBY1zrzHLS5XpGO7wwlVU5w%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkBr-PX3HovjstXcWzvT4BehxgfQTI6-Fzv9ZpIgrGqlIdFqkfBJ583bDS-GEruu7M1od_8x6Ls0BdE4vBI66SUXROkcw1uP26NCZ42iyK5b63mNYshRHsn_X8NzBEbJVSXg0KD0hUjNhVNAicmxJ94nbL52BgsFJCabiY-J6ogaWg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkAYdJHPOwJjXzzBKlSWq0Jf-HhnzdK6qj68oB92altc-ZWsC_-LIl-sYxsCiUlqOOAnvGWPoPcwMd3a7H4uBeAE5X-CWzC_qqgyyTKBlA_n8oUsxGD6MXOMqnRZIErFsDaAMMa5EbDU3E7DuYssn-OpilN2Z3KYtFmBmlXtr1nlfQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkAqBMtxhmYdgL4rw_6IhnNzh8q4iaKKTxvy376pTjX4-mle54TuQIBYxp_sxHLwBiXilwXbYoD4OE6JPgisyVPHc6Nn4Z9n_jKPi0lGP8kVP_46XTrTTpq1gHQEgOHZKQ0Dgy1zzKgKi2saMPln6MMGCuH3xFcBmGNUFNy0JylAkQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkAb334y7Pl05dcSLlm5bhROq_YJORWh3bblcfqYBGwcGsOUpYOD23bcnkw_8rED6JSGlz_Y4ViBVub9REmyHLskblpQn8RzfHNRayBuscp2DaWQixH4a8E3taG_xoUc42GpcXCp8CisHF0Xo2j3ev4yX6UtJVFaY_Rqkc5ac7oi-Q%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkAnWqRTyG6SFT4c6oWhFKH1RFkysRrZJMtb1D3baGVg6Jxrsnbs78IytRKcL3EgxV56263oc82v1xUmSLJutbVw7p0Le6rTXVOIfH5pZ5IdNiQJaGn1gP4hg34pWWJqO6B22vMPFpLgAQHDOt513NJ-naEOjt0q4f8e0aKqZwlSyA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkA2eCd9mqMikghBrqX6JRsAI-fTg_wzA-tRkM2SdarJE7UX-TxKv4YGuUgRz3zJRkh7vxdQafWhA2L-AXRLSaaG6nEmkvhFM9s3VTfy-ZeW6-sWouTt_kaOTI4MHiOvNZggthPTj_UleLvepP5yMBEeWouUzbVNqpPGtl6rdN8dJA%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkCCQHMXs9mnAXKu5IbD7u4WWbUBHPOYdkwyM1IJJh29VOjaWy146RAetFhsqk2_T7OST0FjCsvwjSz0eU1uQ4Zqujtai34yqpsh0M0Dds8zPPVzGTU3xZVouQTvCRyxbYEKolEoPfS76asNhdBAFZ39bWEwDfy-KWyLCvQu4atw9g%3D%3D)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=667964bd07454154acf27c47759e3889&_e=yRQNRMNk5hfsvJV5ml-FHyrvvlGY3MXfoQexnCwnuVWdxiWiUx-fxPoMKKl5Tits7c1n3BnODll0CUmiPtq14BZnTrBX0ivmX3a1whmna6w08voQfJygWpkkXtdhSow9hg32cuvKrR60ybZdeU5I6cXcwUbCash91rvtGbmxqcFCF_W925I_3F-cpHnmKc-gVnMpwN65dKYL_rm7zCBH3WoU9a-pk_TkE19_wdHtfkCCQHMXs9mnAXKu5IbD7u4W0UDm8XLAtKCsRkjBvFkdVOPtHUkChCquvQl9T-1AYuyNcseloMQaR1gj-B12Dbc-Ypsu-dEg6OHHL3CURaEBuQ8jyytCGcozlzlckilgDJ1dT6mqunhBe8uCoP62wIXlE9bH7AgXkcVuvFV7MpS0_Q%3D%3D)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."

clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Voting rights in the states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
NPR: With the Voting Rights Act facing more threats, advocates renew a push for state laws [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120924_2&amount=25]
Team, you don't need us to remind you about all the assaults on the Voting Rights Act. From Supreme Court cases to state laws and the recent 8th circuit ruling that citizens don't have a right to sue for their right to vote, the last decade-plus has been one attack after another.
That's why we've so quickly turned our focus to the state legislative sessions that kick off next month. Several states have enacted state-level voting rights acts over the past two decades, and Michigan is working hard to be next.
2025 is going to be a huge battleground for our right to vote. With attacks likely at the federal level in all three branches of government, our opportunities to go on offense will be in the states. We have to pass state laws wherever we can to defend and expand our right to vote while fighting suppressive legislation in states like Florida, Georgia, Texas, and more.
We're already hard at work and have a goal of raising $50,000 from grassroots donors to help mobilize and defend voting rights before state legislative sessions start in just a few weeks.
Team: Will you fuel our work and chip in $25 or more to help reach our important fundraising goal before December 31? >> >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=120924_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=120924_2&amount=25]

These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What will we do in heaven?
body:
How can we be sure that heaven exists?
How can we be sure that heaven exists?
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=4c6a7f11727e4e3d8abc4826c7ce3145&_t=2XsoLryq1lZ4OauwEHV3ltC99LPUwRDT6xfN16IDZJ59hpdz1_L5N8OYRJ53kGwuOrzfb7lLZqMgixltdm36e-vEZ5gj0nfA54zcl0lmVkuFMuyduu15kJDDJ5xPVs1K)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4c6a7f11727e4e3d8abc4826c7ce3145&_e=wbKT2x8lmngD2NXzX3tiFv1KJa3NGl5zaqJTqD3Q7k-CImH0iu7Ud3CfQ92Bn1ShAs1O-aILDxt_VsocSqeLdNKe6KoawVWTMiXrdRieQAqaK35_IPdYPrzhkTcIkq6Yamj3CNQvpn5bLDYiSxPbNmznbj4K8kNufDgOvYPQ7dn2rElKci0qcH-0PQdpoUC9iJjJK8QcZ1twwVafsQZoCPJX2Ih76YgM6E9F4A8dVIEuPWmWIAOOr3XzBnVeaG0CRFKpnGkvSd3i9mvNldrqFVV3FIp8iD6hzHhiz4KR9-pTCH1IzG5zpdxa3hepMKoqbki7fmDHPLW9sBrjV_pt4r5Oh9k6xNy6yP-fFBNjei4xoW5eJ25qoe3daoeloQZLPDjKtpJeyDd5rZoS6S_Yr0pMpZLJqF7m-5HEYjvKuKg%3D)
Hi Friend,

_How can we be sure that heaven exists?_

It's a question that has crossed the minds of many. Is heaven just a comforting idea to help us get through life, or is it a real, tangible place where we will one day dwell?

The good news is that the Bible gives us clear answers. Jesus Himself said, "_I go to prepare a place for you ... I will come again and receive you to myself, that where I am, there you may be also_" (John 14:2-3). Heaven is a real destination for those who trust in Christ, and it's where we will spend eternity with God.

But what do we really know about this place? What will we do there? Will we recognize our loved ones?

In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, offering a clear biblical picture of our eternal home, including:
* What Will We Do in Heaven?
* Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
* How Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?
* And several more

This resource will encourage you and help you prepare for the ultimate destination God has promised.

For your gift of any amount to _Pathway to Victory_ , I'd love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_. I pray that this book will give you a greater sense of peace and excitement about the future and a renewed focus on living for eternity today.

Get your copy here: [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4c6a7f11727e4e3d8abc4826c7ce3145&_e=wbKT2x8lmngD2NXzX3tiFv1KJa3NGl5zaqJTqD3Q7k-CImH0iu7Ud3CfQ92Bn1ShAs1O-aILDxt_VsocSqeLdNKe6KoawVWTMiXrdRieQAqaK35_IPdYPrzhkTcIkq6Yamj3CNQvpn5bLDYiSxPbNmznbj4K8kNufDgOvYPQ7dn2rElKci0qcH-0PQdpoUC9iJjJK8QcZ1twwVafsQZoCPJX2Ih76YgM6E9F4A8dVIEuPWmWIAOOr3XzBnVeaG0CsVLKGRUNdsNnwqvwxHlpVgbFh90vE5ULo3O4pucSVvEllfaeDQbVwta7Eq3ThlNE6j-8Zn4zM1pD-xwJJnSMv51RoeWefL7y9QXurUgjTohWCVbh_EkqN11Z2qe10E2Z-u0F2x_5p-GcHze1pbLBCzXCA856Iq_6_eIL3qOx714%3D)

Thank you for your partnership in sharing the hope of Christ with the world!

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your generous gift of $125 or more, I'll send you not only the book but a companion gift book called _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , as well as our ministry-exclusive brochure, the sermon message series on DVD and MP3 audio, and _A Place Called Heaven for Kids_ --a beautifully illustrated book designed to help children understand their eternal home with Jesus. Click here to claim your resources: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-mega-kit-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=4c6a7f11727e4e3d8abc4826c7ce3145&_e=wbKT2x8lmngD2NXzX3tiFv1KJa3NGl5zaqJTqD3Q7k-CImH0iu7Ud3CfQ92Bn1ShAs1O-aILDxt_VsocSqeLdNKe6KoawVWTMiXrdRieQAqaK35_IPdYPrzhkTcIkq6Yamj3CNQvpn5bLDYiSxPbNmznbj4K8kNufDgOvYPQ7dn2rElKci0qcH-0PQdpoUC9iJjJK8QcZ1twwVafsQZoCPJX2Ih76YgM6E9F4A8dVIEuPWmWIAOOr3XzBnVeaG0CQhtAZ0tzEu6HN8HJdath9CDlvFh_K8JTe3Q3fk32KjRlgkKODe0Vb67n2vAkdMTDoQnqgHfr4LreMOUcIPjGuwGVTtceyApQ2_vH3AevyGKWz8TwSmhkiszSJ0HGfx1oLlsDnf90d9dt5YVZi7P5u56inExDrugEtSQKn3lJO-U%3D)

For your gift of any amount to Pathway to Victory , I'd love to send you a copy of A Place Called Heaven. I pray that this book will give you a greater sense of peace and excitement about the future and a renewed focus on living for eternity today. Get your copy here: Thank you for your partnership in sharing the hope of Christ with the world! Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. - For your generous gift of $125 or more, I'll send you not only the book but a companion gift book called Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven , as well as our ministry-exclusive brochure, the sermon message series on DVD and MP3 audio, and A Place Called Heaven for Kids --a beautifully illustrated book designed to help children understand their eternal home with Jesus. Click here to claim your resources: . | |

subject: We’ll be honest with you…

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Reflections on service: in memory of Fmr State Rep Marie Howe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
I'm saddened to share with you that former State Representative Marie Howe passed away earlier this month. Her life was a shining example of the impact we can have on the people around us when we commit ourselves to public service, and the necessity of that service is something I've been reflecting on recently.
Marie was a lifelong resident of Somerville and was unwavering in her dedication to working on behalf of her neighbors. She served as the State Representative for the 31st Middlesex District from 1965 to 1988, and during her laudable three decades she spent fighting on behalf of her community on Beacon Hill she built a true legacy of public service.
Marie fought on behalf of consumers, pushing for transparency and fair practices in automobile purchases. She fought on behalf of women, serving as co-chair of the newly formed Massachusetts Caucus of Women Legislators in 1975, during a time when there were 16 women total in the House and Senate.
She fought on behalf of human rights, advocating for an end to the harmful treatment of citizens in Northern Ireland during the troubles, even protesting a visit from the Royal Family. She defended her Sri Lankan constituents and in 1981 filed a resolution on behalf of Sri Lanka Tamils living in Somerville.
In her eighty-five years of life, Marie never shied away from her commitment to humanity, at home in Somerville and around the world. As we mourn her passing, we must celebrate her life and look to her as an example as we navigate this new era in our nation's history. Let us all aspire to be as unflinching and unapologetic an advocate for all of our neighbors as Marie Howe was. Let us never be quieted when we raise our voices to speak on behalf of those who are fighting to be heard.
If you wish to commemorate her life of service, donations may be made in Marie’s memory to the Tunnels to Towers Foundation at T2T.org [t2t.org] . You can also leave messages of condolences to her family here [https://www.dohertyfuneralservice.com/obituary/marie-howe] .
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, I'm saddened to share with you that former State Representative Marie Howe passed away earlier this month. Her life was a shining example of the impact we can have on the people around us when we commit ourselves to public service, and the necessity of that service is something I've been reflecting on recently. Marie was a lifelong resident of Somerville and was unwavering in her dedication to working on behalf of her neighbors. She served as the State Representative for the 31st Middlesex District from 1965 to 1988, and during her laudable three decades she spent fighting on behalf of her community on Beacon Hill she built a true legacy of public service. Marie fought on behalf of consumers, pushing for transparency and fair practices in automobile purchases. She fought on behalf of women, serving as co-chair of the newly formed Massachusetts Caucus of Women Legislators in 1975, during a time when there were 16 women total in the House and Senate. She fought on behalf of human rights, advocating for an end to the harmful treatment of citizens in Northern Ireland during the troubles, even protesting a visit from the Royal Family. She defended her Sri Lankan constituents and in 1981 filed a resolution on behalf of Sri Lanka Tamils living in Somerville. In her eighty-five years of life, Marie never shied away from her commitment to humanity, at home in Somerville and around the world. As we mourn her passing, we must celebrate her life and look to her as an example as we navigate this new era in our nation's history. Let us all aspire to be as unflinching and unapologetic an advocate for all of our neighbors as Marie Howe was. Let us never be quieted when we raise our voices to speak on behalf of those who are fighting to be heard. If you wish to commemorate her life of service, donations may be made in Marie’s memory to the Tunnels to Towers Foundation at T2T.org [t2t.org] . You can also leave messages of condolences to her family here [] . Onward, [] Steve Kerrigan Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party [] [] [] [] Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
