Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkLuOnTAQhp_GdBz5wsFQuIiE6DZtSmuwB7DWNsgedqM8fbTopEq17T8Xfd__682-QYghbz8hoaFCtlR7nGS36D-BSuvK9addCsK7lVx2rZAtH61ovOm09Kpv0AitlNad0qLZzeq513pYRj88R8T1OXAthsXDAnxVTjXBfP0Rko9i7IRUD-jk6sTTy6UfBfqBdRwiFqoP2rHgeS0xOMiEkB7uSE00O9FZmfrB5MzkXNFdBR-Q0R_0tcHkvB03PpY25EqBLkIm5xNacBSOfFsxNV-UrIN0QtgyU9M_MCb7e3JkwkxMTVTolSX04UpMTQU_6g4FX3k9ruKQqemE_6_xN9kY8rtoivHnZ4gx1F6zjm8JQryl6Dvdfxj5NwAA__9e8ZJb)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkL2OnTAQhZ_GdCA89oVL4SISotu0Ka3BngVrbYPsYTfK00eLNlWqbc_86PvOrxf7giGGvP3ERIYL21LtcbLdov9ALq0r1592LYRvFnrQrYS2n6xsvNEjeDU0ZOSo1DhqNcpmN6vWpKGnB41eeg1OESjq8fEKT_d0UxPM5x8J_SQnLUF1qOHVyYeHdZgk-afQPUYqXDveqdB5rTE4zEyYOnekJpqd-axC_RCwCFgquatQh5n8wZ8bApbtuPGptCFXDnwxCVhObNFxOPJtJdRycbIO04lhy0LN_8AEDPfkyEyZhZq58FeWyIcrCTUXeq87FvrK63EVR0LNJ_5_Tb_ZxpDfoCnGnx8hxlCHUeh-SxjiLcXf6f7dwN8AAAD__8QVkek)

**School Choice** Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense.

The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts.

Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them.

The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality.

clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It’s so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute’s latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn’t have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don’t have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
you’re one of only a handful of supporters selected to sign
| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries: “House Democrats Will Take a Blowtorch to Project 2025”** Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats — and with major special elections coming up, _he could be our SPEAKER!_

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**We’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow. We need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85324?t=6&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85324?t=7&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85324?t=8&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

Republicans’ already slim majority is SHRINKING as Trump picks more MAGA members to serve in his cabinet — meaning we can flip the House NEXT YEAR!

As the GOP tries to take a blowtorch to Social Security, Medicare, reproductive rights, and more, I know we can stop them with you leading the way.

**Your strength gives me hope that Democrats can win critical special elections, put a MASSIVE check on Donald Trump’s power, and make you our next SPEAKER!**

[**So today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation for all your hard work and to help Democrats flip the seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85324?t=9&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85324?t=10&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85325?t=11&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18171%2E878179%2E6zZ632)

name: Brian Lenney
subject: announcement
body:
|
---
| | Quick update...

Since the 2024 primary election, I've been reassessing where I invest my energy.

As a legislator, father of four homeschooled children, husband, and business owner, it's become painfully clear that I need to eliminate all distractions and focus on what truly matters. Earlier this year, I took the first step by severing ties with the libertarian-esque Young Americans for Liberty group and the chaos-driven DC-based State Freedom Caucus Network. These groups seemed more focused on causing trouble and "being loud" than helping legislators achieve tangible results.

Given the limited time we have on this planet, I'm convinced it's crucial to cut out distractions and reclaim time wherever possible. That’s why I'm stepping away from the Idaho Freedom Caucus, effective immediately.

_I want to make it clear that my decision isn't due to any wrongdoing or bad blood between members, etc. _

The Idaho Freedom Caucus has consistently championed the advancement of conservative values, which I hold in high regard and I'll continue to work with them to promote these ideals in Idaho.

This decision is strictly a personal choice to better manage my time and commitments—full stop.

Cheers,

Brian

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&t=b&e=dea908e0fe&c=602df237e4).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b6b718539d&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**

---

To celebrate our WINNING MOMENTUM, I want to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. Thanks to patriots like YOU, Turning Point Action: built the FIRST and LARGEST ballot-chasing initiative on the right with CHASE THE VOTE, registered thousands of voters, chased hundreds of thousands of ballots, and reached millions online with our Pro-America message, and WON BIG for AMERICA FIRST on Election Day, November 5! Now it's time to CELEBRATE our HISTORIC VICTORY -- and keep up our INCREDIBLE MOMENTUM so we can continue WINNING BIG in 2025 and beyond! Every time you put on this "47" hat, you will show that YOU are part of the PRO-AMERICA Movement that helped True Conservative Leaders like President DONALD TRUMP WIN BIG in 2024... ...and that grassroots patriots are ready to work together through Turning Point Action to KEEP WINNING in 2025 and beyond! ** Thank YOU for your patriotism and your commitment to SAVE AMERICA in 2024 and beyond. Now let's get back to work to fight for President TRUMP's AMERICA FIRST agenda! I went from serving in the United States Marine Corps to serving the Establishment their _**PINK SLIP**_.

This is Bill Spadea.

When I was serving our country as a Marine, _**I never imagined I 'd be running for governor of New Jersey.**_

But I knew I had to step up when I saw how _**DISASTROUS**_ the Democrats and Establishment Republicans were treating our state.
**

There were two things I knew for sure:**
_

We need to**BOOT OUT** the political elites who only care about themselves...

_ _And we need to put**NEW JERSEY FIRST**._

I'm the outsider the Democrats and the Establishment are _**TERRIFIED**_ of, and they're throwing everything they've got at me to stop this movement.

They want to **SILENCE** us and **DESTROY** the fight for freedom in New Jersey.

That's why I need you to join me and send a message **LOUD AND CLEAR** :

Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/P2N5vqclRxypQ6EngTsxPg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOdWgP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9nb2xkd2F0ZXItaW5zdGl0dXRlL3BhLWFjdGlvbi1jcnV6P3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwOSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1yZXZzaGFyZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazFXA3NwY0IKZ1XUTFdneOx_4VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | ~ Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. ~ The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. ~ ~ ~ ~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. ~ ~ ~ ~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Inmate Number P01135780
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump.
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b3c6004ded544bfaa79c581b5efbb41&_e=Z3OB0fQmsYFIl7c9PkQSSQyEr5PvvD61rzveZKw046RT6N-khTKsatboYfz_gItUM9gQ1QuialoG8jIaVdergBau5f5BEJAkvNs-bdbSi3LGTSLJtMDi9wOvui8MOILcKOQoMLgCJr0NlwjuAOSDOqhx6JMUmJU6fhW67DWwhuJO4tC5vvuH5vB8n3wIiEqwz3Nro1fT17VaI2cGKpXnHen2XxgrLnzSFrG8f7q2W-DZ51ZGI7aCZCsG_BxNqBiQ5aG3Y8R5U1Cn1B6ZNf_GfggqobnfB0lqZNEaeYRg-p7sneg8fylzzpkMTf3wpky6oybkRQSlqBdCGwZqO5YJkLDd3IuqgjUjNJy5WjK4rNVxhu5daOOiYZPYKWHxOsmB)
---
Dear Friend,
---
There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is _still_ trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE.
---
Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going.
---
According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the _NY Post_ , **_“she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.”_**
---
How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard _facts_.
---
_But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free._
---
**“‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee”**
---
[SOURCE: _Law & Crime_]
---
When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as **Inmate Number _P01135780_**.
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5b3c6004ded544bfaa79c581b5efbb41&_e=Z3OB0fQmsYFIl7c9PkQSSQyEr5PvvD61rzveZKw046RT6N-khTKsatboYfz_gItUM9gQ1QuialoG8jIaVdergBau5f5BEJAkvNs-bdbSi3LGTSLJtMDi9wOvui8MOILcKOQoMLgCJr0NlwjuAOSDOqhx6JMUmJU6fhW67DWwhuJO4tC5vvuH5vB8n3wIiEqwz3Nro1fT17VaI2cGKpXnHen2XxgrLnzSFrG8f7q2W-DwFKVO3AU6rfv_te4E3Hmr7AO2xbhkhSfbiZDClSczHmoxluecDO1UcYBV6ZBRo0c5zDOyfNLwX10hJRWphwPGG8d-5rof3KG00GyVoKenqe53flM0O4SSKYYUhKXmqnxwx-IWnSCqlhyfWVwxeE3Z)
__
---
**In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.”**
---
And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York!
---
_(Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please don’t even think twice!)_
---

clean_body: There’s one prosecutor who is still after me and President Trump. | Dear Friend, There is ONE remaining prosecutor who is still trying to put both President Trump and myself behind bars for LIFE. Fani Willis – the left-wing DA in Atlanta who arrested me and President Trump in one of the most violent jails in America – just got re-elected and feels empowered to keep her witch hunt going. According to one local defense lawyer quoted in the NY Post , “she’s going full tilt with vengeance and emotions.” How far has our Republic fallen that “emotions” and “vengeance” now control our legal system rather than the Constitution, blind justice, the presumption of innocence, and the cold hard facts. But after the watchdog group Judicial Watch stepped in, Fani’s witch hunt may soon fall apart – and the President-Elect and I may walk free. “‘It is undisputed’: Fani Willis harshly chastised by judge for violating open records laws in lawsuit seeking her communications with Jack Smith and Jan. 6 committee” [SOURCE: Law & Crime] When Fani had President Trump and myself arrested, I was registered as Inmate Number P01135780. In Fani’s eyes, the “P” stood for “prisoner.” But, as an innocent man fighting for his freedom, to me the “P” stands for “PATRIOT.” And if YOU are a patriot too, then I am humbly asking for your last-minute support now that we stand on the cusp of WINNING this despicable case that has been a travesty of justice. Not only am I fighting for my freedom in this case, I’m fighting for my freedom in Arizona and against a punitive $148 MILLION judgment in New York! (Of course, if you cannot make a contribution at this time, please don’t even think twice!) Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

clean_body: Please forgive me for sending you a long email. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz Friend, Please forgive me for sending you a long email. But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. Low-income families should not be stuck in failing school districts, and all parents should have the option to take their kids out of schools indoctrinating them in leftist nonsense. The Goldwater Institute is a trailblazer in advocating for school choice and parental rights. Goldwater not only fights for school choice in the legislature, but they also protect school choice in the courts. Through their efforts, Arizona was the first state to pass universal school choice, giving all families access to the educational options most suitable to them. The Goldwater Institute’s exemplary school choice legislation set a precedent for the rest of the nation. Goldwater has assisted Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia in implementing universal school choice programs, and they have no intention of stopping until school choice is a nationwide reality. Defeating DEI Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion is a new woke cult sweeping our institutions, particularly our universities. It’s so out of hand that universities are now making pledges to DEI principles as part of their faculty hiring process. Defeating DEI is the Goldwater Institute’s latest initiative. Their legislative plan is simple: Public universities will be explicitly prohibited from using political tests to screen out applicants in any admissions, hiring, or promotion-related decision or from granting preferential consideration to applicants for their support of partisan, political, or ideological beliefs. In summary, the legislation will eliminate the use of DEI in schools. Now is the time to step on the throttle and defeat the cultural Marxists. The Goldwater Institute needs your help today, friend. I am personally asking you to donate any amount you can to the Goldwater Institute and help me raise $50,000 for them. They are on the frontlines in the battles most important to conservatives. Please select an amount today to rush your support.** The Goldwater Institute doesn’t have woke billionaires or corporations supporting them. They don’t have the media on their side. There are no Hollywood movies that support this cause. They rely on the support of like-minded individuals like you to fund their programs. Thank you for your time and your continued support. Ted Cruz The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. name: Allegiance Gold
subject: Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?
body:
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) | **[How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts?

](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)Banks don’t need your permission to legally seize your deposits. **This is how you can protect your savings. [**Learn More**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
---|---
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) | [**BRICS Plans to End US Dollar Dominance**

](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)The anti-dollar drive spearheaded by China and Russia is spreading quickly. **Can this "Evil" plan be a threat to your wealth?** [**Learn More**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) | **[New Leadership, Same Financial Risks?](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**
The dust has settled, but the economic risks haven't. **Discover what you need to know to shield your financial future.**
[**Learn More**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)****

**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. That is why we are giving you the[**free Wealth Education Guide**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.), in addition to **FREE $250** worth of silver with any qualified purchase above $10,000.

This guide is a valuable resource that shows you how to navigate these turbulent times and make informed decisions about your financial future. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**
[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

[](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

---
* * *

| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4f87f9bdf7cc4d4e8f60b7157dc5a30e&_e=Y15pz545hw4L37MYbGRS4FIIQezByqM0kqL9ZgwbaxJ4K3kMQK8wuUn82iL3bHKErW7K97pAEuwxeOOdQGbXht5T7217zvvlBULOLnPMLbE1tEhgZAuAG4GbEEvknvJD-XcY0afX3ZweIDQA5Rx2GtWR9T_HnojtR0LZp_a11uhH3kIaHAtgq6eCJMnBbbxs5UkktHYog_iN2mTlxGs_eGrDJYV8riK9_6w6fTZAYmy61FdYeSqAKKkyYHzfIq8MtyWKPw_lXz6ZhX2BpJ32Xgd3VLI9SLOjUCe-gZPZhGP0_hPdkmzsGOL_p5zoY_lblSHlQufzDezORCdY0kdFJqLxphXZm25AJFRKCd6dm9rfN_FrZ2nHB48Tehrmm3XkHXoakZxlR1Y2QChHqTe_vw%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. That’s why I wanted to take a moment to share exactly what I plan to fight for during my first term. I’m committed to delivering on the promises I made during my campaign: **Lowering costs:** I’ll work to reduce the cost of prescription drugs, housing, childcare, and other essential expenses. I’m ready to work across the aisle to _deliver real results for our Mid-Michigan families._ **Cutting taxes for working families** : In the state Senate, I passed the largest tax cut for working families in Michigan history. And in Congress, I’ll continue fighting to cut taxes for working people — not millionaires. **Creating good-paying jobs** : I’ll advocate for more funding through programs like the CHIPS Act and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill to bring high-quality jobs back to Mid-Michigan and strengthen our supply chains. **Protecting our fundamental rights** : I’ll stand against any attacks on women’s reproductive rights, including access to IVF, contraceptives, and abortion. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: (For Winners Only) Victory Hats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8773385d47545fab1ff926957298918&_e=48cLIM328vQ9LwpUePEicoP_So3j1IWBlGCHFA8SGnxHVGVsWadfuEzVXqYw0a-vrvhyjI7v4MRpZM6Zn0pOcdtqf5zsT6dIqyVV_j-N3CcbOJs9ZNeGhgYzcmZqn_zyLZ0TrIuU8QMSTi1Fted8U1wby7oLCbOnLkz1LYWrNfjlGpRSu3fyncYbZ7k9mDYlFkMlgEZzBMe_GoVgD6RA4tdlih4hS8XGKl-MpEvnhoPRlv82o61p-_uQpjImr6P6R2ocB81WVBEy_A18y1aB_A%3D%3D)
Friend,

Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

YOUR support for Turning Point PAC made a BIG impact on this election.

Trump won over first-time young voters and outperformed the youth vote. This was directly related to our ballot-chasing operations.

What we accomplished this year is remarkable.
* No longer will America First candidates be at a disadvantage to Democrats in ground operations.

* No longer will conservatives rely exclusively on expensive TV ads that don’t move the needle for young voters.

Turning Point is on the ground. We are meeting voters and turning out new voters to secure election victories. But it is only the beginning.

**That’s why I have a special offer exclusively for Turning Point PAC donors.**

[If you continue to support our work with a $25 or more donation, I will send you an exclusive Turning Point Trump 47 hat.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8773385d47545fab1ff926957298918&_e=48cLIM328vQ9LwpUePEicoP_So3j1IWBlGCHFA8SGnxHVGVsWadfuEzVXqYw0a-vrvhyjI7v4MRpZM6Zn0pOcdtqf5zsT6dIqyVV_j-N3CcbOJs9ZNeGhgYzcmZqn_zyhTbZpDD42PhKwyczOhFygsz1-ZKrMQFO0P6sHl4RSJVhgV_JwIEH2-GkPvIIGTfvviAliNofepCmKhKlS-AiIr-2kw9sV7Gt1_Et9ZJ7XH0Dw_DeaDgigke5ssfj84DxBtvUtdPkljdFaANxGkSEEg%3D%3D)
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8773385d47545fab1ff926957298918&_e=48cLIM328vQ9LwpUePEicoP_So3j1IWBlGCHFA8SGnxHVGVsWadfuEzVXqYw0a-vrvhyjI7v4MRpZM6Zn0pOcdtqf5zsT6dIqyVV_j-N3CcbOJs9ZNeGhgYzcmZqn_zyW3mkzyF-cjG_-ZBteAok_ad2ua0O_BYQH_0cdFJd09qPvaZb-pJNyTs7UvEmXNkMGl_R-k8lJ0cI_TfSIno-jiOD20OoPhLSsPqnfUgttJ6kQEkSXCOo4rK2-6d621NoT37uBeb3bCtAQ7V1siYW-g%3D%3D)
Please let me explain to you why I am asking you to continue your support.

Turning Point PAC has a proven concept. We know that ballot chasers can have a decisive impact on the direction of our country.

But if we are to truly transform America to make it great again, _it will require sustained ground operations in key districts_.

My plans were never about winning just one election.

Turning Point PAC is building an America First movement that will last for decades.

Will you join me in growing this movement?

[Please donate $25 or more today to get your exclusive Trump 47 hat.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8773385d47545fab1ff926957298918&_e=48cLIM328vQ9LwpUePEicoP_So3j1IWBlGCHFA8SGnxHVGVsWadfuEzVXqYw0a-vrvhyjI7v4MRpZM6Zn0pOcdtqf5zsT6dIqyVV_j-N3CcbOJs9ZNeGhgYzcmZqn_zy7pcXHn0_iQD-8FMMIR46LQT6Gl-QTPQZeie92ZNvpeFpo6b4UONF-xRlFK2C2r6NZ8k-VhXXpM8nbFz1dYk9MdsLlKFRXbUgKsOlyhTuT3FzId6UvQteFGdG8MjPXyixE1SrqETqrOT06MMo8yrAcg%3D%3D)
[Donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8773385d47545fab1ff926957298918&_e=48cLIM328vQ9LwpUePEicoP_So3j1IWBlGCHFA8SGnxHVGVsWadfuEzVXqYw0a-vrvhyjI7v4MRpZM6Zn0pOcdtqf5zsT6dIqyVV_j-N3CcbOJs9ZNeGhgYzcmZqn_zyOtVajLALsxOKJDTVJIOMtpQJS4qH_twoIk2l71P39vZPMmK2oITsS8eGkFXYj5wYq3UeuvEM-ATLcJ7wqhiD7MoQFZaGWpk2MqwTwNO1IDgvFdxoPIMlqINhegK1JFYG-r4ZORpxmf-1R0xXDEQftw%3D%3D)
For Freedom,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Friend,

Even though President Trump had to contend with the media, lawfare, the Deep State, corrupt institutions, and assassination attempts, he will be our 47th President!

YOUR support for Turning Point PAC made a BIG impact on this election.

Trump won over first-time young voters and outperformed the youth vote. This was directly related to our ballot-chasing operations.

What we accomplished this year is remarkable.

Turning Point is on the ground. We are meeting voters and turning out new voters to secure election victories. But it is only the beginning.

Christmas is right around the corner and we're in the FINAL STRETCH before President Trump takes the Oath of Office.

_But don't forget what led up to this historic election. The Radical Left forced the Trump Family to endure:_

But they NEVER gave up.

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 9, 2024

| [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099) | |

| RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL _"When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch"_ **\- Sean Hannity**

Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. [Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=32849&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d4ef7f355a4ae58114b59484ce7da67eecb4a6531f3b54561a26a85955f8099)
---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34078&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdmljdG9yeS12cy1mYW5pLXdsbGlzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e922ee551db848ef136206d3f9b727b8dd546db0e0ea660b170944439b995a6f) | **[Judicial Watch Victory Versus Fani Willis](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34078&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdmljdG9yeS12cy1mYW5pLXdsbGlzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e922ee551db848ef136206d3f9b727b8dd546db0e0ea660b170944439b995a6f)** PARDON SCANDAL: The Biden Family’s Arc of Corruption Joe Biden’s execrable pardon of Hunter perfectly fits the Biden family’s arc of corruption. The pardon seems to be all about protecting Joe Biden and helping ensure his son will be less likely to testify against him. Indeed, Joe Biden’s pardon statement is full of false allegations about how Hunter’s prosecution (hamstrung by his very own Justice Department) was selective and corrupt. The only “selective prosecution” involved here is the decision not to select Joe Biden for prosecution. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34078&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtdmljdG9yeS12cy1mYW5pLXdsbGlzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e922ee551db848ef136206d3f9b727b8dd546db0e0ea660b170944439b995a6f)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34073&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWVldGluZy1taWxsZXktYW5kLWdhcmxhbmQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=57c61a590d7d3f8fa80ba9456f73a1110ca201c7940befa943fd774983c6f298) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Justice Dept. for Details of Meeting Between Milley and Garland about President Trump](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34073&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWVldGluZy1taWxsZXktYW5kLWdhcmxhbmQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=57c61a590d7d3f8fa80ba9456f73a1110ca201c7940befa943fd774983c6f298)** (Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for details of a reported meeting between Attorney General Merrick Garland and Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman General Mark A. Milley in which they discussed President Trump and during which General Milley pressured Garland to target American “far right” militia movements (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:24-cv-03380)). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34073&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWVldGluZy1taWxsZXktYW5kLWdhcmxhbmQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=57c61a590d7d3f8fa80ba9456f73a1110ca201c7940befa943fd774983c6f298)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34055&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtaW4tZGVmYXVsdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=96d09927c5d3a5a5945008b3c5f5ae1acd5481c8d1c4cf4adc97d33a70d64c77) | **[Judicial Watch: Court Finds Fani Willis in Default in Open Records Lawsuit, Orders Her to Produce Records in Five Business Days](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34055&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtaW4tZGVmYXVsdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=96d09927c5d3a5a5945008b3c5f5ae1acd5481c8d1c4cf4adc97d33a70d64c77)** (Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch announced today that the Superior Court in Fulton County entered an order granting a motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in Judicial Watch’s lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. In doing so, the court grants Judicial Watch’s request for attorneys’ fees and orders Willis to search for and provide releasable records to Judicial Watch within five business days. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34055&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtaW4tZGVmYXVsdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=96d09927c5d3a5a5945008b3c5f5ae1acd5481c8d1c4cf4adc97d33a70d64c77)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34079&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2xpbWF0ZS1yZXNpbGllbmNlLWh1Yi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d2b789265386bb1f265461688eed40362a4b37efa6a5c32bcf589abe7c21aaf4) | **[U.S. Commits “Initial Investment” of $6.6 Mil to Launch Central American Climate Resilience Hub](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71452&L=34079&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2xpbWF0ZS1yZXNpbGllbmNlLWh1Yi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d2b789265386bb1f265461688eed40362a4b37efa6a5c32bcf589abe7c21aaf4)** The Biden administration is dedicating $6.6 million to launch a Central American hub of a National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) program that reportedly strengthens climate resilience, food and water security, carbon management, and air quality in developing nations. The initiative is called SERVIR, a name derived from the Spanish word that means to serve, and it claims to provide innovative solutions to pressing environmental challenges through the integration of earth observations and state of the art technologies funded by American taxpayers. With hubs in Asia, Africa and Latin America SERVIR monitors agriculture practices in Bangladesh, evaluates biodiversity in Cambodia, documents deforestation in the Amazon forest and manages groundwater analysis in Niger. clean_body: Joe Biden’s execrable pardon of Hunter perfectly fits the Biden family’s arc of corruption. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 9, 2024 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | PARDON SCANDAL: The Biden Family’s Arc of Corruption Joe Biden’s execrable pardon of Hunter perfectly fits the Biden family’s arc of corruption. The pardon seems to be all about protecting Joe Biden and helping ensure his son will be less likely to testify against him. Indeed, Joe Biden’s pardon statement is full of false allegations about how Hunter’s prosecution (hamstrung by his very own Justice Department) was selective and corrupt. The only “selective prosecution” involved here is the decision not to select Joe Biden for prosecution. ---|--- | | | | | (Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for details of a reported meeting between Attorney General Merrick Garland and Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman General Mark A. Milley in which they discussed President Trump and during which General Milley pressured Garland to target American “far right” militia movements (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:24-cv-03380)). ---|--- | | | | | (Washington, DC) – Judicial Watch announced today that the Superior Court in Fulton County entered an order granting a motion for default judgment against District Attorney Fani Willis in Judicial Watch’s lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. In doing so, the court grants Judicial Watch’s request for attorneys’ fees and orders Willis to search for and provide releasable records to Judicial Watch within five business days. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration is dedicating $6.6 million to launch a Central American hub of a National Aeronautics and Space Administration (NASA) program that reportedly strengthens climate resilience, food and water security, carbon management, and air quality in developing nations. The initiative is called SERVIR, a name derived from the Spanish word that means to serve, and it claims to provide innovative solutions to pressing environmental challenges through the integration of earth observations and state of the art technologies funded by American taxpayers. With hubs in Asia, Africa and Latin America SERVIR monitors agriculture practices in Bangladesh, evaluates biodiversity in Cambodia, documents deforestation in the Amazon forest and manages groundwater analysis in Niger. ---|--- | | | | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

The United States Constitution stands as a testament to the vision of a nation rooted in liberty, justice, and enduring principles. Drafted in 1787, it serves as the supreme law of the land and the framework for governance. Its influence extends beyond America's borders, inspiring countless democracies around the globe. Understanding the Constitution's significance is vital not only for its role in the founding of the nation but also for preserving its values for future generations. [#WeThePeople](https://substack.com/redirect/747477f5-0cef-4150-a28e-c99b278e676f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#ConstitutionMatters](https://substack.com/redirect/05bc6b0e-7235-432a-9a21-c7956ea36414?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#FoundingPrinciples](https://substack.com/redirect/2cc069c8-95d9-4e20-b9bc-24af67243300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#LibertyAndJustice](https://substack.com/redirect/a9bbbf68-a4cc-4068-a0ba-0859caceb64d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [#BillOfRights](https://substack.com/redirect/402d573f-3718-45e1-b76e-8fbf70e1e037?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

subject: I'm Going To Help Deliver President Trump The Cabinet He Wants

body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e2252498909245e79a44e1f5370b489b&_e=L6DVeZtXj71anaAbT-sg2MDNzmHz732ELtmPm5j7To_UWVfOwCpIORDojW8Iw2ye3doCi81MhfB0VK7jS2pVFGJamTiBSATjMPU3I9l1QxMzQMHrByqQRDksZY2QYM2B_cThfTXy2WkQKiuBvQmeUbDGFIckjUKzuYvuPJy6O3fAXE7MgbG_jRNXzBd2ZFCQE-m_XRlXODofWhq_BBcWUPEjmTP4aPyb4RA-sSGzIyurnvWVXYxy05yG1CTu2OgG6PhoLk_2TTawY9FQo-SL4z8cREj0xibNHrgcGAvSl3xlxqEC6Lor7VaIx4nsgiSifA_CAd4xp24XuS13LcbDv0gCDC2-RX-suDt-RvodLLegtaJ9Hwe-6qdEO9nfpVq3Nji3shjENnkoyOoiU_tClw%3D%3D)

Peter,
---
President Trump was given a mandate from the American people—to deliver the kind of monumental change he campaigned on. People know the future of America is contingent on a monumental shift from the status quo.

And President Trump is assembling the kind of swamp-draining Cabinet that can get the job done. That's why the establishment is up in arms about the dynamic, broad coalition of leaders he has selected to deliver the kind of change people want and America needs!

I'm going to help in whatever way I can to deliver the President the Cabinet that he needs to accomplish everything he promised to the American people.
---

name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAostVdQZVQoITyFe5RCtg~~/AARclAA~ "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**
**THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP**
---
| | | [SIGN THE THANK YOU NOTE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAostVdQZVQoITyFe5RCtg~~/AARclAA~ "Generic Button")
---
| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAostVdQZVQoITyFe5RCtg~~/AARclAA~)
---

You've been with the MAGA movement for so long, and as one of the most dedicated patriots in the movement, it would mean a lot if your name was on this thank you letter.

**[So, without further ado, will you please sign House Republicans thank you note to President Trump?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oAostVdQZVQoITyFe5RCtg~~/AARclAA~ "So, without further ado, will you please sign House Republicans thank you note to President Trump?")**
**THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP**

subject: we know you support Social Security!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
you must have missed our original message
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22615%2E4449941%2E4jyMiS)
---
Hey there,

On Friday, we sent you an urgent petition to save Social Security from bankruptcy under Trump’s leadership.

But our records indicate that you still haven’t added your signature. **You’re one of the last [21] Democrats from your state that hasn’t signed!**

**[_With Social Security facing bankruptcy in as few as six years under Trump’s plan, we can’t understate how urgent this is. Please sign now »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241209_EMPET_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22615%2E4449941%2E4jyMiS)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241209_EMPET_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22615%2E4449941%2E4jyMiS)
---
We’ve attached the original message below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —
Subject: we must foil MAGA’s plan to gut Social Security
From: SAVE Social Security [FFR]
**This is HORRIBLE NEWS:**
**BUT THERE’S STILL HOPE:** More than 90% of Americans polled SUPPORT Social Security – we can foil the MAGA plan if we all speak out together!

We won’t let Republicans gut our earned benefits – Seniors have paid into Social Security most of their lives, _and so many rely on those payments to survive!_
**[_We need a MASSIVE wave of support – 20,000 voices strong – to DEMAND that Congress protects Social Security! Join us now to save Social Security »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241209_EMPET_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22615%2E4449941%2E4jyMiS)**
[20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: ADD YOUR NAME TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241209_EMPET_E2_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22615%2E4449941%2E4jyMiS)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: PEACE ON EARTH: We’re gathering to pray for persecuted Christians in Syria
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c78da80667074f839954389d8b257df7&_e=re5TQqONMDT48e_1_qR0tvt7vtfOO2ab9LIzoDWR-GJC337zpLklUZ0WWA95t5IBApDeRQz6CINLZ5fWXdqcKCpqfRACmIe4RulVqLlpD4_tN1t79Gb76z0Ar9OW0i9L-nSY2f7m9fPF90KyHo1SOG094qoCUSFbYC1eNuc2qP9OsfpVIb7SG-P0d0WWDlyr2hZr8FAOh1BHcDaR-JwO8v-aKr5H6OR_0ozvPbCW_swt8d35yMEaC-OVbNo6jyqUMi89yohZWwlZsZWatAoKcrqEubhkZBNgwvC3UU9i1kwDFh2CV2Z0W4HSBXvGYrL56Ntng0H4rWCg-MBeupX-9w%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
The Church is under attack around the world. While here in America, we’ve dealt with politicians who exploited the pandemic to keep us from gathering together, around the world, Christians are fighting for their lives. On Friday, we are gathering in Texas to PRAY FOR PEACE and to implore heaven to protect the persecuted church. Recently released footage in Syria shows Christians being captured by Islamic Terrorists, and we are gathering to pray for their safety, protection, and release!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c78da80667074f839954389d8b257df7&_e=re5TQqONMDT48e_1_qR0tvt7vtfOO2ab9LIzoDWR-GJC337zpLklUZ0WWA95t5IBApDeRQz6CINLZ5fWXdqcKCpqfRACmIe4RulVqLlpD4_tN1t79Gb76z0Ar9OW0i9L-nSY2f7m9fPF90KyHo1SOG094qoCUSFbYC1eNuc2qP-M2ivN1_Qq3ad38_qr3GURZdfYf3XJmYskEcNUXUUfvtXGNIwlYrNItvnyzGKIQ2P58nYx2LCV5JOAwzizhWNrWl7QqAZM5NarigK2sZ1iHo-a0shhZQYtCor97GyWg6B1oJpdpOCL0WbjX9lET-n-NZF2yhjXIqmA-g0oRwSZnw%3D%3D)
---
We want to pack the house with Believers interceding on behalf of our brothers and sisters in Christ. These calls to heaven will be heard! In Matthew 18:19-20, Jesus says, “Again, truly I tell you that if two of you on earth agree about anything they ask for, it will be done for them by my Father in heaven. For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.” Will you join us in person, in prayer, or with provisions to hold this time of prayer? _**PEACE ON EARTH DETAILS**_ Date: Friday, December 13, 2024 Time: 7:30 pmLocation: Vintage Church 171 Farm to Market 3219, Harker Heights, TX We're holding a Nations Dinner as well! The dinner starts at 5:30, and tickets include a bonus -- reserved seating in the main event AND a discount coupon to use at the merch table. Come and meet me and one of our missionaries from Iraq and hear testimonies we can not share publicly as well as an insight into what God is doing in the midst of persecution! Order your Nations Dinner ticket **[HERE.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c78da80667074f839954389d8b257df7&_e=re5TQqONMDT48e_1_qR0tuCXG4RBc5m_idBQuoF44du8PqlTVTmeFhT3fNQCAxwO1aSZkk6xD2IGE3jAQmMXgOvEq_Ud3y5J-WzMBWx_ZZ10LdiPHpg_o7OFGvecY96NnqG4lqlzuWBfjCLRTcshlp8xMJz-KFQH56LXH9MbmNY-u_udJvhl4EVXOB-NF0gJ6h-M6Q7R4cvBjI0vHddUxqb9MDd33cangGlNF6DcDMD9p_NjL1xa3Akbhf16RLhu5tHO_KgsXdMnXSTifqjk6sfgVRh6EZgh02FEROAKq9w1rxp1LdA-NijqXed5L61uhR6wVEmDOlRjrGbIr2Z-4rZG8B4zAjoPrHYlLwUcdAm_W8dySnCIBLiScrdJ3zKJfokqJy9jEZF-SSBuwIvemRJW-fU81WAcUrG8v7j49og%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT THE LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c78da80667074f839954389d8b257df7&_e=re5TQqONMDT48e_1_qR0tvt7vtfOO2ab9LIzoDWR-GJC337zpLklUZ0WWA95t5IBApDeRQz6CINLZ5fWXdqcKCpqfRACmIe4RulVqLlpD4_tN1t79Gb76z0Ar9OW0i9L-nSY2f7m9fPF90KyHo1SOG094qoCUSFbYC1eNuc2qP_SvhfuDBteeeC_4WSnzPph-_cMf9pCzANzfK1InUPcpRSuGdkSuk5m6OKuRFmO5g8sDu2UoJRzG7Ll3X4C8yO0k6G6EmzfxaK4HSzeDeOpwnXGVHp1qxqNBYVW0TisUv1h9_jWTttz057Xc3trpSujaFsdwbiJPMBddd04UQng8Q%3D%3D)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Donald Trump just called for Liz Cheney and me to be jailed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8212%2E5257348%2Eu9ZnSi ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Yesterday morning, in Donald Trump’s first televised interview since the
election, he called for members of the January 6 Committee to be jailed.
Including Liz Cheney and me.

He wants to prosecute the truth-tellers.

He wants to pardon perpetrators of political violence from the January 6
insurrection.

That’s not what democracies do — that’s what dictators do.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=dec2024_abs_em.L2yLSN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8212%2E5257348%2Eu9ZnSi ]This is what we’re up against for the next four years,
Derek. I’m being sworn into the
United States Senate later today, where I will use my position to deliver
for California and the country on issues like housing, childcare, and the
cost of living. But clearly, I will also have my work cut out for me in
holding Trump and his appointees to account.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Though half a world away, the events in South Korea last week should give us hope.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Though half a world away, the events in South Korea last week should give us hope.
In case you weren’t following — last Tuesday South Korea’s right-wing President attempted to shut down his country’s democracy and impose a dictatorship on his fellow citizens by declaring martial law. Under the pretense of rooting out North Korean communist sympathizers, President Yoon Suk Yeol sought to bring the free press under his direct control, ban political activities and any gatherings “that incite social unrest.”
And perhaps most alarmingly, soldiers surrounded the National Assembly at President Yoon’s direction to prevent lawmakers from convening.
What happened next is what I find so inspiring.
Instead of submitting to this power grab, everyday Koreans rose up to challenge their president and fight for their democracy. They rushed to the National Assembly by the thousands, facing armed soldiers who could very well have fired on their fellow citizens. Instead, the will of the people prevailed over the possibility of political violence, and the protesters were able to help lawmakers scale the fences and enter the Assembly without being fired upon.
Once convened inside the Assembly, lawmakers of all parties — including President Yoon’s — voted unanimously to repeal the declaration of martial law. In other words, they saw past their partisan differences to put the interests of their country and democracy ahead of any other consideration.
Faced with the united front of Korean citizens from every walk of life and their democratically elected lawmakers, President Yoon gave in and withdrew his declaration of martial law.
He now faces impeachment and potentially removal from office.
In these tough times, with the rise of authoritarians across the globe and our own president-elect promising to “be a dictator on day one” of his administration, we should take heart in the example of those willing to do whatever it takes to fight for and preserve their democracy.
Beto

name: Kari Lake
subject: There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare. | | |

MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=57cecbb2aed44c40813087c881a5b776&_e=CJwWsMl8ibhvMGBa9iuagKqGSx4OtCMt1rDabvkkmirl_EA5LO5l9usXss0UxF-UpEPmuiaMCDdHfnv2wzDjAHEDzkKZEPaHteOysZ08T9eIanW5bIdK8FxyvkfJBEtgv3Y9N5Y0RkHtiOFq1wfHG67ttGtFs4yb7J6zebYIvsHt53slviW7cQV1XSxouhcs7WqA3eS8BWgtKYw5R3zWzNnIW4LpYs3uT5ln9WDTedjl9u4_AyrYJ2EXhr-89JSJBcgaAUsjPJEa_9zhhxzJ6TC_mLUCgLJ--aPy1idj16dUQzTUuYo7JJ0o2-eQGx4bCcJlFI6wQ5x0jTAY2Uhl8DYMrSpQ3pHeg7vRej6Q5Sjn_rHGn17YdcEU0sOjb7SvlP0dflDNGN8fNzS4THApTWAeD00aRQLHm1UtAix0LR0%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=57cecbb2aed44c40813087c881a5b776&_e=CJwWsMl8ibhvMGBa9iuagKqGSx4OtCMt1rDabvkkmirl_EA5LO5l9usXss0UxF-UpEPmuiaMCDdHfnv2wzDjAHEDzkKZEPaHteOysZ08T9eIanW5bIdK8FxyvkfJBEtgv3Y9N5Y0RkHtiOFq1wfHG67ttGtFs4yb7J6zebYIvsHt53slviW7cQV1XSxouhcs7WqA3eS8BWgtKYw5R3zWzNnIW4LpYs3uT5ln9WDTedjl9u4_AyrYJ2EXhr-89JSJHo4z4tkTdRSL7QrwCqMP_GBhuKr-YO4CZCmMBLqJnaKA-AvHfH7smq6wKcMeQIDCWGOmVr6tzbqsJvG9iirNuEdnp1ZAQ5iKjFh5s1I7EVyrjWqXNFHrZVRhz9usNVw2KZda-NICKc6ETBXxtzT5QUwQgPVM0n2R21bPATnG5fo%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=57cecbb2aed44c40813087c881a5b776&_e=CJwWsMl8ibhvMGBa9iuagKqGSx4OtCMt1rDabvkkmirl_EA5LO5l9usXss0UxF-UpEPmuiaMCDdHfnv2wzDjAHEDzkKZEPaHteOysZ08T9eIanW5bIdK8FxyvkfJBEtgv3Y9N5Y0RkHtiOFq1wfHG67ttGtFs4yb7J6zebYIvsHt53slviW7cQV1XSxouhcs7WqA3eS8BWgtKYw5R3zWzNnIW4LpYs3uT5ln9WDTedjl9u4_AyrYJ2EXhr-89JSJL_X1fnKwoSoBdjKdxt8RqlBqufzM-Ig4xBTobNAtQFk1clvON_SNthoTV9AD38F1fsF60QCPsApNNZjPGgn5j_I5c893Otk8zUKj9QmwsOI3jpmCxqKh2x_qQwXLuv_JDkUbIxl_Y3MuEeKUAcEcq_UXjPdysXj37-C36o-6Htk%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=57cecbb2aed44c40813087c881a5b776&_e=CJwWsMl8ibhvMGBa9iuagKqGSx4OtCMt1rDabvkkmirl_EA5LO5l9usXss0UxF-UpEPmuiaMCDdHfnv2wzDjAHEDzkKZEPaHteOysZ08T9eIanW5bIdK8FxyvkfJBEtgv3Y9N5Y0RkHtiOFq1wfHG67ttGtFs4yb7J6zebYIvsHt53slviW7cQV1XSxouhcs7WqA3eS8BWgtKYw5R3zWzNnIW4LpYs3uT5ln9WDTedjl9u4_AyrYJ2EXhr-89JSJOaLUtcOzEe4h4j9kd2VlKYzn5rBbcECxTlwVlftXnOYb7BeY9GAmSHwhJL13rIUSXbS0E0MU6OjvAW3EgmEFeAR9dGC595HcmjiqBvbUWnmHf0qaC5PZRpC4_PPxZnv1CPSbtwgwLNUNlkYmNYjfNe1xvgs9Cnuu-mkTLscTi2U%3D)

Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---

| | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support.
