name: CADEM
subject: ADEM Election Registration opened TODAY December 9 at 12 p.m.
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c0ad635f6bcc/dnc-convention-hotel-link-delegate-packages-and-more-12722412?e=ceda8b4f9a)
---
| | | | |
California Democrats,
**The California Democratic Party is thrilled to announce that registration for the 2025 ADEM Election opened TODAY, December 9 at 12 p.m. and closes Wednesday, January 8, 2025 at 12:00 p.m.!**
This is your chance to become an Assembly District Delegate and join CADEM in supporting Democrats at every level. As a delegate, you’ll:
* Increase your political impact by voting for the endorsements of the California Democratic Party for partisan legislative and statewide office in California;
* Vote for positions we take on the Ballot Propositions;
* Build a community with passionate and diverse California Democrats;
* Take on greater responsibility as a voice for your local district when establishing the official California Democratic State Platform (in even-numbered years); and
* Elect 16-25 CADEM Regional Directors who function as your liaison between the California Democratic Party, County Central Committees, and Democratic Party Clubs.

**The biennial meetings to elect Assembly District Delegates and Executive Board Representatives of the California Democratic Party will be held February 22-23, 2025.**
Any Democrat registered to vote in California is eligible to run for Assembly District Delegate and/or Executive Board Representative, provided they are a registered Democrat and reside in the relevant Assembly District by November 5, 2024.
**Candidates who cannot register to vote due to citizenship status are still eligible to participate in the 2025 ADEM Procedures.** [If you are unable to register to vote by reason of citizenship status and would like to run as a candidate, please use this form.](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=33522227e1&e=ceda8b4f9a) This registration process will be subject to the same registration timeline and due date.
A $40 filing fee is required at the time of application.
Candidate Statement (optional) Submission period opens January 9, 2025 at 12:00pm. If the Assembly District Delegate/Executive Board Representative candidate chooses to include an optional statement (2400 characters), no edits or future statements will be accepted once it has been processed and approved by CADEM Staff.
---
[APPLY TODAY](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=968f1a083b&e=ceda8b4f9a)
[VIEW KEY DATES HERE](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=bca2399b05&e=ceda8b4f9a)
[DOWNLOAD THE ADEM PROCEDURES](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=e36e3a62d2&e=ceda8b4f9a)
| Thank you,
Team CADEM
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=b220604fe6&e=ceda8b4f9a)

_ Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=a20213d7f8&e=ceda8b4f9a&c=6dd6da16ee) or [unsubscribe](https://cadem.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=937cb8fef613f2c2cf80bf894&id=a20213d7f8&t=b&e=ceda8b4f9a&c=6dd6da16ee)

Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Rebuild a good and Godly culture
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaNxcyfG0jzYaD0j2mOm78e7PADMkwn9hLswfbH62G3w9VpmIGEdq-mRHWf0gQrAZm190BvLKm8V2sE9iWyq-y1_4ZddS5wNlwGgueOw8R_ksLd0UBa-OiaH8kSYNq4lEUaergLFbvxoIUFZb-2laMNDwx85ApNVBIKRDETj4ZaMmA%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaPCXJz4ogGO54c3mCmKz2VajRFvvrvAEi9EajKk4ABr_bM3MlSzFoFQDjCyVqnq5Wv9zjoQqhFzRRBGwyG-4_geqnHPSac_kUihoU_xd17qYfSTkCSPNeQ9MYwbsspWXvLZEoES16g2cVyLPSljErqE3M6d8JiJ0dB59dx74WDjWw%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaN-QSA2EUPEO7OTvEgWZ7nwso1434w1fOssqb-FpGq_TiTZLRARduzSTrPvc2u_xMRkdX5NB-E9VMJF1nIbZXTQzTpdavnRoZLdMymdNLUyyTGKRrEKfxUZVzuLPyQfBL8PtLNc4iqC_Pkwo36lZLaZaQ0khvpw5lTgGm3P3s4Nzg%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaNbatNWfI8URDpp0IpnkiabzlaDtjjsWhTfNdkdkR_efua70g3DsBPmIgsJGCc5PLDgrCUL9sn6yFX35JbdiXL377waIwiCBtIxs9qLAfpzR9TYkZJ4n5R309QDz6KFr73KPRL_ElS1X1TgIDp_Q_l4B3d7naSh6jT3O65B3kzYyg%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaM3EFkyCw2mGoqF4X7hudsxsPVP4sh0XDEbbUOopB4-WnWx4Cv4YYw0DWHi3bY2fea6vt06GO8SyOZ4cC3cdmvucTnTQK2EXhn1pQG0lbCdVBSZI_b6jLECZHANTTsXbrxjWN_hsihv0ldvyaE2Q9dj3SkwBw1zy7uVlQpcrOkhYg%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaNHU4qHZsnhk0eMpJvMruoc6n1vS3Z1gJgT0EuCaKiyKcpTsRwJdeV53Qh2Fv0Di4CXXuEUl36yvxQttc31-Wb8XlYxDPyq2VhTTsIJtLY5JR6IUSXcxfzCUUBrktAAK_8H-foe_Rli7ZawDXLtAJ9j0Ach5DPtTU4D8FNxEtQMsQ%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=57af7a380ba24839889d8c30cf275923&_e=USQS8XZCgt23HTYj6jKjnQeltObva-K1Bvo5NgQaRGwHKvIOSlws1jryb7UXruTfCK3wGuvIaVZh5yDpvjWRMSyXErsjZHxQhrJGl2bHbvKqqXSGMg7Q8Y9eGo7kXUeJ04N_8Irl0Cet460iG1UTFz-LNHKi8SprFfr3RudawQSWUZ8A2t2MlJaDgPp_gVY95auvL0oxVauzBWQOgKT5YMkvDtW3BwqIaodwmIjrVaMFiTpNs7XHOSSZygjvInYOOCe9UYi_BJwgL4c0J5XYW8yUTSqGv4QJRZt2ditguSVVbVqPANHIKmPfheVXmVMRnPKdKcqLtkgjHI7BRN6ind8w64eujclwWaTAYdQto0NiT_SqvlBsxTlKeqBb8DCxPt2xLJEvK-9j8CKueqT-8A%3D%3D)

**Kirk Cameron**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LwTbaATfSBbvG9z-iUrhOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOfdgP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9nb2xkd2F0ZXItaW5zdGl0dXRlL3BhLWFjdGlvbi1jcnV6P3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwOSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ1UZX1dneaM-hVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

**I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.**

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LwTbaATfSBbvG9z-iUrhOw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpOfdgP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9nb2xkd2F0ZXItaW5zdGl0dXRlL3BhLWFjdGlvbi1jcnV6P3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIwOSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1yb25XA3NwY0IKZ1UZX1dneaM-hVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.
**Defending Parental Rights** While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, Unwoke , I detail what is happening in our schools: Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division. Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents. Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult. Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money... They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds. I'd like to break the rules. Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools. I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away. ~ The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country. Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations. Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts. Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents. The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions. This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law. ~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ School Choice Every parent deserves to send their children to the school that best fits their needs. name: The Democratic Party
subject: Something powerful happened:
body:
---
Derek, In the days after Election Day, we sent several messages recognizing the incredible campaign Kamala Harris ran this year, and explaining why the Democratic Party still needs your support as we look to the fights ahead. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond -- especially after such a draining election cycle. But after we sent those initial messages, something powerful happened: Diane from Ohio chipped in $5. Andrea from North Carolina contributed $10. José from Florida pitched in another $10. And suddenly... it was clear that Democrats all over the country are committed to building the strongest possible Party for the fight ahead. Right now, we’ve got a LOT of work cut out for us. In a matter of weeks, Trump and a Republican Congress will be sworn in. They will undoubtedly get right to work issuing executive orders and pushing policies aimed at weakening our democracy, attacking our fundamental rights, and undoing the progress we fought so hard for. We’re already seeing how disastrous this could be. That’s why we’ll need a strong Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and hold Trump and his allies accountable. [**So we’re asking you to join Democrats like Diane, Andrea, and José by making your first contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241209_2366_fr&refcode2=2380_22930333_O-WeSJ&akid=2380%2E22930333%2EO-WeSJ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241209_2366_fr&refcode2=2380_22930333_O-WeSJ&akid=2380%2E22930333%2EO-WeSJ)**

Thank you in advance for stepping up today.
The Democrats

clean_body: Derek, In the days after Election Day, we sent several messages recognizing the incredible campaign Kamala Harris ran this year, and explaining why the Democratic Party still needs your support as we look to the fights ahead. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond -- especially after such a draining election cycle. But after we sent those initial messages, something powerful happened: Diane from Ohio chipped in $5. Andrea from North Carolina contributed $10. José from Florida pitched in another $10. And suddenly... it was clear that Democrats all over the country are committed to building the strongest possible Party for the fight ahead. Right now, we’ve got a LOT of work cut out for us. In a matter of weeks, Trump and a Republican Congress will be sworn in. They will undoubtedly get right to work issuing executive orders and pushing policies aimed at weakening our democracy, attacking our fundamental rights, and undoing the progress we fought so hard for. We’re already seeing how disastrous this could be. That’s why we’ll need a strong Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and hold Trump and his allies accountable. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** We know that we’ve asked a lot of you, but the truth is that here at the DNC, a large percentage of our funding comes from supporters like you, chipping in whatever you can whenever you can. As we think about what’s next, it’s clearer than ever that our ability to fight back and organize hinges on the response to messages like this one. Thank you in advance for stepping up today. The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: Team DPVA
subject: Protect Virginia from Trump’s Chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Trump’s chaos machine is already rolling. Here’s why Virginia must hold the line.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433253/516640485/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjIxMGVhYy03NGI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd00IzrIpLad905IDx7PKdb1W_XC7XpdA4K4YRqCb40=&emci=b089a514-52b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9b210eac-74b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=15759664)
---
We’ve seen the writing on the wall. Over the past month, Donald Trump has appointed extremists and loyalists as leaders in his new administration. From an **anti-vaxxer conspiracy theorist** Robert F. Kennedy Jr. overseeing public health, to **Kremlin apologist** Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence, **Trump's team is designed to dismantle progress and consolidate power.** What does it mean for Virginia? _Everything is at stake._ Our Democratic majority is the last line of defense against a GOP that would rubber-stamp Trump’s agenda — slashing healthcare, restricting voting rights, banning abortion access across the South, and undermining national security by appointing partisan extremists.
Virginia has been a beacon of progress: protecting reproductive freedom, expanding Medicaid, and standing up for democracy. **These cabinet appointments threaten our progress on a national level.** Trump’s administration knows how critical Virginia is in their agenda. Flipping our legislature would give them a foothold to expand their extremism nationwide — [_**will you help us send a message that Democrats are ready to resist, rebuild, and reclaim our future? Even $10 would make a difference in this fight to protect our majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433256/516640488/-807643367?&refcode=E11716-20241209-TrumpAppointees-SL-Corruption&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjIxMGVhYy03NGI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd00IzrIpLad905IDx7PKdb1W_XC7XpdA4K4YRqCb40=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 » →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433259/516640491/1383413614?express_lane=true&refcode=E11716-20241209-TrumpAppointees-EG-Corruption&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjIxMGVhYy03NGI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qd00IzrIpLad905IDx7PKdb1W_XC7XpdA4K4YRqCb40=)

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: The MassDems Listening Tour Starts in January
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
As I announced in November, MassDems will launch a virtual Listening Tour to engage with our community across the Commonwealth. This initiative is an opportunity for us to review the outcomes of the recent elections, celebrate successes, and identify areas for growth.
The Listening Tour will consist of virtual public forums held via Zoom. We’re excited to announce the dates and times of all nine of these forums:
* Congressional District 1 * Tuesday, January 7th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZIod-mvrzgrG9SmIDy7dxGUj27NYKH4f6RD]

* Congressional District 2 * Thursday, January 9th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwud-GsqzgtE9GPrxmDaame5XN6RvJWTaVB]

* Congressional District 3 * Monday, January 13th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZElc-2trDssE9VsOj7EEDL9VFGS9NeBMsy1#/registration]

* Congressional District 4 * Thursday, January 16th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcvf-2vqzgrEtPt10UoEnQS5Gn6dohp4J2h]

* Congressional District 5 * Tuesday, January 21st at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZIof-iqqD4jHd3tetLVMwHOGjqxugiNAlnR]

* Congressional District 6 * Thursday, January 23rd at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZ0vf-yvqDwiEtVez9cJZeE0zBXmEIcPi2uI#/registration]

* Congressional District 7 * Tuesday, January 28th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZYrdO2przspHdcqc3leH8tx20s6btS46UUT]

* Congressional District 8 * Monday, February 10th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZMscuitrj0qGdYd298mD9ptAEnUDjwkPbiT]

* Congressional District 9 * Thursday, February 13th at 7pm
* Registration link here [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZIkf-2trjgvH9ZaVZaT1FUwzDDQWoOYx06m]

To find your Congressional district, visit the Secretary of State’s website [https://www.sec.state.ma.us/WhereDoIVoteMA/WhereDoIVote] .
To ensure everyone has a chance to contribute, the public forums will follow a specific format:
* Participants will have up to 2 minutes to speak. Sign-ups will be available on a first-come, first-served basis.
* Those unable to attend or prefer to provide additional input can submit written feedback through an online form which will be circulated on our social medias and through email as the Listening Tour begins.
We look forward to hearing from you at your Congressional District’s forum. Your voice matters, and this is your opportunity to help us build on our successes and strengthen our movement for the future. Together, we can ensure the Massachusetts Democratic Party continues representing and advocating for the values that matter most to our communities.
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Andy Roth
subject: Let's Celebrate!
body:
We Hit the $500,000 Match

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.eFEc_7DPUEwsrSXta2Dv6dGnhwhkdg9Y7i3hrQd05Ws?) for more

# [Let's Celebrate!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=152862374&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyODYyMzc0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM3ODE0OTQsImV4cCI6MTczNjM3MzQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JUgZ6_6f0H9tiKz9k0LLFdWOfqKQnZCJq0sdgCeHlCw)
### We Hit the $500,000 Match
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
| Dec 9
---
| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=152862374&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUyODYyMzc0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzM3ODE0OTQsImV4cCI6MTczNjM3MzQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.JUgZ6_6f0H9tiKz9k0LLFdWOfqKQnZCJq0sdgCeHlCw)
---
| | [](https://substack..XlVW7Fy2iwexUvSlJ6yRxznByZeF9NgoEIXZdJj9pTM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/lets-celebrate?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
I just wanted to send you a quick note that we hit our $500,000 match program! One of our earliest and dearest supporters, Mike Rydin from Houston, TX, offered to donate $500,000 if we could raise another $500,000 by November 30. And we did it!
A big thanks go out to Mike and all of you who believe in our shared mission and donated to the cause. It made a huge difference.
Now let me say, just because we hit this match, it doesn't mean we're flush with cash. It secured only a third of our 2025 budget, **so please consider giving if you haven 't already.** We need all the support we can get in order to grow and expand into new states.
Finally...buckle up and get ready for a wild ride! When state legislatures gavel into session in January, the fireworks are going to explode. And we'll continue to keep you updated on all of the big fights.
So please help us help our state freedom caucuses fight for liberty and against The Swamp!
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/bf72ddd3-64f7-4daa-89c6-21eb2e63a744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you don't want to donate online by clicking the button above, you can send us a check to the following:
* **State Freedom Caucus Network** (not tax deductible)
* **State Freedom Caucus Foundation** (tax deductive)

The mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave, SE, Washington, DC 20003.
We also accept stock gifts and IRA distributions. Please reach out to Sara Prinzi (sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org) for more information.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

clean_body: We Hit the $500,000 Match | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? We Hit the $500,000 Match | | | Dec 9 | | | | | | | | Friends, I just wanted to send you a quick note that we hit our $500,000 match program! One of our earliest and dearest supporters, Mike Rydin from Houston, TX, offered to donate $500,000 if we could raise another $500,000 by November 30. And we did it! A big thanks go out to Mike and all of you who believe in our shared mission and donated to the cause. It made a huge difference. Now let me say, just because we hit this match, it doesn't mean we're flush with cash. It secured only a third of our 2025 budget, so please consider giving if you haven 't already. We need all the support we can get in order to grow and expand into new states. Finally...buckle up and get ready for a wild ride! When state legislatures gavel into session in January, the fireworks are going to explode. And we'll continue to keep you updated on all of the big fights. So please help us help our state freedom caucuses fight for liberty and against The Swamp! If you don't want to donate online by clicking the button above, you can send us a check to the following: State Freedom Caucus Network (not tax deductible) State Freedom Caucus Foundation (tax deductive) The mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave, SE, Washington, DC 20003. We also accept stock gifts and IRA distributions. Please reach out to Sara Prinzi (sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org) for more information. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. name: Protect the Vote (via azdem.org)
subject: Think elections are simple? Here’s what’s happening under the surface
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433878/516642523/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIwNGZjODAtNzhiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lEISdSEIk22vPaIp4llbeuVq0TpX1vr1RaUxN2dCiU=)

There have been a few questions that strategists have been asking in the weeks after the election, _“What happened?”_ and _“Where do we go from here?”_ We don’t have all the answers, but we do know that protecting our right to access the ballot box and lawfully expanding voting access will be critical to protecting our democracy. **[Folks — our first step to the change we deserve is to ensure that everyone has a seat at the table. Will you add your name to help us expand access to and protect the vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433879/516642531/-1739430121?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIwNGZjODAtNzhiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lEISdSEIk22vPaIp4llbeuVq0TpX1vr1RaUxN2dCiU=&emci=93103972-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5b04fc80-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9307116)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433880/516642538/-1739430121?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIwNGZjODAtNzhiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lEISdSEIk22vPaIp4llbeuVq0TpX1vr1RaUxN2dCiU=&emci=93103972-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5b04fc80-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9307116)
---
According to the nonpartisan research organization the Brennan Center systemic barriers to accessing the ballot box and casting a vote led to major disparities with Native voters nationwide.
Dedicated organizers here in Arizona helped to support, organize, and strengthen the Native vote in Arizona, but we need to continue to fight to expand access and protect the vote.
**[Can we count on your support today? Sign on right now ➡](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98433881/516642545/-1739430121?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIwNGZjODAtNzhiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0lEISdSEIk22vPaIp4llbeuVq0TpX1vr1RaUxN2dCiU=&emci=93103972-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=5b04fc80-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9307116)**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Calling all young leaders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Have you ever considered running for office, Peter?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241209-1&t=1&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)
Peter,
We know this election didn’t turn out the way we had hoped for.
But from Congress to state legislatures across the country, our candidates won important races and seats to make good on the issues that matter most to their constituents — from tackling the climate crisis to working toward a future free of gun violence.
This didn’t come out of nowhere. For over a year now, Leaders We Deserve has been at the forefront of investing in young leaders — to cultivate a bench of young progressives who will fight for their communities and help to defeat the far-right’s agenda.
We don’t plan on slowing down either. As we prepare for Donald Trump’s return to office, it’s clear that young progressives will be the antidote we need to counter the MAGA GOP.
With that in mind — have you ever thought about running for office, Peter? Yes you! As we look to the future, you or someone you know could play an important role in shaping this future by running for office. **[If you’ve got a moment, share your thoughts by filling out our quick candidate recruitment survey now!](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-candidate-recruitment-survey-20241209/?source=em20241209-1508&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)**
**[Candidate Recruitment Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-candidate-recruitment-survey-20241209/?source=em20241209-1508&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)**
By electing more young trailblazers to office, we’re breaking down the barriers that have long kept young people away from the table.
We not only identify candidates who will have the biggest impact on their communities — we go even further by providing day-to-day support by building campaigns from the ground up and work with candidates directly on their messaging, fundraising, coalition building and much more!
Our movement is shaking up the status quo and equipping the next generation of leadership with the tools and resources they need to not only run but to win their races.
And it all begins with folks like you, Peter! **[So if you've ever considered running for office or if you know a young person in your community who should be on our radar, can you take a moment to fill out our candidate recruitment survey?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-candidate-recruitment-survey-20241209/?source=em20241209-1508&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)**
**[Candidate Recruitment Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/lwd-em-candidate-recruitment-survey-20241209/?source=em20241209-1508&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)**
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241209-1&t=2&refcode2=1508_587540_5W6QKz&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1508%2E587540%2E5W6QKz)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Team Schrier
subject: Here’s how we get to work in 2025:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
“House Republicans will have zero room for error in the 119th Congress — literally.” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98434032/516643249/1605543321?refcode=em24_241209_gopmaj_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241209_gopmaj_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7438b7f0-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDM4YjdmMC03OGI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQN3lZ-K_Mek3SuPh7IlVAHwYa1a7nZqPQgRE1MYqJ4=)
**“House Republicans will have zero room for error in the 119th Congress — literally.”**

_"Democrats have been sounding the alarm that the GOP trifecta could endanger the social safety net as Republicans look to streamline government spending and offset their proposed tax cuts."_ Peter —

**In 2025, House Republicans will have one of the slimmest majorities in U.S. history.**

This razor-thin margin gives Democrats a golden opportunity to fight back against the GOP’s extreme agenda and ensure that Congress is pushing through policies that benefit working families in Washington State, and across the country.

Every vote matters. Every seat counts. And every dollar raised is a step toward ensuring we have the resources to hold Republicans accountable and stop their wrecking-ball agenda in its tracks. That’s why Kim is working tirelessly to deliver results for our district — from lowering prescription drug costs to protecting reproductive rights.

But with Republicans in control of the House, even with a slim majority, we still need to be prepared for what’s to come: The GOP’s blueprint for Project 2025 makes it clear they’re ready to ban abortion nationwide, gut critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and do Donald Trump’s bidding at the expense of Americans in Washington State, and beyond. More than ever before, we simply can’t afford to let them get away with it. **But this fight is going to take all of us stepping up.**

[**Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House hold the GOP accountable? clean_body: “House Republicans will have zero room for error in the 119th Congress — literally.” = “House Republicans will have zero room for error in the 119th Congress — literally.” "Democrats have been sounding the alarm that the GOP trifecta could endanger the social safety net as Republicans look to streamline government spending and offset their proposed tax cuts." Peter — In 2025, House Republicans will have one of the slimmest majorities in U.S. history. This razor-thin margin gives Democrats a golden opportunity to fight back against the GOP’s extreme agenda and ensure that Congress is pushing through policies that benefit working families in Washington State, and across the country. Every vote matters. Every seat counts. And every dollar raised is a step toward ensuring we have the resources to hold Republicans accountable and stop their wrecking-ball agenda in its tracks. That’s why Kim is working tirelessly to deliver results for our district — from lowering prescription drug costs to protecting reproductive rights. But with Republicans in control of the House, even with a slim majority, we still need to be prepared for what’s to come: The GOP’s blueprint for Project 2025 makes it clear they’re ready to ban abortion nationwide, gut critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and do Donald Trump’s bidding at the expense of Americans in Washington State, and beyond. More than ever before, we simply can’t afford to let them get away with it. name: NDRC Census Watch
subject: Trump’s plans to attack the census (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Once Trump’s back in power, extremists are planning again to attack the census for political gain.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98434451/516644718/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMzhiN2YwLTc4YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KquuhJQZw-uYopND4-QRjWw6cf3u9nRRCKoNqzumdJ4=&emci=28761f22-58b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6f38b7f0-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, it’s hard to overstate how important the census is to our democracy. Since _1790_ , the United States has been gathering census data to decide how many seats in Congress each state should receive, not to mention how much representation each state has in the Electoral College. It’s no wonder, then, that some Republicans have cynically tried to use this powerful tool to restrict access to the ballot. Before the last census, our movement successfully blocked Trump from adding an unconstitutional and racist citizenship question. **With Trump returning to power, we need to be prepared to beat back these attacks again.[Add your name to say loudly and clearly that we won’t stand for attacks on the 2030 Census.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98434452/516644719/1686231441?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusAttacks_email_20241209-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241209-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks-NOR_&utm_campaign=CensusAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMzhiN2YwLTc4YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KquuhJQZw-uYopND4-QRjWw6cf3u9nRRCKoNqzumdJ4=&emci=28761f22-58b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6f38b7f0-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98434453/516644720/1686231441?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusAttacks_email_20241209-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241209-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks-NOR_&utm_campaign=CensusAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMzhiN2YwLTc4YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KquuhJQZw-uYopND4-QRjWw6cf3u9nRRCKoNqzumdJ4=&emci=28761f22-58b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6f38b7f0-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---
This blatant power grab was struck down by the Supreme Court the last time Trump tried to manipulate the census, but we know they are already planning to try again once he’s back in power. In fact, they wrote down all their unconstitutional and power-hungry plans for the public to read about.
**The authors of Project 2025** proposed adding a citizenship question to the census, leading to a deliberate undercounting of populations with high rates of immigrants. Not only that, but these extremists plan to appoint political officials to decide who does or doesn’t get counted in the next census, instead of impartial, nonpartisan actors.
**Peter, we cannot stand by as Trump and other extremists attack the census. Our democracy requires that we ensure everyone is fairly represented — and that’s why the NDRC is fighting back once again to protect the census.**
**[Sign on to our letter to draw a line in the sand against unconstitutional, racist attacks on the census — and let’s do everything we can to protect this fundamental part of our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98434454/516644721/1686231441?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusAttacks_email_20241209-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241209-NDRC-Tier1-CensusAttacks-NOR_&utm_campaign=CensusAttacks&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMzhiN2YwLTc4YjYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KquuhJQZw-uYopND4-QRjWw6cf3u9nRRCKoNqzumdJ4=&emci=28761f22-58b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6f38b7f0-78b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)**

Peter, we have a lot going on right now. Cabinet appointments are flying. We have a new Senate Majority Leader. I was unanimously nominated to be re-elected as Speaker of the House. And the America First agenda is moving FULL STEAM AHEAD! **_[But there’s something I must ask you to stay focused on: Our Republican House majority is RAZOR thin and we need to fortify our resources as much as possible in the last weeks of the year.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=59d9802df2a541ebbd01cf71cfa9a59f&_e=5MKqFEfu3ot_olHAVpxHDSeCYb9eQB2dN68rTnuuccKZkLRRuTMAJZpxD0L5cW9xiqzh5zg0z6xiuJs8r_E8txMM4r2SDeIky4kJBB3b_NdKOTviFx_RGmhNa2wSZvQKatNkxXfAImZkGN77iYEsa6JQqEMNtNE9zML6eyc39Qdjn6y25G-5kD58YryLB9MdWUYqkLwBnTgDYDjnzH7-19QsoS5lvWzQ0XBkTZeTR3puCQCAeQnwNMexNZsb7eXrR1i9ZKU40nqpCpskzWJViGBjPSXNojtyFZAvB8hoRpfOdj7mbaZ-p76I218lk82V8zfQnjGTV6kfangw_blISTMby2OWzbllSHRS4srRIrs6UqOOGyYj4FZibgcY7vlhn4Vj6hs7pM5ydT1enx9TJ_F1Do3pl-VGEsRPArauBVKA1zONlb36lYyKnMdSe_GhyfqFJg--N-b1p71vep5Li4ylvWUWrzx64uLLQmbbU0GtmtS-iYhxdPd8SUDgCvSGIHbVTF-9JParY0gV_iZMEcVVSlY-vV7ZXxwpfI4VpzQ%3D)_**

name: Tina Smith
subject: What I heard from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, Last month, my team sent a survey to hear what’s on your mind and what issues you and your family are talking about at the dinner table. These surveys help inform my work in the Senate — **I’m here to serve you and deliver for the people of Minnesota.** We heard from many people that they’re concerned about Social Security and Medicare benefits. I hear you — the GOP’s ongoing willingness to mess with these benefits to pass more tax cuts for corporations and the wealthiest Americans worries me. **Rest assured that my colleagues in the Senate and House will fight with everything we have to protect these benefits. We already increased Medicare's ability to negotiate prescription drug prices and took a number of other steps to bring down the cost of their medication for millions of Americans. We’re going to keep up that progress, not go back in time.** I also heard from many of you that the climate crisis is one of your highest concerns. One person wrote that their top priority is, “Healing Climate Crisis and its unjust consequences.” I’ve heard that before — especially in our rural communities in Minnesota, which often bear the brunt of the climate crisis. I will work with anyone — Democrat, Republican, or Independent — to deliver relief and climate protections for our state. **We need to preserve our state’s lakes and prepare our infrastructure for climate emergencies.** Folks, there’s no shortage of work ahead of us. So thanks for sharing your thoughts and supporting this work. I’ll need you now more than ever. — Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98434901/516646517/1441085195?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRlZjdkNC03ZGI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkeHxeUrZcadut26gw2ZDY-XqT8tU9pDXJuFY2Ft2qA=)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: “There’s been a directive from voters that it’s time to clean up shop.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Did you see our Executive Director Alexandra Rojas’s interview in
Semafor, Peter?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241209?refcode=em20241209-36218&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36218_1203867_HvJikV&akid=36218%2E1203867%2EHvJikV ]Screenshot of Alexandra Rojas from Semafor interview

It’s clear from the November 2024 elections that everyday people are
dissatisfied with out-of-touch leaders in power prioritizing corporate
profits and billionaire interests instead of bold change for our
communities.

But this problem has been in the making for years — it’s why Justice
Democrats’ pitch since 2016 has been that working people deserve just as
much power and opportunity as billionaires to run our government. But
those at the top of the Party have failed to listen.

Like Alexandra said, “There’s been a directive from voters that it’s time
to clean up shop, that they do not want people that have been in power.
That the leadership void could be filled by those who represent the
working class — or it can be continued to be filled by Democrats that are
really comfortable cozying up with Wall Street and billionaires, which was
a huge part of this cycle. This donor, pundit, strategist class that has
had a lot of the power in the party was repudiated.”

As we gear up for the next election cycle, we’re putting all corporate
Democrats on notice and going on the offense.

While we once again prepare for more right-wing, dark money attacks on the
Squad, we’re looking at deep-blue and open seats in Democratic districts
where we can recruit and support working-class progressives to take on the
Democratic establishment and give working people more seats at the table
in 2026.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241209?refcode=em20241209-36218&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36218_1203867_HvJikV&akid=36218%2E1203867%2EHvJikV ]But since we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, we rely on
grassroots donations from folks like you to power our efforts. The more we
raise now, the more working-class candidates we can get behind in the next
two years: will you chip in $5 to help us?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241209?refcode=em20241209-36218&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36218_1203867_HvJikV&akid=36218%2E1203867%2EHvJikV ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241209-36218-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36218_1203867_HvJikV&akid=36218%2E1203867%2EHvJikV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36218%2E1203867%2EHvJikV

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: proud of what we built
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/chEPGWRcckspw7GELt-vFQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpOfaZP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9wb3N0Y3ljbGVfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MnB6eUdlbzYwRWxDRGdPNzl0Z2pUVkNMQVcyJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJwenlHZW82MEVsQ0RnTzc5dGdqVFZDTEFXMiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0ycHp5R2VvNjBFbENEZ083OXRnalRWQ0xBVzJXA3NwY0IKZ1WZcVdncwoI6lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

Peter - with the 2024 election cycle finally over, I’ve had a lot of time to reflect on all of the work we’ve done.

Yes, we suffered some heartbreaking losses. But I know that we left _everything_ on the field.

**To all the organizers, volunteers, and donors like you who stepped up to build progressive power in the South and across the country: Thank you.** You were at the heart of this fight throughout this cycle. And because of people like you, our fight continues.
**_But we can’t repeat the mistakes of the past and stop reaching out to folks between elections._** [**_Now more than ever, we need to build sustained and transformative power to fuel the work ahead. That can’t happen without your continued support. Will you make a donation today so our movement can keep pushing forward? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/chEPGWRcckspw7GELt-vFQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpOfaZP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9wb3N0Y3ljbGVfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MnB6eUdlbzYwRWxDRGdPNzl0Z2pUVkNMQVcyJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJwenlHZW82MEVsQ0RnTzc5dGdqVFZDTEFXMiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0ycHp5R2VvNjBFbENEZ083OXRnalRWQ0xBVzJXA3NwY0IKZ1WZcVdncwoI6lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Peter, it was small-dollar donations from donors like you that helped Democratic candidates like me win our races during a country-wide shift towards the right. Grassroots dollars paid for:
* Fair wages for experienced organizers
* TV and digital advertisements that spread progressive messages
* Outreach to folks who had long been ignored by traditional political campaigns

**Every single dollar went directly to building a movement for a better future. And now that we’re facing a Republican trifecta come January, we need to prove that our movement can stand the test of time, against all odds.** So I’m counting on people like you to keep holding it down, and keep us strong during this next phase of our fight. [**_I’m proud to keep the fight going for progressive, transformational change, but right now, we’re tracking behind where our fundraising needs to be prepared for the work ahead. So please, will you make a contribution of any amount today to help us continue building sustained progressive power? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/chEPGWRcckspw7GELt-vFQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpOfaZP0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9wb3N0Y3ljbGVfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MnB6eUdlbzYwRWxDRGdPNzl0Z2pUVkNMQVcyJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJwenlHZW82MEVsQ0RnTzc5dGdqVFZDTEFXMiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0ycHp5R2VvNjBFbENEZ083OXRnalRWQ0xBVzJXA3NwY0IKZ1WZcVdncwoI6lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/1uQR9BosWBVW775VewVf3A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpOfaZP0TdaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_YW1vdW50PTEwJnJlZmNvZGU9MjAyNDEyMDlfZW1fZnJfYjFfcG9zdGN5Y2xlX2VuJmV4cHJlc3NfbGFuZT10cnVlJmNkbWM9MnB6eUdlbzYwRWxDRGdPNzl0Z2pUVkNMQVcyJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJwenlHZW82MEVsQ0RnTzc5dGdqVFZDTEFXMiZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0ycHp5R2VvNjBFbENEZ083OXRnalRWQ0xBVzJXA3NwY0IKZ1WZcVdncwoI6lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!
We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!
| |

| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1c5662fe708047a0bb51a084ee230ef2&_e=ERI-VP1ixsrerFDXGcEqyn6MX4PadBKbmF3t0v-TPAArQuAySNOY9Ryx88R5ldua8WiP7VLzhhgYm_CI96nP0FW3PE0SdTkejq99ALsLEUx0B6uDmRMYDn7k_s1RRmWUdLpQWzCclACx7TvZ1hLxc_62znI20lsCbjNIje0JY2v0uLavv_oRnypc2vJr8sGPjpvSu2Ot492eY_Rse5j_wQaakiFhwhJahAnCbZta_X7JRGT3-4FewptOzraMe_y67Bm4CDCeUy08jxgErDbO6HAUNHdoA-hrSlNBAL03VLtWFJRBGerS8auC8JIj8P3Ao6eeV0JptfzAL_ZCo2UTGdNi4fcQFdBtUFvVyXAV3fP_M18dGKZuwSNkpZFgRUI92XYyFnVvJ6ObmqLhn_fXXDsnZvNoma5tDIfH8IoTr5w%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1c5662fe708047a0bb51a084ee230ef2&_e=ERI-VP1ixsrerFDXGcEqyn6MX4PadBKbmF3t0v-TPAArQuAySNOY9Ryx88R5ldua8WiP7VLzhhgYm_CI96nP0FW3PE0SdTkejq99ALsLEUx0B6uDmRMYDn7k_s1RRmWUdLpQWzCclACx7TvZ1hLxc_62znI20lsCbjNIje0JY2v0uLavv_oRnypc2vJr8sGPjpvSu2Ot492eY_Rse5j_wQaakiFhwhJahAnCbZta_X7JRGT3-4FewptOzraMe_y67Bm4CDCeUy08jxgErDbO6JW30TzTla-YnFxZDMNrfJAakM-_0LKuaynCE2zfsKqZNe_xfgIi-NqIJd9G5MkVf0WLREm_imOQLC1dUsKE8Tj7h5Bz6HmEWm-z3x1GFYp_e4ujF6w5eVKBNntfKAeOAlp_EVaDeR-QrOnkHkm05mM%3D "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

We know you're probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

_Can you please help us? _
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1c5662fe708047a0bb51a084ee230ef2&_e=ERI-VP1ixsrerFDXGcEqyn6MX4PadBKbmF3t0v-TPAArQuAySNOY9Ryx88R5ldua8WiP7VLzhhgYm_CI96nP0FW3PE0SdTkejq99ALsLEUx0B6uDmRMYDn7k_s1RRmWUdLpQWzCclACx7TvZ1hLxc_62znI20lsCbjNIje0JY2v0uLavv_oRnypc2vJr8sGPjpvSu2Ot492eY_Rse5j_wQaakiFhwhJahAnCbZta_X7JRGT3-4FewptOzraMe_y67Bm4CDCeUy08jxgErDbO6GNMtUqiXCHx1lTpjcPLUIB3C8VDrtB_nGFNPC7KybpH5EFYMoZ3PR_g7kgSrhF_MrMLr5SgaRhPOIO5dIc3VhYjd4vL3MvEQRL8Y_4edg8uywAF27SJN7gNDGJ1uG6IZ4aTdNxaWPDW-Mj-1E4JXrw%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")

**HOUSE REPUBLICANS**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: We’re just getting started
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team, we came together to make history. With your support, we worked tirelessly to flip Oregon’s 5th Congressional District from red to blue and chose a new future for Oregon. But our work didn’t stop there—and we’re not stopping now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435070/516647316/476240633?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.12.09_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJiZGE5YTUtN2ZiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3SWC9ks9Q_ylGVJ_jUTcGuzP0eQMD8ilso5Q30M3a_M=) Team, we came together to make history. With your support, we worked tirelessly to flip Oregon’s 5th Congressional District from red to blue and chose a new future for Oregon. **But our work didn’t stop there—and we’re not stopping now.** We’re committed to building an economy that works for everyone and supports workers and small businesses. We’re committed to protecting a woman's right to choose. We’re committed to protecting the social safety net that allows our community to thrive and grow. With Republicans in control, this fight will not be easy. I promise to fight to protect Democratic and Oregonian values. But I need your help. **[My race was won by just a few thousand votes and OR-05 remains a toss-up district. If you’re committed to supporting House Democrats so we can fight against the dangerous Republican agenda, will you chip in to help our campaign continue the fight in Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435071/516647317/476240633?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.12.09_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJiZGE5YTUtN2ZiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3SWC9ks9Q_ylGVJ_jUTcGuzP0eQMD8ilso5Q30M3a_M=)** | [CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435072/516647318/476240633?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.12.09_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJiZGE5YTUtN2ZiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3SWC9ks9Q_ylGVJ_jUTcGuzP0eQMD8ilso5Q30M3a_M=)
---
Thank you for your support,
Janelle

| Janelle Bynum is running in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [JanelleBynum.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435073/516647319/-1494881468?refcode=em_fr_2024.12.09_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJiZGE5YTUtN2ZiNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3SWC9ks9Q_ylGVJ_jUTcGuzP0eQMD8ilso5Q30M3a_M=&emci=392bbc18-5bb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=dbbda9a5-7fb6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14434323).

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Democrats, Help Fix Broken Food System
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This is a rare moment where unity can spark transformative change.

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=unity_12_9_24_nd1&n=4)

---
Democrats: Work with RFK Jr. to Fix Broken Food System
[ENCOURAGING DEVELOPMENTS](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=unity_12_9_24_nd1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
A recent _Newsweek_ article by former Congressman Tim Ryan offered an insightful perspective: **Democrats must work with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to fix America’s broken food system.**
**Ryan highlights a critical truth:**
_"We are a sick country, and a sick country cannot maintain long-term prosperity. Kennedy is passionate about this issue, and he's willing to take on the entrenched interests that have perpetuated this broken system for decades."_
This is a rare moment where unity can spark transformative change.
As Ryan points out, taxpayers subsidize a food system that’s making Americans sick—leading to skyrocketing health care costs and crushing family farms. RFK Jr., now poised to lead the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services is making food and agriculture reform a top priority.
Kennedy ignited the Make America Healthy Again (MAHA) movement with his bold vision to revolutionize public health, food systems, and government accountability.
And now, Democrats are joining him and voicing their support.
**Democrat Senator Cory Booker of New Jersey:**
_“When he (RFK Jr.) talks about the issues I’m talking about, we’re talking out of the same playbook.”_
**Democrat Governor Jared Polis:**
_“(RFK Jr.) helped us defeat vaccine mandates in Colorado in 2019 and he will help Make America Healthy Again by shaking up HHS and FDA.”_
**Eric Adams, speaking on _The View_ :**
_“Let’s be clear, we have a real problem with food in our country...and we need to watch what we’re feeding our children...we have to bring down this rhetoric in our conversation. You know, Obama said it and I agree, this is not the divided states of America, this is the United States of America.”_
**The message of unity** , the message to try something new, to shake it up, and to know that we are not each other's mortal enemy, is what RFK Jr. campaigned on and it is being picked up by Democrats across the nation!
We have always said, standing together, united, we can Make America Healthy Again.
Be encouraged, be of good cheer, we have better days ahead!
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=unity_12_9_24_nd1&n=6)
P.S. With RFK Jr. preparing to lead the charge to “Make America Healthy Again,” we must ensure he enters this next phase with a clean slate – **free from any debt that could divert focus from this mission.**
[**Donate now to retire the debt >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=unity_12_9_24_nd1&n=7)

name: History Facts
subject: Why we wear wedding rings
body:
In weddings around the world, exchanging rings is a crucial part of the ceremony, a moment in which a couple’s promises are sealed with a tangible token.

# [When Did We Start Giving Each Other Wedding Rings?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so91mk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so91mk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=so91mk&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n weddings around the world, exchanging rings is a crucial part of the ceremony, a moment in which a couple’s promises are sealed with a tangible token. Various cultures have contributed to the history of the wedding ring, from its ancient beginnings to the relatively recent advent of the double-ring exchanges popular today. But when and how exactly did this time-honored tradition begin?

Receiving too many emails? | I n weddings around the world, exchanging rings is a crucial part of the ceremony, a moment in which a couple’s promises are sealed with a tangible token. Various cultures have contributed to the history of the wedding ring, from its ancient beginnings to the relatively recent advent of the double-ring exchanges popular today. | | It’s a special day here at Fair Fight — it’s Stacey Abrams’s birthday! Stacey created Fair Fight back in 2018 to address voter suppression, empower Georgians, and protect our democracy. We’re so grateful for everything that she’s done to disrupt the tactics of MAGA-affiliated lawmakers, so we’re taking a moment to celebrate her special day. [**Help us wish Stacey a happy birthday — add your name to her card now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435573/516649452/239622128?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241209_f_HBDStacey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDAyMGE2Yi04M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rdydrYCg5c58XszxZhJS8yixNwAWzF5aTp-YY9eEM0=&emci=efe476df-77b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=24020a6b-83b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277) | [HAPPY BIRTHDAY STACEY!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435575/516649454/239622128?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241209_f_HBDStacey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDAyMGE2Yi04M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rdydrYCg5c58XszxZhJS8yixNwAWzF5aTp-YY9eEM0=&emci=efe476df-77b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=24020a6b-83b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)
---
Fair Fight is the national leader in the fight for voting rights and our democracy, and we’re so grateful for your dedication to our work. Today, of all days, we want to show our appreciation for the person who rolled up her sleeves and made the decision to fight back when she witnessed voter suppression and attacks on our rights.
Since our founding, we’ve made major strides in protecting the freedom to vote and investing in voter protection programs. We’ve mobilized thousands of volunteers to reach voters during midterm and runoff election seasons, and we’ve helped elect pro-voter candidates across the country. All of this wouldn’t be possible without your support, and without Stacey.
[**Please take a moment to wish her a happy birthday and celebrate her special day!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435578/516649456/239622128?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241209_f_HBDStacey_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDAyMGE2Yi04M2I2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rdydrYCg5c58XszxZhJS8yixNwAWzF5aTp-YY9eEM0=&emci=efe476df-77b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=24020a6b-83b6-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: Take a moment to celebrate with us | | | It’s a special day here at Fair Fight — it’s Stacey Abrams’s birthday! Stacey created Fair Fight back in 2018 to address voter suppression, empower Georgians, and protect our democracy. We’re so grateful for everything that she’s done to disrupt the tactics of MAGA-affiliated lawmakers, so we’re taking a moment to celebrate her special day. | Fair Fight is the national leader in the fight for voting rights and our democracy, and we’re so grateful for your dedication to our work. Today, of all days, we want to show our appreciation for the person who rolled up her sleeves and made the decision to fight back when she witnessed voter suppression and attacks on our rights. Since our founding, we’ve made major strides in protecting the freedom to vote and investing in voter protection programs. We’ve mobilized thousands of volunteers to reach voters during midterm and runoff election seasons, and we’ve helped elect pro-voter candidates across the country. All of this wouldn’t be possible without your support, and without Stacey. Thank you, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved.
