name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
| | Take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA2MZcW8O7nj86l5UGx5hNmhcLmD-L6wViDnUz4idz1UTKVleLdD5e_MpGIXAbw0FTcRtmaCQt-wDBTOaHfFgNS68FsqeOx8vV_3xUwOSOXnY8h0tXpSCONXwcpa8BjULuTYGpohiwNT9F8_jIHOj67Jh5UaWjE93ZmANO2GQfHiTw%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like _Father Knows Best_ , _Marcus Welby_ , _M.D._ , and even _Dennis the Menace_. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA09MFTmGJ4re5Uuw2TksJPGytNXPJ9u3eJi_rtYYPAvp5WaJj1llpVTCVjDa6AcFnxK4Ho2VbUc--TbECknLnk1NMkNrgYSEhiOQC7_gfj4h04oEeSTsu4oaiUFjBAoY4TG5cPLH_SeD6bqovPb59lVqYCWHqJI_C4WgzJcOa6ZXg%3D%3D)
---
And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. __**Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA3RYoQFzN6LNj38wkMv8RGFTqBG1poRYlTey5tQRrq3aiBC0YQz5MHm4cBGpB_2fUaExNUAdLC11JMvHn0pqrG8t7f4BCRmg8QmF92FSUvWQ8BinqMJap9uksCGVS5jJUN5ObozgBvhCfWyhrpK44BVPFkkmvN3Mvzp07PeiixWCg%3D%3D) And it's only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **_[Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA06oJ6pEo184ofy_6b6OcxOoFdRW3DaQnjtwWbC32XvMVRrjlQ-foYLPqg8srOaTzp62M1xxkCholzqM72il0kggOH2PS8TsJ-W45aKm2gAMCTf5rnN_5zVOpWZS1g2kGQAlW3AqB-MvB4fc2CmXINLtRl5qtdtP-EvKCytVVmAGw%3D%3D)_** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. _**[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA2B9PMk2eqxZBPAaBmMXsrcBamtYXztXUqDefVaNz4ANb3Ryrqtk50S57fLK5EnSjP79ESx8gfqhvzEiaB2HVjTgOO-pLKx9bfUhyHOyBKDEiqkaLLJTGqkCDQDJvbjaojUUPPK9kRWaRzFg-icspMgA4_GBoH3ca_9qTml5eVajw%3D%3D)**_** ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, you are eligible for amazing free bonuses. For example, if your **Founding Supporter Gift** is $50 you will receive: **** All ten episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. ****** And a FREE copy of my children's book:_Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful.** It was my honor as a father and a soon-to-be-grandad to write _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ with the great team at Brave Books -- the same God-focused conservative team that's bringing _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you've seen me and other Brave Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D'Souza, Lara Trump, and so many more have written a Brave Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, Brave Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. __[_**But I hope you'll be a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of**** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****.**_ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA0PQWcpNTeVPTUc3IBfPq_su91m2LXFgbXTOar4yHq_yqdnQWB9ZJ9_kUaxCza87ICY9VtmOzIAluRNRbbJnHofQgWNHQyIZwPZmbxuiVjOSrFrp591vCWqbrDf3ugH0PnwRlxe4Tm3oDzxs3pCi6LuF4jFm1ZYxR-BKe-M4LJO6g%3D%3D)Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.** Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cc451028c18b41b6b14658c17c173021&_e=N-T2e9BeJsPjPkIn5e8_EglCfsEbBnUZu9Y9B8nTPQSvF7aWap-I-l5jPfU8ev8aRfqTIDKAqbS_v-ryRPUIUZf8aC6PyeTGK83nlkQ6q5AU_hpI5PAhmvPanT6sBMhOLQS6g0p3Mj3b615yiDz6PvL2POPMcgKzSCDW-EWO35zU0OF90VM9EhNaPBmhvCY6BDX2lPbDE6g-PgyqGBwY8fDoowLGX-3zcab1M9gtPA3_7xQQSYDZwvgI4JirPWfKjvSoJaEGPqYRLyyAxFpXCoZUguTpWXm_nDP2AZk7BFGI2IUap_HTTqPM03jNKLMR6ASJS1A_bvWoQ4M68LAKax40MJuEbRy-L_u5bj09S81KB3hpjqdxn1gnf16t-Cw2aktjH_6Aq3Qy8GpLMC0YXg%3D%3D)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This process will be a true test:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Let’s review a few of Donald Trump’s cabinet picks so far

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2424%2E4032634%2EeWPk3E)
---
Let's review a few of Donald Trump's cabinet picks so far: First, there’s **Pete Hegseth** , Trump's pick for the **Department of Defense**. I’ll just say it: A Fox & Friends Weekend co-host is not qualified to be the Secretary of Defense. But beyond that, he has been accused of sexually abusing a woman and buying her silence with an NDA. He preyed on female staff and attended work events drunk. And he ran a veterans nonprofit so far into debt they nearly went bankrupt. This is extremely disqualifying — and he should not be confirmed. Next, there’s **Scott Bessent** : a hedge fund manager nominated to be **Treasury Secretary**. When his name was mentioned as Trump’s pick, it drew a huge sigh of relief from Wall Street. That should be a blinking red light telling us that working people will see no help coming their way. We must determine whether Bessent will transfer his loyalty from Wall Street investors to America’s workers. Then there’s **Russell Vought** , a leading figure in developing Project 2025, who was nominated to lead the **Office of Management and Budget**. I recall not too long ago a time when Trump stressed that he had no connections with Project 2025. He lied through his teeth. Vought has a particular interest in eliminating the independence of some regulatory agencies and reworking our government’s infrastructure in order to strengthen the president’s power. We must hold Trump and Vought accountable. We’ve got **Linda McMahon** , an unqualified, billionaire wrestling mogul, who was nominated to lead the **Education Department** (a department that Trump has called to dismantle). This is an insult to our teachers and to every kid in America who relies on a good public school education. He picked billionaire and Wall Street CEO **Howard Lutnick** to be our country’s **Commerce Secretary** — yet another win for the billionaire class at the expense of working people, and a personification of Trump’s goal to extend tax giveaways for giant corporations and billionaires. There was the short-lived nomination of **Matt Gaetz** for **Attorney General**. And then the supposed **“Department of Government Efficiency”** led by **Elon Musk** and **Vivek Ramaswamy** (two people to do the work of one person in the spirit of true “efficiency”). Musk must be there as a thank-you for the $250 million he poured into getting Trump elected. He has made clear one of his first priorities is to “delete” the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, which has returned over $20 billion to consumers who were cheated by companies. Look, that’s big talk, but the laws supporting the CFPB are strong, and the agency has withstood challenges from many groups that thought they could make more money if the CFPB didn’t exist. They’ve failed, and they will continue to fail. These nominees have enormous power over how our country operates — and it is the Senate’s responsibility to scrutinize these individuals, seriously consider the information that comes out of the vetting process, and ask the necessary questions in order to determine whether or not they’re fit to uphold the Constitution of the United States. The confirmation process will be a true test: whether Republicans have the courage to vote against Trump nominees who are very clearly disqualified, or whether they will pledge fealty to him no matter what. I’m going to do all in my power throughout this process to share the truth about unqualified nominees, hold feet to the fire, and fight for a government that works for the American people. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkU-r2zAQxD-NfLORVkocH3xIcQyFvNeSFnoUirRyBPpjJLml3774Je291xmY2d_Ojzf5ppx3cXlXAUfrs8xFRiUfzvtWP7IrtdUqJ9_eJVAQLYOWDpI1ZqRsMEI0OLKe8_7UHzltHqM1oO-HOxeWD8YelDlRLhg7HnohqD3Zxo17DgM6AAfOaMcsNQeD1AwAqAwlgiqPuXY2I5oUVDTe3THX3xnXlGunU2j8-Kh1LYSfCcwE5hS9i9jtZxejPHZoNgKzTlsuWAjMGRdXKuZd_MAKqjzJCJ-LJnyijA7wTkHAFdj0ZbpcvhE4bjXIkraskfBpzamsqKuLy8sKaNwWCJ8wKOdfolZhVW6JhE__up5VLz_FirESPn2S32_nz9fLTX49t_P11v79TZNHs_5y3rty7Imgyx7_QV7_Z6WfI_wJAAD__6ffnIA)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkU-r2zAQxD-NfLORVkocH3xIcQyFvNeSFnoUirRyBPpjJLml3774Je291xmY2d_Ojzf5ppx3cXlXAUfrs8xFRiUfzvtWP7IrtdUqJ9_eJVAQLYOWDpI1ZqRsMEI0OLKe8_7UHzltHqM1oO-HOxeWD8YelDlRLhg7HnohqD3Zxo17DgM6AAfOaMcsNQeD1AwAqAwlgiqPuXY2I5oUVDTe3THX3xnXlGunU2j8-Kh1LYSfCcwE5hS9i9jtZxejPHZoNgKzTlsuWAjMGRdXKuZd_MAKqjzJCJ-LJnyijA7wTkHAFdj0ZbpcvhE4bjXIkraskfBpzamsqKuLy8sKaNwWCJ8wKOdfolZhVW6JhE__up5VLz_FirESPn2S32_nz9fLTX49t_P11v79TZNHs_5y3rty7Imgyx7_QV7_Z6WfI_wJAAD__6ffnIA)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkU-r2zAQxD-NfLORVkocH3xIcQyFvNeSFnoUirRyBPpjJLml3774Je291xmY2d_Ojzf5ppx3cXlXAUfrs8xFRiUfzvtWP7IrtdUqJ9_eJVAQLYOWDpI1ZqRsMEI0OLKe8_7UHzltHqM1oO-HOxeWD8YelDlRLhg7HnohqD3Zxo17DgM6AAfOaMcsNQeD1AwAqAwlgiqPuXY2I5oUVDTe3THX3xnXlGunU2j8-Kh1LYSfCcwE5hS9i9jtZxejPHZoNgKzTlsuWAjMGRdXKuZd_MAKqjzJCJ-LJnyijA7wTkHAFdj0ZbpcvhE4bjXIkraskfBpzamsqKuLy8sKaNwWCJ8wKOdfolZhVW6JhE__up5VLz_FirESPn2S32_nz9fLTX49t_P11v79TZNHs_5y3rty7Imgyx7_QV7_Z6WfI_wJAAD__6ffnIA)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Freedom Liberty Report
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyU0E1rAyEQxvFP494MOho3HjwUwp6aFnrpcfFlzAruC-q29NuXJJecCj3_-Q3D83kZLzbltFzf7Iwm5jKWOi52nFLO1E8l1Ua9LWumbgQGknKgTI-8C4ZxHaTs0PBeiP7UK8G6yQTLZH_E3nnlovY2nhCDlqCUdwqj7pK53eHANAgQnB14ZOEYkAUNgDYwIpnNWNohFsSwznYJOTks7afgtpZ28OvcZTO1tlUiXggMBIZ1a-v-JyEw7EvdXfUlObwpMTgizsOD0NcHoB93Qd9jxFIJKCTiHLbvlHOqqidwlOw625TvbxTzlJ5D-8-WXwZ-AwAA___N6YFN)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUz71u7CAQQOGngc7WMMDaLihus93eNiXCMF4jjX80Rhvt20fJA0RKf_RJ5-MRH6ly3Z__00ZhYYlyxT3FtTJ3eZV6tS4nObibIwK6zmAHUzS6BDBTcU5TMIO1wzjcLOg1-GEy5MfZjskss3d0Kz6X0RNknImsruHbMQgTWrQGerNA8YWgTIiUCigHiUlavwhROba0F64zSXsLnYe0Ph-b5rC2dl7K_lN4V3j_pVV4P6W-Un73a9tYSyjnZ2Wu121QDp5bqvxjtr_8vwJ-BQAA__9-4WcK)_

Team, I’m sure you receive many emails from campaigns asking for money, but hopefully, I can provide some context behind these requests. As we strategize and plan for the future of our campaign, our monthly and quarterly fundraising objectives are crucial in these discussions. Our ability to secure victory in 2025 hinges on whether we meet these goals. We don't set these benchmarks arbitrarily; they guide our trajectory towards success. So, when you receive communications from us stressing the significance of reaching our fundraising goal, please understand that it comes from a place of sincerity. _**We value your support immensely and are committed to being completely transparent about our campaign's direction.**_ [**With that in mind, I need your support to ensure we reach our fundraising goal. Anything you can contribute between my campaign and Serve America – whether $3 or $5 – is greatly appreciated by me and my team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435804/516650239/-2101623703?refcode=241209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGMyZWE1Yy04NWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zu2hKutbNX-HLf9wW_-Y8PP9SXy-LO0C2JJrx2LxpZY=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98435805/516650240/-1451023484?refcode=241209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGMyZWE1Yy04NWI2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zu2hKutbNX-HLf9wW_-Y8PP9SXy-LO0C2JJrx2LxpZY=) Thank you,

We’re stunned...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22617%2E4449941%2EsnwRLa)
---
**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241209_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22617%2E4449941%2EsnwRLa) **WORSE NEWS:** Far-right billionaire Elon Musk is considering purchasing it!

We’re **stunned** to see that MSNBC is struggling after years of being one of the top options for progressive news.

**So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see our top supporters viewing habits:** | **[_[1-CLICK POLL] Do you watch _MSNBC?__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241209_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22617%2E4449941%2EsnwRLa)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241209_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22617%2E4449941%2EsnwRLa) | **[YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241209_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22617%2E4449941%2EsnwRLa)**
---

**** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

_Now, Trump’s biggest supporter is trying to buy it and RUIN one of the most trusted news sources in America._

We need to know if our supporters are still watching MSNBC or if they’ve abandoned the once beloved network.
**[_So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/msnbc_viewership24?source=FFR_20241209_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=22617%2E4449941%2EsnwRLa)**
**500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e98bc06c7c164090bbcceed7be6a185e&_e=DaFkX6DLD8lB5v_6lfIHgy2TE13twHwMz97-YSy-dIFojTx47YcJZaN67g3Tf17S4iMrsWQhsiRN_eq9Xv6ZlhAJoxgGVZLeULhb99mp8TmSra5vNWK3jy8WocG4BrjsD7eIL-WrWHXRtNxbvw5yLT58eV2-Ugckc-ONn9Ne_xw4MB1CzOAFJWNDPYDQqTncQ8koHGH-_e1PIpeU9A08Hi2kAAtB3WXJAgocTaSpG-0Sjo3sOQCqObkZZAyxqxKn-d6ZWwLT960ZzUro2NRa0e5tVLdHn8dt9LhFOS7QRCySEHVmDGK8iqr0ACMDvIdPxa9kgMk13V-E-VcsLi3OJcgyG2v4rix9N6y9f-ms7kyX5K02ZM63WMWp5HTDZZk67cKY1CMh1TL2BudHgP3ZGVZRk6s7X69IxrbmE2_vXes%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e98bc06c7c164090bbcceed7be6a185e&_e=DaFkX6DLD8lB5v_6lfIHgy2TE13twHwMz97-YSy-dIFojTx47YcJZaN67g3Tf17S4iMrsWQhsiRN_eq9Xv6ZlhAJoxgGVZLeULhb99mp8TmSra5vNWK3jy8WocG4BrjsD7eIL-WrWHXRtNxbvw5yLT58eV2-Ugckc-ONn9Ne_xw4MB1CzOAFJWNDPYDQqTncQ8koHGH-_e1PIpeU9A08Hi2kAAtB3WXJAgocTaSpG-0Sjo3sOQCqObkZZAyxqxKnZvDudMMjCik6eEksBz6PGPGDnvJ_r1nJr8yj0PvsYi25DHAJTgHow3T6sbcTI69B4J17zURQCsI1ddVCR3KttBvR5loSqwoq7eyC3P3k8idegPc-ZtwXj_eahAKvUP-9_cInMM_icosVEXyP3Ru3D2kjpa3HCQkQkJuUPafbg9Y%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
